Name: The Female Leader
Description:
The Female Leader started in May 2020. 

After having experienced bullying, and psychological and emotional abuse in the course of my career,  I felt the need to talk about it… Too often, abuse in the workplace can have a negative impact on mental health, self-confidence, and ultimately our future. 

I aim to inspire women to lead with courage and conviction, to be strong and brave, to believe in themselves, and to never forget that kindness and empathy are not weaknesses but signs of strengths.

This page talks about #leadership #mentalhealth #women 

This is a platform to sharing curated stories, articles, and tips about women and women-related content.

Though I mostly talk about women/female topics, I fully support gender equality. 

#daretobedifferent #bestrong #bekind #bebrave #thefemaleleader #womensupportingwomen

Please DM for collaborations 
(vanessa@themarketingconsultancy.co.za)

Please refer to LinkedIn Professional Community Policy: https://www.linkedin.com/legal/professional-community-policies

Pour cela, il s’appuie sur des outils incontournables : cotations, actualités économiques et financières, graphiques… mais apporte également des innovations et des outils inconnus jusqu’alors pour les investisseurs tunisiens.

L’aspect communautaire est particulièrement développé, les internautes ont la parole et peuvent échanger leurs avis et leurs conseils dans les forums de discussions dédiés à toutes les sociétés cotées. Ils peuvent également donner leurs recommandations sur les valeurs ce qui forme un consensus de marché.

Somos jóvenes, aunque no tanto. Nuestra historia tiene poco más de 20 años, pero llevamos más de 170 en el sector de la prensa. Name: Ink - we are travel media
Description:
Ink has been in business for 30 years and is the world’s leading travel media company. 

We work with the largest travel brands and airlines worldwide - including Booking.com, easyJet, Agoda, Virgin Atlantic, Eurowings, Singapore Airlines, Malaysia Airlines, Ethiopian Airlines and many more - to craft award winning content across video, social, digital and print, and drive unparalleled media sales. 

Our divisions include Navigator, a bespoke travel retargeting platform; ReachTV, the world’s largest airport TV network; Business Traveler, which engages HNW audiences in print, online and on TV; and More Corners, a social-first travel inspiration channel and co-branded content feed. 

In 2019 we became part of Stagwell a Nasdaq trading company, founded in 2015, by Mark Penn (ex-Microsoft). We have a collective vision as a global marketing and communications group on transforming marketing globally.  We say our industry has been dominated for decades by four firms that haven’t evolved fast enough to adapt to the times. We believe that unrivalled creativity plus data-driven connectivity drives unmistakable effectiveness. Our headquarters is in London, and we have global offices in Miami, San Diego, Singapore, Kuala Lumpur and São Paulo.

Name: Raftaar.in
Description:
Launched in 2005, Raftaar.in is the world’s first platform for search and exploration of Hindi content. Since then it has steadily evolved from a Hindi content aggregator to the largest Hindi infotainment portal. The platform has been developed by its sister-concern Indicus Analytics, an Internationally renowned economic data, analytics, and research firm known for its cutting edge technologies and algorithms to create analytical, machine learning, indexing, and statistical modeling applications.

The site compiles information from multiple online sources expanding across verticals such as Search, News, Education, Dictionary, Astrology, Religion, Songs, Movies, Blogs etc. Raftaar’s innovative solutions separate the Hindi content from the entire web, indexing, categorizing and classifying it in an automated manner on a real time basis and making otherwise difficult to access information easily available.  Its unique classification algorithms combined with usage of analytics provides the content into specific easy to access verticals. To their credit they are the 

First to convert Hindi font from ASCII to Unicode and vice versa, 
First to introduce a phonetic keyboard, 
First Online Hindi Thesaurus, 
First to create index and make searchable both Unicode and non-Unicode content,
First to introduce character morphology for Hindi, 
First to allow searching Hindi songs in Devanaagri, 
First to search Devanaagri content using Roman script

Raftaar has been the recipient of the Manthan award for e-localization, showcased by the Government of India, Department of Official Language (Rajbhasha Vibhag) and empanelled with the Department of Audio Visual Publicity, GoI.

Name: Le Canard enchaîné
Description:
Le Canard enchaîné est un journal satirique paraissant le mercredi. 

"Le Canard" est un phénomène unique dans la presse écrite française et même mondiale, car il est totalement indépendant. Indépendant de la publicité et, donc, à l’abri des pressions qui vont avec. Il tire ses ressources – depuis 1915 – du produit exclusif de ses ventes et de la fidélité de ses lecteurs. Indépendant également de la finance. Il n’appartient pas à un quelconque caïd du CAC40 mais il est l’entière propriété de ses salariés. Une singularité qui lui a d’ailleurs permis de résister à toutes les entreprises de rachat ou de déstabilisation. 

Cette indépendance financière se double d’une indépendance politique. «Le Canard n’est ni de gauche, ni de droite, il est d’opposition», résumait un de ses anciens directeurs, qui le décrivait aussi comme un journal irrévérencieux, d’humeur et de bonne humeur.

Si « le Volatile », comme l’avait jadis baptisé de Gaulle, penche quand même à gauche, il n’est inféodé à personne, à aucun parti politique ou syndicat, à aucune chapelle. Il est donc libre de toutes entraves. De là vient sa force pour tenter de vous informer au plus près et de vous distraire au mieux.

Name: BARDA
Description:
En la antigüedad, los bardos eran los encargados de transmitir las historias, las leyendas, las tradiciones y la cultura de sus comunidades. Recorrían distintos pueblos y recitaban eso que querían salvaguardar del olvido. 

Hoy, en la era de la hiperinformación, la comunicación se convirtió en un modo específico de acción. Comunicar no es simplemente hablar, escribir o twittear: es comprender el entorno, definir prioridades, establecer una línea de acción estratégica y gestionar su ejecución.

A nyomtatott magazinban átfogó elemzéseket, nagyinterjúkat, máshol nem olvasható információkat közlünk. A hetente jelentkező ICT Global podcast minden alkalommal egy-egy aktuális, nagy érdeklődésre számot tartó témát jár körül, illetve a szektor jelentős személyiségeit kapjuk mikrofonvégre.

Az ICT Global célközönségét a hazai ICT-piac felső- és középvezetői, HR-vezetői, a legnagyobb vállalatok ICT-menedzserei, az infokommunikációs területért felelős politikai döntéshozók, szakmapolitikai szervezetek képviselői, minisztériumi háttérintézmények munkatársai jelentik.

However, it is imperative that financial decisions are taken to the ‘T,’ given all the uncertainties and volatility that today’s market brings forth to the table. This is where Finance Outlook India focuses solely in empowering individuals and businesses to make robust and future-safe financial decisions.

We strive to be your trusted ‘FinancePedia,’ which encompasses every facet of the field including banking, finance, insurance, technology, and consulting. Name: Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority
Description:
Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority (TCRA) is a statutory regulatory body responsible for regulating the electronic and postal communication sector in Tanzania. It was established under the Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority Act, No.12 of 2003, which merged the Tanzania Communications Commission (TCC) and the Tanzania Broadcasting Commission (TBC). The Authority became operational on 1st November, 2003 and effectively took over the functions of the merged two Commissions. This is mandated by section 4(1) to (7) of the TCRA Act, 2003. 

OUR VISION
“A society empowered by communication services.”

OUR MISSION
“To regulate communication services for the welfare of Tanzanian society.”

Name: Lumea Justitiei
Description:
Lumeajustitiei.ro (www.luju.ro) este singurul cotidian online din Romania, realizat de jurnalisti de investigatie profesionisti, care abordeaza domeniul Justitiei si problemele reale ale sistemului judiciar si este editat de SC JURINDEX MEDIA SRL Bucuresti.

Lansat in data de 26 iulie 2010, Lumeajustitiei.ro a devenit cel mai citit site de profil de catre judecatori, procurori, avocati, notari, executori, experti si justitiabili, fiind accesat de toate institutiile care alcatuiesc sistemul judecatoresc si care preiau zilnic articolele pentru a le include in revista presei – in prezent, siteul este accesat de circa 10.000 - 15.000 de vizitatori unici/zi, cu o medie de peste 20.000 afisari/zi.

Lumeajustitiei.ro - este un produs Premium in domeniu si are un profil de cititor intre 25 – 60 ani, cu studii superioare - pregatire juridica sau economica (categorii de public cu putere de cumparare). Site-ul este accesat si de segmente incepand de la studentii facultatilor de Drept si pana la magistrati pensionati si avocati de prestigiu, inclusiv de mediul de afaceri. Articolele publicate sunt comentate de un numar foarte mare de magistrati, personal auxiliar, avocati, experti etc si preluate frecvent de publicatiile nationale.

Continutul editorial al site-ului Lumeajustitiei.ro este complex, diversificat, actualizat zilnic. Echipa editoriala este condusa de Razvan Savaliuc, jurnalist de investigatie de peste 30 de ani, cu studii juridice si de jurnalism, specializat pe domeniul Justitiei.  Sectiunile site-ului sunt structurate pe ariile: Eveniment, Dezvaluiri/Anchete, Magistrati, Instante, Parchete, Institutii, Avocati, Barouri, Executori, Notari INM – INEC, Servicii secrete, Opinii, Interviuri, ONG-uri, International (inclusiv cazurile de referinta de la CEDO).

- Politique & Gouvernance, 
- Ressources, Infrastructures et Réseaux,
- Efficacité & Transition.

L’offre comprend des articles d’actualité, le suivi des textes officiels et de l’actualité législative et réglementaire, des interviews, des analyses d’experts, des data, ainsi qu’un annuaire des dirigeantes et dirigeants, et de leurs organisations ...

Name: Wavemaker South Africa
Description:
At Wavemaker we believe there is always a better way to grow. We know that growth models of the past will not serve the future. Established approaches and traditional thinking are being exploded in every sector, in every market. But exceptional growth requires uncomfortable change – and this change demands courage, from our clients and from our people.  

That’s why we’ve built Provocative Planning, a way of working powered by our spirit of restless enquiry in pursuit of better outcomes. It rejects traditional linear planning in favour of a modular approach, fusing machine learning and human intelligence in a unique way that gets the best from both. The three growth modules in Provocative Planning – Unlock, Maximize and Transform – provoke growth at different speeds, for today, ongoing, and for tomorrow. 

Positive Provocation empowers our people every bit as much it does our clients. It inspires us to be well-informed, careful listeners with the confidence and knowledge to ask tough questions. We become more confident, more courageous, more capable. When we positively provoke, we Grow Fearless.  
 
We shape consumers’ brand decisions and experiences through media, content and technology. Wavemaker’s Provocative Planning is fuelled by the world’s most powerful consumer decision-making data. This means we know where and how you can win customers.

The intelligent insight this provides feeds our world-class precision capabilities in every area of our business, from planning and activation, to our integrated practices such as ecommerce an
Our business is to support, consult and execute the making of these decisions. We bring together data, creativity and platforms to help the best brands in the world make the futures they want by making better choices today.

All our people, processes and technology are united through our focus on understanding, accelerating and optimizing purchase journeys; making them more satisfying for consumers and more effective for our clients.

Name: Mediální skupina A11
Description:
Jsme sice celoplošná televize, ale zatím nás sleduje jen Aleš… vždycky, když ho manželka Helča chce potrestat. 
Naše programová ředitelka Bára se ale snaží ze všech sil a občas se jí podaří vykouzlit něco, co opravdu stojí za to. 
Kampaň? Ta je samozřejmě dokonalá – jsme televize na dvě jedničky! A kdo jiný by ji dělal než největší macherka na světě. 

Sledujte nás… pokud chcete vidět, jak se dělá televizní magie s lehkým sarkasmem a trochou „interního chaosu“.

Name: Oui Speak Fashion(OSF)
Description:
Oui Speak Fashion (OSF) is a web media platform based in New York that delivers the latest global information on the fashion business and beauty industry. The name “Oui Speak Fashion” combines the positive connotations of the word “We” with the French word “Oui” (meaning “Yes”), symbolizing our mission to transcend borders and speak the universal language of fashion.

Furthermore, Oui Speak Fashion aims to become a platform where people involved in the fashion and beauty industries can seamlessly connect and engage across North America, Europe, Asia and beyond. As a hub for cross-border information exchange, we are bringing fresh perspectives to the global fashion industry.

Our editorial team covers the future of fashion and beauty, spotlighting sustainability efforts, next-generation trends, emerging designers, and innovative digital marketing strategies.

With the concept of “Fashion Meets Tech,” we also focus on rapidly advancing technologies such as generative AI, the Metaverse, and retail technology, exploring how the fusion of fashion and technology opens up new possibilities for the future.

We remain committed to delivering the latest updates on brand initiatives to a global audience with integrity, staying at the forefront of the industry.

Name: Limougeotte
Description:
En juillet 2020, un homme a eu honte de ne trouver aucune idée sortie pour ses amis, alors que tout le monde comptait sur lui.

Pour laver cet affront, il a décidé une chose : créer une application qui liste tout ce qu’on peut faire en Haute-Vienne. Rien que pour lui.

Mais il n’a pas su tenir sa langue.

Et maintenant, il fait vivre une application utilisée par des dizaines de milliers de Haut-Viennois (en plus d’être embarqué dans de folles aventures qu’il est incapable de refuser).

Mais au bout du compte, tout ceci l’aide dans son rêve fou, qui est le suivant :

Que plus aucun habitant de Haute-Vienne ne s’ennuie !

Mais pour ça, les habitants doivent trouver des activités sympas près de chez eux, peu importe leurs goûts, leur âge ou leur situation.

C’est pour ça que Limougeotte vous aide à mettre vos événements dans la poche de plus de 37 000 Haut-Viennois, peu importe que vous organisiez des soirées festives, des marchés, des cours de sport, des ateliers, des concerts, des jeux pour enfants…

Alors si vous souhaitez afficher vos événements auprès des locaux, envoyez-nous un message !

Name: Inclupédie
Description:
Inclupédie est un dictionnaire des synonymes inclusifs, ou inclunymes. 
Il s'agit d'un outil en ligne sous forme de dictionnaire des dictionnaire des synonymes dont le but est de faciliter la rédaction de textes inclusifs. 

Inclupédie tend à proposer des pistes à titre d'inspiration, à ouvrir des portes pour montrer qu'il est possible d'avancer, de commencer si l'on a un outil en main.

Tout comme un dictionnaire des synonymes classique, son fonctionnement est simple : vous saisissez un terme, l'outil vous propose des synonymes.

Vous y trouverez : 

- des adjectifs
- des noms
- des locutions
- des expressions
- des néologismes
- des synonymes parfaits
- des synonymes partiels
- des métonymies
...

En plus des synonymes, le dictionnaire proposera :
- une définition des entrées 
- la nature de l'entrée (dét. - nom - pronom - adj. -...)
- une mention en cas de régionalisme
- le registre de langue
- des exemples en contexte
- un avertissement sur les entrées pouvant s'avérer offensantes en contexte
- une mention éventuelle en cas de spécificité (néologisme, anglicisme...)
...

Name: Mains à la pâte podcast
Description:
Mains à la pâte est un podcast qui plonge au cœur de l’entrepreneuriat québécois, mais pas comme vous l’avez déjà vu. Nous accueillons des invités reconnus pour leur succès et leur notoriété, mais notre objectif est d’aller au-delà des titres et des succès visibles.

Dans chaque épisode, nous posons des questions inattendues et personnelles à des entrepreneurs que vous pensez connaître. Nous cherchons à révéler ce qui se cache derrière leur parcours professionnel : les défis personnels, les moments de doute, les influences marquantes de leur enfance et les tournants décisifs de leur carrière.

Nous voulons offrir à nos auditeurs une perspective unique sur l’humain derrière l’entreprise. Chaque épisode est une occasion de découvrir les entrepreneurs sous un angle inédit, en abordant des aspects de leur vie rarement explorés dans les médias traditionnels.

- Des invités influents issus de divers secteurs, connus pour leur visibilité et leur impact au Québec.

- Des échanges authentiques, sans filtres, où les entrepreneurs se 
dévoilent comme jamais auparavant.

Name: Vygr
Description:
India's Largest AI-powered Human Creator-Led News Network

At a time when media is either too corporate or too chaotic, Vygr News is building a third path—one that's human-first, tech-enabled, and creator-powered. We’re India’s largest network of verified digital creators, rural reporters, and youth journalists using AI tools to deliver real news, in real time, to real people.

Vygr News isn’t just a media company—it’s a movement. One where over 1,000 human creators from across Tier 1, 2, and 3 India are reporting stories that matter—from farmer protests in Punjab to policy updates in Karnataka, from sports underdogs to small-town entrepreneurs. We don’t chase breaking news. We build context, credibility, and connection—in the language and voice of the people.

Our creators are trained to research, report, script, and shoot using AI-enhanced workflows that reduce turnaround time by up to 40%. From content outlines to headline suggestions, we integrate tools that boost speed—but always keep the final curation human. Our motto: AI for acceleration, not replacement.

Vygr News currently operates in multiple Indian languages, publishes across video-first formats (YouTube, Instagram, Shorts), and is consumed by over 5 million monthly viewers—especially Gen Z and millennial audiences who trust creators more than anchors.

We’re not limited by geography or jargon. From a college student in Nagpur reporting on unemployment, to a rural woman in Bihar sharing updates on government schemes—Vygr empowers voices that mainstream media often misses.

Our partnerships with state governments, skilling bodies, and universities allow us to deploy creator training at scale, creating not just content—but livelihoods. In 2024 alone, Vygr trained over 500 rural youth in content and digital journalism, providing them with a sustainable income stream and national visibility.

We believe the future of news is decentralized, inclusive, and creator-driven. And it must be built ..

Name: EnergíaHoy
Description:
Energía Hoy: 20 años conectando al sector energético de México

Energía Hoy es la plataforma líder en divulgación y análisis del sector energético en México, con dos décadas de trayectoria como un referente confiable e indispensable para los actores clave de la industria. Como grupo multimedia, ofrecemos una gama de productos, servicios y espacios virtuales que nos posicionan como el vínculo estratégico entre la oferta y la demanda del sector.

Nos enfocamos en abordar las áreas más relevantes de la industria energética: petróleo y gas (exploración y producción, refinación, petroquímica), electricidad (generación, distribución, comercialización de energía, Código de Red), cogeneración; energías verdes, renovables, almacenamiento, electromovilidad, combustibles alternativos, hidrógeno; infraestructura, financiamiento, normatividad y regulación. Nuestro alcance abarca todas las industrias relacionadas con la energía, desde la extracción de recursos hasta la transformación y distribución, cubriendo cada eslabón de la cadena de valor.

El portal web de Energía Hoy se actualiza diariamente con las noticias más relevantes del sector, respaldado por un equipo editorial experto y colaboraciones de los especialistas más reconocidos de la industria. Además, hemos ampliado nuestra oferta de contenidos hacia temas estratégicos que inciden directamente en la iniciativa privada, el ámbito gubernamental y las políticas públicas relacionadas con la energía.

Nuestra edición digital ofrece reportajes especializados, análisis detallados y contenidos exclusivos que abordan los temas más importantes para la industria energética con un enfoque riguroso y oportuno. 

A lo largo de 20 años, Energía Hoy ha evolucionado para convertirse en el puente ideal entre los protagonistas del sector energético, consolidando su posición como la plataforma de referencia en México y más allá.

- les projets d’aménagements publics et privés

- le suivi des organismes socioprofessionnels
- la programmation culturelle de Provence
- l’information des professions juridiques

Le journal a été créé en 1839 sous le nom « Les marches du Palais ». 
En 1928, après avoir acquis ‘La gazette d’Apt », il devient « Les Petites Affiches de Vaucluse ». 
Le journal, habilité par la préfecture, diffuse les annonces légales et les appels d’offres du département. 
En 2005, une partie rédactionnelle traitant de l’économie locale et de l’aménagement du territoire est ajoutée aux pages d’annonces légales. 
Le journal devient l'Echo du Mardi en septembre 2011.

En janvier 2021, L'Echo du Mardi devient exclusivement un webmédia libre d'accès tout en gardant sa ligne éditoraiale historique : www.echodumardi.com .

Name: Atrangii
Description:
Under the leadership of Vibhu Agarwal, Atrangii OTT has rapidly ascended as a premier digital entertainment platform, celebrated for its critically acclaimed original series such as Parshuram, Hara Sindoor, Libaas, and Surangaa. By collaborating with top-tier talent and diversifying its genre portfolio, the platform continues to captivate millions, offering compelling storytelling that resonates with a broad audience. Atrangii’s relentless innovation and strategic partnerships underscore its mission to deliver premium, multifaceted entertainment.

Why Join Us?
At Atrangii, we champion innovation, creativity, and entertainment. As part of our dynamic teams, you’ll contribute to redefining digital entertainment across diverse genres—from provocative dramas to spiritually enriching narratives. Join our journey to shape the future of OTT platforms, collaborate with industry leaders, and create content that resonates with millions. Explore opportunities to grow with us and be at the forefront of India’s entertainment evolution.

Name: Appear
Description:
Headquartered in Oslo, Norway, Appear is a leader in live production technology, specialising in high-capacity, sustainable solutions for media processing and content delivery. Our portfolio is designed to support the most complex scenarios of live event contribution,  adapting seamlessly to the ever-evolving dynamics of the media, entertainment, and sports industries.

Our extensive client base, including world-leading content creators like NBCUniversal, Warner Bros. Discovery, Formula 1, NHL, and Riot Games, rely on our solutions to deliver the highest profile live media with utmost integrity and efficiency. This trust underscores our position at the pinnacle of live production technology, where our commitment to excellence and innovation meets the critical demands of the most prestigious live events worldwide.                                                                                                                                                                                

Founded in 2004, Appear has established itself as a leader in the industry. Thanks to our world-renowned team of experts and their relentless emphasis on modularity and functional versatility, we are at the forefront of innovation in live production technology.

We actively participate with key industry bodies and technology partners to drive the advancement of standardisation and foster continuous innovation. Our excellence is internationally recognised through numerous accolades, including the prestigious NAB Product of the Year and Excellence in Sustainability awards, celebrating our achievements in sustainability and technological leadership.

Fifty-two weekly e-newsletters are blasted per year to one of the largest databases of VIP personnel in the government and ICT industry. Telecom Review Africa has an imminent presence in all telco events & forums, being close to operators, vendors, regulators and governments in addition to investors of the industry.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Telecom Review Afrique est une plate-forme média bilingue qui couvre tout le continent en langues française et anglaise. Axée sur les dernières tendances en matière de TIC, nos éditions imprimées et numériques sont les médias de
référence pour les acteurs régionaux des TIC, gouvernements, et toute organisation souhaitant informer ses lecteurs de leurs activités et annonces récentes.

This challenge ignited the creation of "Humans of Globe" – a carefully designed platform aimed at offering you clear and practical viewpoints. Get ready for a magazine experience that simplifies complexities and helps you see your business landscape in a new light.

At its core, "Humans of Globe" is your go-to business and technology magazine. "Humans of Globe" is committed to nurturing excellence in the tech sphere by providing a platform for companies to showcase their pioneering services. C-level executives find a voice here, sharing analyses of tech trends, thus equipping startups with the latest market intelligence. Our startup-focused publications highlight success stories of visionary platforms that are not only disrupting industries but also shaping a better tomorrow.

Join the movement – become part of "Humans of Globe." Embrace simplified, relevant insights that shape the world, one perspective at a time. Connect with us and be empowered by the knowledge that truly matters.

Name: Citywire France
Description:
Citywire France - 

Fondé en 1999, Citywire est un éditeur financier indépendant basé à Londres. Citywire entretient une base de données de gérants de fonds, propre et unique, destinée à une audience de conseillers financiers, gérants de fortune, sélectionneurs de fonds et fonds de pensions avec comme objectif de les aider à investir l’argent de leurs clients.

Alliant journalisme à l’analyse de gérants de fonds, la société s’est développée considérablement lors de la dernière décennie pour atteindre plus de 3 millions de visiteurs uniques par an. Aujourd’hui, Citywire compte plus de 240 employés – dont une cinquantaine de journalistes – réparties entre Londres et des bureaux basés à Munich, Singapour, Hong Kong, New York et Milan. Le contenu des différents sites et différentes publications Citywire sont consultés aussi bien par des investisseurs professionnels que privés. Au fil des années, Citywire a développé la plus grande communauté de conseillers financiers indépendants et de gestionnaires de fortune en Angleterre, ainsi que la plus grande communauté de sélectionneurs de fonds dans le monde.

Our audience includes CEOs, executives, entrepreneurs and industry leaders who seek reliable insights for decision-making in Mexico and Latin America. Name: IQads & SMARK
Description:
Despre IQads: 
IQads este platforma dedicata industriilor de comunicare si creative, care activeaza cea mai mare comunitate creativa din Romania: profesionisti, freelanceri, aspiranti si admiratori. 

IQads > 3 directii de dezvoltare si activare a creativitatii: 
-	Publishing: Content premium despre industria creativa, la intersectia dintre advertising, marketing, creativitate, arta si cultura. 
-	Evenimente: Competitiile publicitarilor la Cupele Agentiilor si ADfel, eveniment anual de publicitate neconventionala: 7 zile de activari creative in fiecare an, peste 100 de branduri culturale si sociale implicate si peste 400 de idei implementate pana acum. 
-	Hub creativ: Plaforma TheCreator pentru competitii premium de branded user generated content 


Despre SMARK 
SMARK este platforma care reuneste comunitatea oamenilor de marketing din Romania. SMARK este o sursa de knowledge, un instrument de perfectionare si networking pentru cei care lucreaza in marcomm. 
SMARK a dezvoltat instrumente utile marketerilor din Romania prin: 
-	Publishing: SMARK.ro 
-	Evenimente de marketing si comunicare: SMARK KnowHow 
-	Rapoarte de cercetare sindicalizate: SMARK Research 

Seria SMARK KnowHow a fost creata in 2009 ca o alternativa la piata de evenimente de profil, prin relevanta si specificitatea temelor abordate si prin oferirea unei game extinse de informatii pe temele dezbatute. In 2015, seria are 6 evenimente: Promotions Now, Brands & Communities, Marketing Research Conference, Marketing for Women, Marketing for Men, Romanian Youth Focus. 

SMARK Research este un serviciu asociat comunitatii de marketing SMARK, prin care sunt identificate nevoi si trenduri relevante ale pietei si sunt oferite solutii sub forma rapoartelor de cercetare sindicalizate, dezvoltate in colaborare cu cele mai importante companii de research din Romania. 

IQads si SMARK sunt marci Blue Idea. 

Site-uri web: 
IQads: www.IQads.ro 
SMARK: www.SMARK.ro

SKY serves the business community through SKYBIZ, its corporate and commercial arm, which delivers content (SKYcable) and connectivity (SKY Fiber) services to any business of any size.

Name: CMCM• Le média de la seconde main
Description:
Échanger, réparer, revendre, donner : ces gestes dessinent notre rapport aux objets, à la valeur et au temps. Derrière eux, c’est tout un pan de notre économie, de nos habitudes et de nos imaginaires qui bascule.
Pourtant, ce changement profond reste largement invisible dans le récit médiatique. C’est pour combler ce vide que naît CMCM, le média dédié à l'économie de la seconde main.

Fondé en 2023, il décrypte :
– les mutations économiques et culturelles des pratiques de consommation
– les acteurs de la transition : entreprises, collectivités, associations, citoyens
– les imaginaires en circulation autour de la mode, du réemploi et du changement

CMCM, c’est :

– Un service de presse en ligne consacré à l’information sur la seconde main
– Une veille sur les tendances, les usages et les (in)actions politiques
– Un ton hybride entre analyse exigeante, narration incarnée et journalisme de terrain
– Une rubrique phare, "Sur les réseaux”, qui décrypte les récits de la seconde main en ligne
– Une couverture très suivie de la loi anti-fast fashion
- Un pôle de conception et d’écriture de conférences sur la transformation du marché et l’addiction au shopping
– Une audience engagée : 40 000 lecteurs mensuels, 12 000 abonnés à la newsletter, 10 000 abonnés sur les réseaux sociaux, 1,2 million de vues par mois
– Une équipe éditoriale expérimentée, au service de la pédagogie, du récit et de l’action collective

Directrice de la publication : Maurane Nait Mazi

Pop Pop est plus qu’une maison de créativité : c’est un écosystème vibrant où l’art de vivre, l’innovation et nos communautés se rencontrent. Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure hybride !

Name: oneM2M
Description:
We are the global community that develops IoT standards to enable interoperable, secure, and simple-to-deploy services for the IoT ecosystem. oneM2M standards are open, accessible and internationally recognized.

Formed in 2012 by the world’s preeminent ICT standards development organizations, oneM2M membership today consists of thought leaders from a broad range of industries, including industrial manufacturers and suppliers, consumer device manufacturers, component suppliers, and telecommunications service providers. 

oneM2M Partner standards development organizations are: ARIB (Japan), ATIS (North America), CCSA (China), ETSI (Europe), TIA (North America), TSDSI (India), TTA (Korea), and TTC (Japan).   Additional partners contributing to the oneM2M work include: the BBF (Broadband Forum), Continua, GlobalPlatform, HGI (Home Gateway Initiative), the New Generation M2M Consortium  ‐  Japan, and OMA (Open Mobile Alliance). 

oneM2M specifications provide a framework to support applications and services such as the smart grid, connected car, home automation, public safety, and health.

Name: ENERGDIVE
Description:
India’s energy transition is one of the most complex transformations of our time — a fast-evolving system where policy, markets, technology, capital, and climate continuously reshape one another. As India advances toward net-zero and the vision of Viksit Bharat 2047, the national priority is no longer just expanding access, but elevating energy intelligence — moving from growth to green leadership, from capacity creation to systems optimisation, and from ambition to measurable, investible impact.

This moment demands more than reporting; it demands a knowledge movement that explains, interrogates, and connects the forces driving India’s transformation. A platform capable of mapping how fuels shape electrons, how markets shape capital, and how innovations reshape entire systems. This is the purpose of ENERGDIVE.

At the heart of this movement is the ENERGDIVE Magazine, India’s most premium energy leadership publication and the definitive voice of India’s energy transition. With deep analysis, design intelligence, and disciplined storytelling, it chronicles the reforms, technologies, and decisions defining India’s energy and climate future.

Complementing the magazine is the ENERGDIVE Portal, an AI-powered Strategic Intelligence Platform that delivers curated insights, data-rich narratives, and visual intelligence tools to help leaders process complexity faster and act with clarity.

Together, the publication and the portal form ENERGDIVE — a unified strategic intelligence & knowledge ecosystem that transforms information into intelligence, insight into influence, and influence into impact. ENERGDIVE exists to equip policymakers, corporates, investors, innovators, and institutions with the clarity and confidence needed to lead India from energy security to sustainability leadership.

Bajo el respaldo de la marca Qubo, operamos tres verticales diseñadas para los líderes que buscan transformar su realidad:

 Qubo PROFESIONALES (con Daniel Titinger): El espacio de referencia para el management, la marca personal y el liderazgo de alta dirección. Masterclasses enfocadas en la excelencia profesional.

 Qubo PAÍS (con Gonzalo Carranza): Análisis profundo de economía, competitividad e infraestructura. El punto de encuentro para entender los motores del desarrollo nacional desde la gestión técnica.

 Qubo ELECTOR (con Claudia Chiroque): Formación cívica y escrutinio político. Entrevistas incisivas diseñadas para formar ciudadanos con criterio y fortalecer la democracia desde un voto informado.

¿Por qué seguir a Qubo en LinkedIn?
LinkedIn es nuestra comunidad de acción. Aquí compartimos:

Insights accionables de nuestras entrevistas para aplicar en tu organización.

Debates técnicos sobre la coyuntura económica y política del país.

Herramientas de liderazgo para la gestión de equipos y talento.

En Qubo, creemos que el crecimiento personal es el primer paso para el crecimiento del país. Únete a la conversación y se parte de la evolución.

Name: FLUIDES & TRANSMISSIONS
Description:
Fluides & Transmissions  est la seule revue professionnelle francophone dédiée aux utilisateurs de composants et de systèmes de transmissions, hydrauliques, pneumatiques, mécaniques ou électriques. Ces derniers accédent à une source d'information unique sur les composants et systèmes ou services disponibles sur le marché.
 -Actualités : Tout le mois écoulé, en France, en Europe et dans le monde : les événements, les décideurs, les débats, nouveautés et marchés. Nous rendons compte de tout ce qui bouge.
 -Manifestations : Un compte rendu détaillé des événements qui ont marqué la profession et l'ensemble du secteur, avec les points saillants à retenir pour votre entreprise.
 -Technologie : La description technique d'un produit, d'une gamme, dans un langage clair, pour mieux appréhender l'évolution technologique de vos outils et répondre ou anticiper vos besoins.
 -Solutions : Des exemples concrets d'utilisation de composants et ensembles de transmission, à travers tous les secteurs d'application.
 -Interview : Les décideurs et tous ceux qui " font bouger " le marché, répondent à nos questions et à vos préoccupations.
 -Stratégie : La vie et les projets en développement des principales entreprises de votre secteur, qu'elles soient fabricants ou utilisateurs de produits.
 -Produits : Une sélection des dernières nouveautés et un rappel des gammes disponibles, par secteur technologique.


 Fluidestransmissions.com est le site dédié aux besoins des utilisateurs, et acheteurs de composants et ensembles de transmission de puissance. Il propose les documentations techniques , l’accès à la liste de leurs distributeurs, l’accès direct aux demandes d’informations de devis en provenance des internautes, aux bibliothèques CAO et aux articles de Fluides & Transmissions publiés sur chaque produit.

La newsletter mensuelle  "Fluides et Transmissions" est l' outil d'alerte

Fluides et Transmissions fait partie du Groupe PPI MEDIAS :

Name: Malaysian Technical Standards Forum Bhd (MTSFB)
Description:
The Malaysian Technical Standards Forum Bhd (MTSFB) (20040106865 (655368-P)) is a company limited by guarantee which was incorporated on 8 June 2004 and being designated as the Technical Standards Forum by the Malaysian Communications and Multimedia Commission (MCMC) on 27 October 2004, under the Communications and Multimedia Act (CMA 1998), Part V, Chapter 9 – Voluntary Industry Codes, Section 94 Industry Forum and Part VII, Chapter 3 – Technical Standards, Section 184 Technical Standards Forum.

The primary roles of MTSFB are to develop, recommend, modify and update the Technical Codes for registration by MCMC as well as adoption of the Technical Codes. This is achieved by establishing working groups (WGs) on focused subject matters. The WGs are represented by the members from the manufacturers, vendors, distributors, Standards Development Organisations (SDOs), academicians, service providers and other interested parties.

Active participation in standards development activities to develop these technical documents will bring immense benefits not only to the stake holders but also to general consumers at the country at large and it is essential towards achieving sustainable development for the communications and multimedia industry in Malaysia.

Partner affidabili per numerosi marchi di successo, ci impegniamo a offrire servizi di alta qualità e soluzioni su misura.

Per fare tutto ciò possiamo contare su persone creative e di talento, in grado, con il loro patrimonio di esperienze ed energie, di fare la differenza sempre. Siamo convinti che siano le persone a determinare il successo!

Macmark ha superato brillantemente il processo di certificazione aziendale con l'Ente SQS - "Associazione Svizzera per sistemi di Qualità e di Management" - partner esclusivo di "IQNET" (International Network for Quality System Assesment and Certification), la più estesa e affidabile rete di organismi di certificazione a livello mondiale, pertanto, Macmark, è certificata:

- ISO 9001:2015 "Sistemi di Gestione per la Qualità"
- ISO 18295-1:2017 "Requirements for customer contact center"
- ISO 14001:2015 "Sistema di Gestione Ambientale"
- ISO 27001:2013 "Sistema di gestione per la Sicurezza delle Informazioni"

L'implementazione dell'efficace Sistema di Gestione vuole trasmettere la capacità di fornire i propri prodotti e servizi in accordo ai requisiti cogenti e specifici dei propri clienti e accrescere la soddisfazione degli stessi nonchè proiettare la propria organizzazione verso un miglioramento continuo. E' in grado di erogare servizi per aziende italiane ed europee.

Unisciti alla nostra squadra di successo oggi per trasformare la tua comunicazione in un vantaggio competitivo

Name: Jeem جيم
Description:
<<English below>>
جيم مؤسسة إعلامية نسوية تطمح إلى عالم تكون فيه السرديات السائدة في شأن الجندر والجنس والجسد والجنسانية في المنطقة الناطقة باللغة العربية ومجتمعات الاغتراب والشتات جامعة وتتحدّى التنميطات الأبوية.

من خلال مقاربة تقاطعية، ننتج وننشر المعارف النقدية والثقافية في شأن الجندر، والجنس، والجنسانية، والجسد، التي تتحدّى الخطابات السائدة في وسائل الإعلام التقليدية. نوفّر مساحةً آمنةً للأفراد والمجموعات لمشاركة ومناقشة آرائهمن وتجاربهمن في شأن مسائل الجندر والجنسانية وتقاطعاتها المتعددة مع حيواتنا بأبعادها المختلفة. ونبني ونعزز الروابط مع الأفراد و/أو المجموعات المعنيّة بهذه القضايا.

Jeem is a feminist media organization that envisions a world where the dominant narratives in the Arabic-speaking region and its diaspora are inclusive, and defy patriarchal norms.

Through an intersectional approach, we produce and disseminate critical and cultural knowledge about gender, sexuality, sex, and the body that challenges dominant discourses in traditional media. We provide a safe space for individuals and groups to share and discuss their views and experiences regarding gender and sexuality and their multiple intersections with our lives in its different dimensions. We work towards building and strengthening links and ties between individuals and/or groups involved in these issues.

Description:
El Diario de Madrid es un medio digital independiente que informa con rigor, profundidad y perspectiva sobre la actualidad política, económica, cultural y social de la Comunidad de Madrid y de España.

Recuperamos el legado histórico de la prensa madrileña para ofrecer una mirada comprometida con la verdad, el interés público y el respeto al lector. Nuestro enfoque combina el análisis sosegado con el dinamismo informativo, incorporando opinión de firmas plurales y reportajes con vocación de servicio.

Desde su lanzamiento, El Diario de Madrid se ha consolidado como un espacio para el periodismo libre, la transparencia institucional y la reflexión sobre los grandes retos de nuestro tiempo: gobernanza, innovación, sostenibilidad, empresa, libertad y participación ciudadana.

Publicamos información verificada, cuidamos el lenguaje y damos voz a quienes contribuyen a construir una sociedad más consciente y exigente con sus instituciones. Apostamos por el periodismo que piensa, no que grita.

#actualidad, #cultura, #sociedad, #empresa, #ocio y #opinión.

Our network members cover a wide range of topics and competences ranging from artificial intelligence and satellite imagery analysis to fossil fuel exploitation, water privatization or illegal wood logging. 
We support our members in finding funding opportunities for their investigations, scientific and journalistic expertise. 

EIF also aims to develop innovative initiatives based on our networks expertise and past achievements. We are seeking funding to develop our own environmental monitoring tools, investigative projects and training programs. We are always on the look for partnership opportunities with external organizations, newsrooms or individual researcher and freelancers. Name: First-ID
Description:
The announced end of third-party cookies is prompting many publishers to rethink their advertising
strategy. Currently - even before the future evolution of Chrome - publishers are already losing up to half
of their advertising revenues on the Safari and Firefox environments.
First-id, is a unique opportunity to get more value out of publishers audiences, whereas the current
model, based on third-party cookies, does not value content creators.
From now on, publishers will be able to regain control of their inventory thanks to a cross-publisher 1st
party cookie that works on all browsers (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, etc.) and all environments.
The solution has been successfully tested for several months on the brands of the Prisma Media group and
Cerise Media. The benefits observed are multiple:
- Significant increase in revenue from cookie third less inventories thanks to better identification,
- 100% of the audience is cross-site addressable in the publisher's DMP, both for advertising and for
personalisation,
- The publisher's campaigns with its own data can target all Internet users, even on Safari and
Firefox.
The ambition of first.id is to put publishers back at the centre of the digital ecosystem by helping
advertisers and agencies to easily identify their customers on media brands and thus support the creation
of quality content.

- Le Billet de L'Effrontée, written by journalist Alice Welter, which breaks taboos and gives a voice to victims 
- La Tribune Finance, a carte blanche for experts from the Luxembourg financial centre 
- A Health section, which each month explores crucial issues in women's medicine 

Another emblematic new feature: the magazine's cover now features inspiring women from Luxembourg, chosen for their authenticity, strength and commitment. 

Multi-generational, multicultural and with a circulation of 20,200, Femmes Magazine is a medium that celebrates the passion, achievements and voices of today's women.

Name: PRODYS
Description:
Prodys is a pioneering force in audio and video compression and transmission technologies, both in hardware and software, with a team of over 30 experts dedicated to innovation. 

Specializing in remote live streaming for sports, news, and entertainment, as well as audio streaming for radio stations, Prodys offers cutting-edge solutions to meet the dynamic demands of the broadcast market. Their Quantum encoder family provides a comprehensive range of products, from single-person portable video encoders to large-capacity multichannel, including innovative features such as the first audio streaming encoder with a video decoder.

Among their latest offerings are Ikusnet2, an HEVC video encoder, and Quantum Lite, a handheld audio codec over IP with unmatched reliability and functionality, enabling professionals to broadcast live from anywhere with ease. 

Prodys ensures optimal performance by developing their own streaming technology using proven and open compression techniques, but with specialist streaming protocols developed for high quality and reliability with cost effective pricing.  

Their multi-purpose HD/SD AVC (H.264) and HEVC (H.265) portable IP video encoders for use over a range of different networks simultaneously,  including cellular,  empowers broadcasters to deliver live content seamlessly, enhancing audience engagement in live sports, live  news, concerts, festivals and other forms of live entertainment. for both enhanced audio and video.

From portable audio to rackmount audio solutions, Prodys's products cover a wide spectrum of broadcasting needs, catering to both professionals and amateurs alike. With an unparalleled commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, Prodys remains at the forefront of the industry, providing indispensable tools for broadcasters worldwide.

Le journal met en lumière les industriels de la filière bois qui se démarquent par leurs innovations. À travers des articles de fond, des interviews et des études de cas, nous faisons découvrir aux promoteurs et aux décideurs ce qui se fait de mieux en termes de techniques, de matériaux et de solutions bas carbone dans la construction bois. 

Avec 26 années d’expérience dans ce domaine, nous avons acquis une expertise unique qui nous permet d'accompagner cette transition en alliant innovation, durabilité et performance. Bois & Business est plus qu'un simple magazine : c’est une plateforme d’échanges, d’idées et d’inspiration pour construire un avenir plus durable, en mettant le bois au cœur de nos villes et de nos projets. 

#ConstructionBois #FilièreBois #BasCarbone #Innovation #Durabilité #BoisEtBusiness #ImmobilierVerte #TransitionÉcologique #ArchitectureDurable

Name: die medienanstalten
Description:
Die Medienanstalten – das sind die 14 Landesmedienanstalten in Deutschland. Sie sind die zentralen Aufsichtsbehörden für die Regulierung von privatem Rundfunk und Telemedien in Deutschland. Der Kernauftrag der Medienanstalten ist es, die Vielfalt der Medienangebote und Meinungen zu sichern, und die Medienfreiheit zu schützen.

Medienregulierung ist in Deutschland föderal organisiert. Deshalb gibt es 14 unabhängige Landesmedienanstalten. Digitalisierung, rasanter technologischer Wandel und die große Bedeutung von meist global agierenden Plattformen und Intermediären für die Meinungsbildung stellen die heutige Medienregulierung vor neue, grenzüberschreitende Herausforderungen.

Medienvielfalt sichern ist eine Aufgabe, die nicht an Ländergrenzen Halt macht. In Fällen mit länderübergreifender Bedeutung und bei zentralen Aufgaben und Projekten arbeiten die Landesmedienanstalten deshalb unter der Dachmarke „die medienanstalten“ in bundesweiten Gremien zusammen.

Die Gemeinsame Geschäftsstelle der Medienanstalten (GGS) in Berlin gestaltet diese bundesweite Zusammenarbeit. Sie ist der Wissenspool und zentrale Ansprechpartnerin für die Landesmedienanstalten. Zugleich koordiniert die GGS Gemeinschaftsprojekte. Dieses LinkedIn-Profil wird von der GGS betrieben und verantwortet.

www.die-medienanstalten.de/impressum

Fier membre de Néomédia Inc, un groupe de presse regroupant 10 médias numériques à travers le Québec, nous avons une mission claire : offrir un média local à chaque communauté. Grâce à une équipe de journalistes dédiés, nous couvrons ce qui compte pour vous, en temps réel, 24/7.

 Ce que nous proposons :
    •    Actualités locales et régionales : Suivez les nouvelles quotidiennement.
    •    Sections variées : Sport, culture, société, politique, affaires, entrevue vidéo, balado, et bien plus.
    •    Une expérience 100 % numérique : Accessible sur tablette, mobile et ordinateur, partout, tout le temps.

  Restez connectés !
Téléchargez notre application mobile Néomédia, disponible sur iOS et Android, pour accéder instantanément à l’information locale, où que vous soyez.

  Abonnez-vous à notre infolettre quotidienne et recevez chaque soir un résumé des actualités qui comptent pour vous. Ne manquez rien de ce qui se passe dans la région !

Name: Stainless Today
Description:
Stainless Today is a dynamic online platform dedicated to delivering the latest news, insights and developments within the stainless steel industry, both in India and on a global scale.

As an initiative under the umbrella of Virgo Communications and Exhibitions, renowned for organizing the premier Global Stainless Steel Expo (GSSE) in India, Stainless Today serves as an invaluable resource not only for the stainless steel sector but for all the other industries that use this invaluable material in their production processes. 

Our mission is to foster collaboration and knowledge exchange across industries by providing a platform for thought-provoking discussions, informative articles, insightful interviews and compelling case studies. We aim to build a sturdy platform for the industry and connect the wide gamut of the buyer fraternity. Our editorial content will be shared with our database comprising top notch players in the pharmaceutical, oil and gas, food, interiors, construction, transportation, automotive, consumer goods and many more.

Name: The Territorie
Description:
The Territorie is a New York City–based media brand at the intersection of fashion, art, and culture. We operate with a digital-first approach, engaging a global community of next-generation creatives.

Our editorial storytelling combines thoughtful narratives with community-driven coverage to spotlight the people and movements shaping contemporary culture.

In addition to our editorial platform, we operate The Territorie Studios, an in-house production studio offering full-service campaign and editorial production. Together, these channels create a multi-dimensional platform rooted in storytelling, artistic collaboration, and the amplification of emerging voices shaping the future of culture.

Name: Women & Golf
Description:
For over 30 years Women & Golf has provided women golfers with the latest in-depth news, reviews and information on instruction, equipment and fashion in what has become an increasingly stylish sport. 

Now the UK’s largest digital magazine of its type, it gives readers
an opportunity to read articles on all aspects of the game.

Simply by subscribing to Women & Golf, a woman has shown that she is a
committed golfer and a highly desirable target for not only golf equipment, but also a variety of goods, accompanying the lifestyle associated with women participating in the game.

Name: Fox Sports Argentina
Description:
Este 2025 te acompañamos en vivo desde las 13hs para  seguir toda la actualidad del deporte. Con nuestro equipo de profesionales vas a estar informado y viendo en vivo toda la Copa CONMEBOL Libertadores, UEFA Champions League, Formula 1, UFC, Liga ACLAV, MLB, NFL, Liga Endesa, Red Bull Content y mucho más!

#FoxSportsArgentina Siempre para adelante.

Name: Xsports Brasil
Description:
A Xsports é uma startup brasileira de comunicação que está redefinindo o entretenimento esportivo no país, unindo a força de um canal de TV aberta (free-to-air), com distribuição nacional e gratuita, à potência de uma presença digital multiplataforma.

Nossa missão é clara: democratizar o acesso ao esporte, promovendo saúde, inclusão social, emoção e transformação.
Acreditamos no esporte como uma poderosa ferramenta de educação, bem-estar e desenvolvimento humano, capaz de conectar gerações e inspirar milhões de brasileiros, de todas as idades e classes sociais.

Oferecemos entretenimento e cultura esportiva de qualidade, com uma programação que valoriza os principais eventos esportivos, estimula a prática de atividades físicas e celebra a diversidade das manifestações esportivas no Brasil e no mundo.

Somos a nova casa do esporte na TV Brasileira: um espaço aberto, acessível e seguro, onde o esporte ganha voz, imagem e emoção, chegando de graça, em todas as telas, para todo o país.
Sintonize no esporte. Acerte na X.

Name: Asia Manufacturing Review
Description:
Asia Manufacturing Review is a business magazine that covers the manufacturing industry landscape of Asia extensively. Considering the continent’s accelerated growth in both light and heavy industries, ranging from consumer electronics and apparel to automotive, construction and aerospace, we strive to present an all-encompassing prospect of its manufacturing sector.

Asia is witnessing novel product and capacity additions powered by new technologies and an improved infrastructure. The objective of Asia Manufacturing Review is to propagate the growth story of the region by bringing the stakeholders of its economic growth together on one platform to share their incisive perception with their contemporaries.

Asia Manufacturing Review prides itself on being the most trustworthy source of information about the manufacturing sector of the continent. As Industry 4.0 gets adopted at scale, paving the way for automation, machine learning and robotics to transform Asia’s manufacturing sector, we bring to you the stories of key players that are effectuating the metamorphosis.

Name: COP30 Insights
Description: COP30 Insights serves as an initiative to broaden the outreach of COP30’s results, making climate action insights accessible to diverse audiences worldwide. By providing timely updates and in-depth analysis, we aim to foster collaboration across sectors, empowering communities and stakeholders to take informed action aligned with the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) on Climate Action (SDG 13) and Partnership for the Goals (SDG 17). Through this platform, we’re dedicated to building a connected network of climate advocates, united to drive tangible progress on global climate challenges.

Name: Eventiz
Description:
Eventiz est le 1er groupe média francophone de l'industrie du tourisme. Le groupe créé par Frédéric Vanhoutte en 2017 est constitué de L’Echo touristique, le plus ancien titre de la presse professionnelle du Tourisme , de Travolution.com, le média international de la TravelTech et de DéplacementsPros.com, le média francophone leader du Voyage d’Affaires. 
Eventiz, grâce à son pôle évènementiel, organise plus de 20 événements visants à rassembler, fédérer et célébrer les acteurs de l'industrie (Travel d'Or, Net Managers, TOTEC, Future Of Business Travel, Lauriers du Voyage d'Affaires, Enjeux e-tourisme...).

En 2024, Eventiz a rejoint le groupe Travelsoft. Fondée à Paris en 2000, Travelsoft est une société leader dans le domaine des logiciels pour les acteurs du tourisme, dont les technologies sont utilisées pour effectuer des réservations de voyage d’une valeur de plus de 35 milliards d’euros par an.

Présente dans plus de 90 pays, Travelsoft opère sous sept marques : Orchestra en France, Traffics en Allemagne et en Europe de l’Est, Travel Compositor en Espagne, en Europe du Sud, en Amérique latine et en Asie, Eventiz en France et en Belgique, ATCORE Technology au Royaume-Uni, TravelgateX en Espagne et Travel Connection Technology en Roumanie.

Somos un medio periodístico independiente que cubrimos la actualidad nacional del mercado de la “Construcción y real estate local”. El abanico informativo abarca los siguientes segmentos:
Es decir, temas tan variados como el desarrollo de proyectos inmobiliarios en Buenos Aires y en el interior del país, arquitectura, materiales y maquinarias, técnicas de construcción, tecnología aplicada, financiación, rendimiento de inversiones, decoración, inmuebles, oficinas, planificación urbana, obras públicas, temas legales, nuevos negocios, start-ups, educación y todas las noticias que se relacionan con un sector de indudable participación en la economía nacional.

the future of in-flight connectivity with Air-to-Ground technology (A2G) is looking incredibly promising! This emerging technology is set to revolutionize the way we experience air travel.

More Info: www.skyfive-arabia.world

Name: InsideScientific | A Scientist.com Company
Description:
InsideScientific is an online environment built for scientists, researchers, lab technicians, innovators, and industry professionals. Resources include educational webinars, virtual events, interviews, training workshops, articles and more. In addition, professionals can browse our suppliers database to learn more about scientific tools, technologies, and services offered by suppliers around the globe. Our mission is to augment scientific discovery by facilitating and continually improving the exchange of scientific information.

InsideScientific is a Scientist.com company. Scientist.com is the pharmaceutical industry’s leading AI-powered marketplace for outsourced R&D. The marketplace simplifies R&D sourcing, saves time and money, reduces risk and provides access to the latest innovative tools and technologies. Scientist.com operates private enterprise marketplaces for most of the world’s major pharmaceutical companies, over 80 biotechnology companies and the US National Institutes of Health (NIH).

Name: La French | Newsletters
Description:
La French | est une série de newsletters sur les agences d'architecture destinée aux architectes, architectes d’intérieur, designers, enseignants en architecture et en design d’espace, étudiants en école d’architecture et en design d’espace, maîtrises d’ouvrages, et urbanistes.

En 2022, la Team.archi __ réseau connecté d'architectes au sein de groupes LinkedIn et Facebook __ rejoint l’incubateur Creatis, qui accompagne les acteurs de la culture et des médias émergents dans leurs transformations. Et, à travers le programme Horizons, soutenu par le Ministère de la Culture et de la Communication, la Team.archi crée la Newsletter "La French | Connection".

Cette newsletter hebdomadaire destinée aux architectes se développe autour de trois axes : Les "News", actualités des agences liées à leurs publications sur les réseaux sociaux, les "Jobs", annonces et offres d'emploi des agences, et les "Masterclass", analyses de projets en construction.

 La French | représente :
+ de 25.000 architectes abonnés,
+ de 175.000 impressions par mois,

 Comment être publié sur les newsletters ?

Écrivez un post avec votre agence d’architecture sur LinkedIn, et rajoutez à la fin "@team.archi". 
Nous partagerons ainsi votre publication pour vous aider à augmenter sa visibilité sur LinkedIn.

 community@team.archi
 www.team.archi

Name: The Hollywood Assistant

The Hollywood Assistant is the only e-newsletter for Hollywood assistants, written by Hollywood assistants.

The entertainment industry is notoriously a business of connections. The Hollywood Assistant aims to break this pattern and propagate insider tips more equitably. Each free (yes, free!), monthly edition features interviews with current and former assistants, industry buzz, and exclusive op-eds written by Hollywood assistants. David Opère installe une porte d’entrée qui compte dans le business santé.

Je capte des patrons qui montrent leurs innovations MedTech, des chirurgiens qui vivent leurs blocs, des politiques qui assument leurs choix et des hôpitaux qui gèrent des décisions à fort impact. 

Chaque passage porte une trajectoire précise qui influence les achats, les ventes et les usages dans les services.

Je crée un format court sur LinkedIn Live et YouTube qui apporte une visibilité puissante. 

J’installe une lumière qui valorise les industriels, les cliniciens et les investisseurs qui souhaitent prendre une place solide dans la santé française.

Je transforme chaque échange en levier pour amplifier une stratégie, pour soutenir une équipe, pour pousser une solution au plus près des acteurs qui décident.

David Opère devient la scène où la MedTech française se montre, s’écoute et s’impose dans l’écosystème.

46.000 abonnés sur LinkedIn.
10 millions de vues par an.
1,2 million de visiteurs uniques.

Name: Miirage | Holographic Displays
Description:
Advancing the future of display technology. Our mission is to deliver deeper connections and engagement through hyper-realistic holographic experiences.


Miirage delivers its mission by harnessing the forefront of holographic technology to create immersive and lifelike digital experiences that captivate and connect audiences. Our areas of innovation and focus include the development of modular hologram systems that are both flexible and scalable, catering to a wide range of environments from small-scale personal displays to large public installations. We concentrate on enhancing the realism and interactivity of our holograms, ensuring that each experience is as engaging as it is unforgettable. We prioritize accessibility and affordability, making cutting-edge holographic technology available to a broader audience. Through continuous research and development, Miirage is committed to pushing the boundaries of what's possible in display technology, transforming ordinary spaces into extraordinary digital landscapes.

Description:
WineLand Magazine (formerly known as Die Wynboer) is a monthly print publication, published and distributed by WineLand Media, a division of SA Wine – a non-profit company created to provide important services to the wine and brandy industry value chain players to enable the industry to become more robust, transformed, agile and competitive.

The magazine is read by a subscriber base that includes 2 000+ producers and wineries, 750+ winemakers, 200+ viticulturists, including various other educational institutions, media key directors and managers, advertising agencies as well as suppliers and service providers to the industry.

Name: Gente Real
Description:
En Gente Real, nos sumergimos más allá de las apariencias. A través de espacios reveladores, desafiamos las ideas preconcebidas y exploramos la complejidad del mundo con líderes, científicos y pensadores que cuestionan y profundizan. 


No se trata de lo superficial, sino descubrir la verdad en su forma más pura, reflejada en quienes, con sus acciones y reflexiones, están transformando su entorno. Únete a un espacio donde el pensamiento crítico es el protagonista y la realidad se desnuda sin filtros.

Name: Flint Media
Description:
Flint helps you find and share the best information on the topics you are interested in, without wasting time, by creating intelligent newsletters. Flint's artificial intelligence allows you to focus on the quality and diversity of sources. While protecting against fake news and information overload.

(contact@flint.media)

Name: Franja Visual
Description:
En Grupo Franja, nos enorgullece ser líderes en la provisión de información especializada para la comunidad dedicada al cuidado de la salud visual en América Latina. Durante los últimos 35 años, hemos sido el punto de referencia para optómetras, oftalmólogos, propietarios, administradores y asesores de establecimientos de salud visual.

Nuestro compromiso es mantener a nuestra comunidad informada y actualizada con contenido de alta calidad. A través de nuestros más de 15 medios de comunicación, llegamos a más de 100 mil profesionales en la salud visual. Nuestra misión es brindarles acceso a información que mejore sus prácticas y servicios, en última instancia, beneficiando a sus clientes y pacientes.

Al unirse a Grupo Franja, se convierten en parte de una comunidad dedicada al crecimiento profesional, la innovación y la excelencia en el campo de la salud visual. Únanse a nosotros para estar al tanto de las últimas tendencias, avances y recursos que les permitirán destacarse en su vida laboral y ofrecer un servicio excepcional.

Bienvenidos a Grupo Franja, donde el conocimiento y la comunidad se unen para impulsar el éxito en la salud visual en América Latina!

Name: Feed Business Middle East & Africa
Description:
Feed Business Middle East & Africa is the no.1 source of information for the animal feed, pet food and aquafeed industry in Middle East and Africa.

The industry-focused Magazine and Website inform key stakeholders in the region and beyond of the investment opportunities, new technologies and market trends in this important industry.

The magazine and website are authoritative resources that cover the storage, formulation, production, packaging and distribution of animal feed, pet food and aquafeed

The magazine and website enable stakeholders across the region to discover what is trending within the continent and globally, while enabling international audiences to get to know the region’s grains industry better and deeper.

The magazine features comprehensive company features of leading start-ups, medium scale, regional giants and multinationals operating in the grains value chain in the region.

It also features technical articles and commodity updates that enable the industry stakeholders to discover the latest information that they can use to make critical business decisions in a timely manner.

Who are the readers of Feed Business Middle East & Africa Magazine and Website?

The readers of the magazine are investors, managers and professionals in the milling, feed and grain value addition chain among other stakeholders in this sector including:

 Grain manufacturers, millers and animal feed millers
 Commercial farmers; grain traders, distributors, exporters and importers
 Academic and research institutions
 Government ministries and regulatory agencies
 NGOs and development organizations in the food and agriculture sector
Industry associations and lobbyists
 Suppliers of storage solutions, post-harvest management, processing and milling equipment, packaging, ingredients and other supply chain products to the grains industry

Lawyers depend on the Daily Report to keep them abreast of the latest developments in their practice areas, decisions from Georgia’s courts and the business of law. Name: ABP-INFOCOM
Description:
INFOCOM, an ABP initiative since 2002, has transformed into a beacon of innovation in the ICT sector. From its humble beginnings as a forum for India's IT ambitions, INFOCOM has grown into a powerful catalyst for growth, connection, and collaboration. Today, it stands as India's largest ICT congregation, uniting Industry thought leaders, Corporate visionaries, Academic pioneers, Policymakers, etc. 

With a rich legacy since 1922, the ABP Group has evolved into a multimedia powerhouse in India, comprising 11 premium publications, three national TV news channels broadcasting 24/7, a prominent book publishing arm, and innovative mobile and internet ventures. Our diverse portfolio boasts renowned brands across various genres, including Anandabazar Patrika, The Telegraph, Fortune India, Ebela, ABP News, ABP Ananda, ABP Majha, and many more, solidifying ABP's reputation as a trailblazer in Indian media.

Be part of the INFOCOM journey, shaping the future of ICT and unlocking new possibilities."

Name: VCMAGAZINE_CHILE
Description:
Valor Compartido, la vía de éxito para el largo plazo.

Como una forma de reconocer la importancia que tienen las empresas para el desarrollo de las naciones, y dar cuenta de las iniciativas positivas en pos de las comunidades nace nuestra revista Valor Compartido (VC Magazine), una publicación cada dos mensual que toma su nombre a partir del concepto desarrollado por los economistas Portes y Kramer, y cuyo foco será identificar y expandir las conexiones entre el progreso económico y social.

En este camino que comenzamos a recorrer, buscamos tener una cobertura nacional, donde destacamos a través de artículos, entrevistas y notas, todas aquellas acciones que están dando cuenta del cambio en la relación simbiótica entre empresas y sus comunidades. Dentro de ellas, algunas de las áreas que abordaremos se relacionan con el medio ambiente, la educación, emprendimiento, investigación y desarrollo, emprendimiento, economía circular y cuidado de nuestros pueblos originarios, por mencionar algunas. 

Para ampliar nuestra cobertura, y con ello aportar significativamente a un cambio virtuoso en la forma de ver la relación entre empresas y comunidades, es que VC Magazine tendrá una versión online y una versión impresa que será distribuida gratuitamente en diferentes puntos del país, además redes sociales y un espacio en radios de impacto nacional. Entonces, a través de palabras escritas e imágenes; o conversaciones en radio, buscamos realizar nuestro aporte para que estos dos entes tan importante para el país, empresa y sociedad, confluyan y se relacionen de mejor manera. 

Dejamos en sus manos la primera versión -de muchas más- de VC Magazine. Esperamos que este nuevo canal de comunicación sea de su agrado y contribuya a crear una mejor sociedad. Estamos seguros que el valor compartido será parte de ello.
Location: Puerto Varas, Región de Los Lagos

Our online platform, www.miningandconstructionafrica.com, serves as a comprehensive source for breaking news from Africa's mining and construction arena, encompassing vital topics such as mergers, acquisitions, and labor strikes. The website also provides access to the latest news updates, tender announcements, and conference presentations. Featuring a print run of 11,800 copies per quarter, our magazine offers balanced coverage of projects throughout the African region, accurately reflecting the continent's dynamic mining sector. We meticulously track the entire project lifecycle, from early-stage exploration to feasibility studies, mine development, steady-state operation, and eventual shutdown. Additionally, we provide insightful analysis on the ramifications of minerals policy, economic shifts, political trends, and emerging technologies within the mining industry.

Name: Exhibit News Now
Description:
TSNN, the top online news source for the trade show industry, launched Exhibit News Now (ENN), a new website, e-newsletter and social channels (LinkedIn, Twitter, YouTube, Facebook and Instagram) for exhibit management and event marketing professionals, who participate in the $101 billion U.S. exhibition industry, according to the Center for Exhibition Industry Research). Exhibitors represent 70% of the revenues generated from the trade show industry, CEIR research finds. 

This new online hub for industry news, insights and original content will focus on information, education and tools for exhibit managers and event marketers representing every industry sector and company size — from Fortune 500 companies and startups to nonprofits and government agencies. 

Gartner’s 2022 annual CMO Spend and Strategy Survey reported that budgets recovered somewhat year over year, with the average marketing spend increasing from 6.4 percent to 9.5 percent of company revenue across almost all industries.

"We are delighted by the market’s strong endorsement of the launch of Exhibitor News Network, which will feature important news, information and trends  for all of the many exhibitors — large and small —  who invest in shows worldwide," said Tarsus Media President Rachel Wimberly.

Led by Danica Tormohlen, vice president of content for Tarsus Media, ENN and TSNN’s parent company, the free-access ENN site, social media channels and weekly e-newsletter will feature original content and industry news for a previously underserved market that makes buying decisions for booth construction, design, travel, venues, hotels, marketing, tech and so much more. 

“Trade shows represent a vital share of B2B marketing spend, and nearly every company in the world exhibits in trade shows,” Tormohlen said, who has reported on the exhibition industry for 29 years.

Name: Le Fooding
Description:
"Le Fooding est à la cuisine ce que la nouvelle vague a été au cinéma" The New Yorker

Après ça, que dire de plus ? Que depuis vingt-cinq ans, le Fooding porte et transporte le goût de l'époque, en soutenant les initiatives libres, vivantes et authentiques, et en acoquinant la cuisine avec des formes artistiques comme l'illustration, la vidéo, le graphisme ou la musique. De la food, et du feeling !

UN GUIDE ET MEDIA INDÉPENDANT ET PRESCRIPTEUR
Sans cesse à l’affût des meilleures tables de genre, chambres de style, bars d'auteur, commerces de caractère et caves de soif, le guide Fooding compile plus de 2 000 adresses sincères et incarnées en France et en Belgique. Une véritable bible du kif, qui a toujours un coup de fourchette d'avance !

UN ÉCOSYSTÈME SOCIAL ET DIGITAL
Le Fooding, c'est aussi un média libre, vivant et inclusif, où food et société s’installent à la même table, aussi bien sur notre site, notre appli qu’à travers nos réseaux sociaux.


UNE AGENCE DE PRODUCTION ÉVÉNEMENTIELLE, DE CONTENUS ET DE CONSULTING
Nous pensons, concevons et produisons des événements, contenus à notre sauce en propre ou en marque blanche, en faisant toujours un pas de côté pour sortir du four des projets uniques débordant de sens. Toujours imités, jamais égalés !
Depuis sa création, le Fooding n’a cessé de faire croitre sa communauté d’épicurbain·es, mélangeant lecteur·rices, utilisateur·rices, participant·es et follower·se·s. Une audience aussi pointue qu’exigeante, toujours plus engagée sur les réseaux. Des early adopterset CSP++, à la recherche constante du goût de l'époque et d'expériences porteuses de sens.

Name: TecnoHotel
Description:
TecnoHotel es la revista decana del turismo en Espana. Fundada en 1963 por el Grupo Editur como una apuesta por comunicar al sector los avances y requerimientos tecnológicos, desde 2008 forma parte del Grupo Peldaño, especializado en prensa profesional, con cerca de 20 cabeceras de distintos sectores.

Después de casi 50 años liderando la informacion sobre operaciones y equipamiento hotelero, en 2012 TecnoHotel se renueva para seguir siendo referente en el análisis y la comunicación en las áreas donde la tecnología tiene un mayor impacto competitivo en el negocio.

TecnoHotel es la única revista en español especializada en analizar y comunicar las claves que, por su transformación y evolución constante, más interesan a los líderes turísticos en el siglo XXI.

Sin dejar su sección tradicional de equipamiento, Tecnohotel ofrece ahora las respuestas sobre los avances, las tendencias y el software que estan afectando a las areas de marketing, distribución y gestión de clientes, con el objetivo de convertirse en un referente para los directivos hoteleros y los gestores turisticos.

Todo ello, con un modelo de periodismo igualmente adaptado a las nuevas necesidades y dinámicas de comunicación, donde la red y los contenidos visuales se convertirán en el sello diferenciador.

TecnoHotel aporta una nueva forma de entender los medios de comunicación en la era de internet.

Nuevas Necesidades. Nuevas Claves. Nuevo TecnoHotel.

Name: Navarra Capital
Description:
Navarra Capital nació en 2014, con el fin de cubrir un nicho informativo inexplorado hasta entonces en la Comunidad foral. En un contexto en que la región y el conjunto de España intentaban reponerse tras los efectos de la crisis, que se dejaban notar especialmente en la prensa escrita, sus fundadores decidieron emprender, apostar por los nuevos medios y crear la primera plataforma digital navarra especializada en economía y empresa.

Así dieron forma a un proyecto sostenible, a partir de un modelo cooperativo propio de la Economía Social. Un modelo vertebrado en torno a su periódico digital, dirigido a directivos/as, empresarios/as, altos funcionarios/as, cuadros de mando, profesionales liberales, autónomos/as, emprendedores/as, docentes, investigadores/as y técnicos/as, y una agencia de RRPP y Comunicación Corporativa, que trabaja con muchos de los principales agentes económicos, políticos y sociales de Navarra.

Navarra Capital se ha consolidado hasta el punto de que sus socios y socias generan empleo de calidad y reinvierten beneficios en el fortalecimiento del equipo. Y todo gracias a la puesta en valor de nuevos modelos y formatos de comunicación. El rigor y la honestidad son innegociables.
