Name: Webconsultas Healthcare
Description:
Webconsultas Healthcare es un portal web de salud y bienestar para todos los públicos. Nuestra misión es fomentar la prevención de enfermedades y mejorar la calidad de vida de una población cada vez más preocupada por cuidarse y adquirir hábitos saludables. 

En webconsultas.com disponemos de noticias, entrevistas con expertos, consejos prácticos, artículos e información detallada sobre el embarazo, el cuidado de bebés y niños, pautas de alimentación saludable, salud mental, terapias alternativas, tips de belleza y bienestar, y recomendaciones de ejercicio para todas las edades.

Todos nuestros contenidos están redactados de una manera sencilla y amena para hacerlos accesibles a todo tipo de lectores, y están elaborados por profesionales especializados en diversas ramas de la salud (médicos, enfermeros, nutricionistas, psicólogos, pediatras, entrenadores deportivos…), así como por cualificados periodistas expertos en salud.

Nuestro crecimiento ha sido gradual, alcanzando los seis millones de usuarios mensuales y una audiencia de más de 300.000 seguidores en Redes Sociales, que nos reconocen como una web fiable y de referencia en el autocuidado de la salud, y nos han convertido en el portal líder en castellano en el sector salud y bienestar.

Name: Metroland Life
Description:
The No 1 digital magazine for The Chilterns, publishing since 2016!

We love living here in the Chiltern Hills; it offers fantastic walks, pubs and doorstep adventures. A vibrant and diverse community offering a wealth of fabulous businesses, high streets, charities and events!

Not only do we get to live in one of the most wonderful and downright coolest places in the UK, but we have a culture unique to this area. With a sophisticated blend of country chic and cosmopolitan living, it’s no wonder more people are journeying to the end of the Metropolitan line and settling here.

From cool dining (enough to satisfy the most diligent foodie) to lazy hotel stays, great days out to independent High Street shops, there really is something for everyone to enjoy.

Metroland encapsulates everything that we love about this area and is a seasonal digital magazine aimed at the good townsfolk of Chesham, Amersham and Chalfont. There are almost 75,000 people living in these towns and the surrounding villages, and they deserve a magazine dedicated to them packed full of local news, articles and offers.

Description:

Choosing Econnet means:
Being able to count on a catalog of carefully selected products based on the manufacturer's innovation and professionalism criteria. Econnet searches and selects brands and partners that stand out for reliably supporting continuously evolving Information Technology.
Having turnkey solutions capable of supporting real technological growth of businesses.
Take advantage of various initiatives aimed at training such as collective and individual courses (including certification), themed seminars, traveling roadshows.
Guaranteed availability of proactive and prepared pre- and post-sales support. The Econnet staff boasts certifications and strong technical and commercial skills, both in the pre-sales and post-sales fields. A pool of certified technicians makes technical assistance one of the company's strengths.
To date, Econnet has a staff of around 15 people, including employees, consultants and sales agents, capable of covering the entire national territory.
The registered office, operational headquarters and warehouse are in Bologna, while a commercial office is located in Milan and two home offices are located in Catania and Chieti.
There are approximately 870 active customers throughout the national territory and the Republic of San Marino, of which approximately 270 are certified in the VoIP field and more than 130 are certified in the Cyber Security field.

Name: Rocket Promotions GmbH
Description:
Rocket Promotions GmbH
Wir bauen Vertrieb – leistungsstark, skalierbar, digital.

Rocket Promotions ist eine der führenden Vertriebsagenturen Deutschlands mit Spezialisierung auf Door-to-Door-, Promotion- und Leadgenerierungsprojekte. Seit 2019 setzen wir bundesweit erfolgreich Vertriebsprojekte für Telekommunikationsunternehmen, Energieversorger, Stadtwerke, Wohnungswirtschaften und Marken um.

Mit über 650 erfolgreich umgesetzten Projekten, 350.000+ gewonnenen Endkunden und einem Netzwerk aus 25.000+ registrierten Vertriebspartnern sind wir operativ stark, schnell skalierbar und strategisch auf Wachstum ausgelegt.

Unsere Leistungen im Überblick:
	•	Glasfaservertrieb (Vorvermarktung, Bauvermarktung, Nachverdichtung)
	•	Energievertrieb & Tarifoptimierung (Neukunden & Rückgewinnung)
	•	Promotion & Eventeinsätze (Sampling, Leadgenerierung, Markenaktivierung)
	•	Gestattungsvertrieb & Eigentümerrecherche für Netzausbau
	•	Digitale Flyerverteilung & Flächenaktionen mit Reporting
	•	Eigene Vertriebssoftware: Rocket App (Gebietssteuerung, KPI-Tracking, CRM)
	•	Individuelle Softwareentwicklung & Prozessdigitalisierung für Unternehmen

Was uns auszeichnet:
	•	Voll digitalisierte Infrastruktur – 80% unserer internen Prozesse laufen KI-gestützt
	•	Eigene App & CRM – zur Steuerung von über 100 Projekten gleichzeitig
	•	Operative Schlagkraft – kurzfristiger Teamaufbau in jedem Bundesland möglich
	•	Transparenz, Qualität & Performance-orientiertes Denken

Ob als Auftraggeber oder Vertriebspartner – Rocket steht für messbaren Erfolg im Vertrieb.

Name: MASDIGITAL MEDIOS
Description:
MASDIGITAL Medios: Contenidos multiplataforma que  conectan, educan  y transforman.

En un mundo donde la información es instantánea y las audiencias buscan contenido relevante y de impacto, RadioMás se posiciona como un medio de comunicación digital y televisión por cable que va más allá de la noticia. Nos especializamos en generar contenidos de valor que informan, educan y aportan a la cultura, con un enfoque innovador y multiplataforma.

Desde la región del Biobío, nos hemos consolidado como un espacio de conexión para quienes buscan comprender el presente y proyectar el futuro. Nuestros programas y productos  están diseñados para inspirar, debatir y construir conocimiento en torno a temas clave como innovación, emprendimiento, sostenibilidad, ciencia y desarrollo social.

A través de un modelo de comunicación que combina el poder de la radio digital con el alcance de la televisión y la inmediatez de las plataformas digitales, en RadioMás nos adaptamos a las nuevas formas de consumo de contenido. No solo generamos cobtenidos , creamos experiencias, integrando formatos como podcasts, videoentrevistas, transmisiones en vivo, reportajes interactivos y eventos corporativos para llegar a nuestras audiencias de manera efectiva y dinámica.

Sabemos que los medios tienen un rol fundamental en la construcción de una sociedad más informada y participativa. Por eso, nos vinculamos con gremios, universidades, empresas y organizaciones regionales, nacionales e internacionales, estableciendo alianzas estratégicas que potencian la generación de contenido con impacto.
Creemos en el poder de la comunicación como una herramienta de transformación. RadioMás no solo informa, sino que articula y conecta voces, ideas y soluciones para aportar al desarrollo del país.

Name: Rising Africa
Description:
Rising Africa is a dynamic platform that highlights the remarkable achievements of Africans worldwide and provides up-to-date information on scholarships and sponsorships available to African youth. Our vision is to inspire and empower the next generation of African leaders by showcasing the diverse accomplishments and talents of Africans across different fields, including technology, business, arts and culture, and social activism.
Through our Success Stories portal, we celebrate Rising Africans of all ages and sectors who have risen above challenges and made impactful innovations. Our Wonder Kids section features young achievers aged 1-12, while the Super Teens category highlights those aged 13-19, and Young Achievers profiles those aged 20-30. We also have dedicated portals for Women in Africa and persons living with disabilities.
In addition to celebrating African achievement, our Opportunities portal connects African youth to the latest sponsorship, scholarship, awards, and other life-changing opportunities. By providing access to these opportunities, we aim to empower African youth to pursue their dreams and make a positive impact in their communities.
At Rising Africa, we believe in the limitless potential of Africans to create a prosperous future for the continent. Join us in celebrating African excellence and building a brighter future for Africa.

Our guests include acclaimed voices across public life, business, academia, and international development, offering perspectives that inspire critical thinking, leadership, and meaningful action. Through long-form interviews, shorts, thought-leadership content, and storytelling, The Talk Lane builds bridges between innovation, ethics, and impact.

We collaborate with global institutions, industry experts, and changemakers to spotlight ideas that matter — from economic mobility and sustainability to entrepreneurship, policy, education, mental health, and technology’s role in society. The Talk Lane is committed to elevating truth-driven conversations, high-quality discourse, and purposeful storytelling that empowers audiences across the world.

Hosted by Anu Shah, The Talk Lane curates thoughtful, in-depth conversations designed to make complex ideas accessible and relevant to a global audience.

Name: HJS MEDIA WORLD
Description:
HJS MEDIA WORLD - the whole world of business, e-mobility, healthcare & logistics ist eine Kooperation der österreichischen Medienmacher Hans-Joachim Schlobach und Walter Winter mit ihrem Privatsender A-TV, Magazinen und Plattformen. Diese erfahrenen und renommierten Publisher haben unter dem Label One Story - Multi Media ihre Plattformen so zusammen geführt, dass sie dem Rezipienten und Partnern ein umfassendes und differenziertes Informations- und Marketing-Angebot rund um Gesundheit, Mobility Logistik & Wirtschaft machen können - und zwar für die gesamte DACH-Region.
 
Die HJS MEDIA WORLD mit ihren Angeboten ist die mediale Antwort auf die Megatrends Industrie 4.0, Digitalisierung und Transformation. Dabei werden Print-/ePaper-Formate, TV-Formate, Online-Auftritte, Newsletter und Social Media-Angebote in einem Kommunikationsmix so eingesetzt, dass sie die Informationen die Rezipienten dort erreichen, wo sie sich gerade befinden. Und da es sich hier um Special-Interest-Medien handelt, sind die Streuverluste Minimal - anders als bei Massenmedien. 

Wir schaffen eine Omnipräsenz für journalistische und werbliche Inhalte über Länder- und Mediengrenzen hinweg. Diese Form des Medienwesens ist daher völlig neu und derzeit einzigartig in der deutschsprachigen Medienwelt. 

Die Reichweite der HJS MEDIA WORLD mit ihren Medienangeboten beträgt derzeit bis zu 4 Mio. Rezipienten in der DACH-Region, Tendenz steigend. Die Kommunikationsgruppen sind dabei hauptsächlich im Top-Management aus Industrie, Handel und Dienstleistungssektor, aber auch im Wissenschaftsbereich angesiedelt. Die regionale Verteilung liegt bei 60 % Deutschland, 30 % Österreich, 10 % Schweiz.

Name: Adam AI Phone
Description:
Adam GmbH offers innovative and specialized solutions in the field of AI-supported telephony that help companies to optimize their communication processes and save costs. The main product, the ADAM KI-Phone, is an AI-based softphone that automatically answers calls, determines the reason for the call and responds based on predefined rules. This technology addresses the shortage of skilled workers and reduces personnel costs by replacing traditional telephone agents. The ADAM KI-Phone is characterized by its high adaptability and independence from existing telephone systems, allowing it to be seamlessly integrated into a company's existing infrastructure. It also supports multiple languages and can therefore be used globally. Special attention is paid to data protection and security, which makes the product particularly attractive for use in Europe and other regions with strict data protection laws.

In addition to the ADAM KI-Phone, Adam GmbH also offers individual AI consulting and workshops to support companies in implementing and optimizing their AI telephony solutions. These services include the implementation of pilot projects and demonstrations to show the advantages of AI-supported telephony in real application scenarios.

Name: TodoAlfalfa
Description:
Bienvenidos a TodoAlfalfa!

Somos un medio de comunicación dedicado a brindar información exhaustiva y actualizada sobre la cadena de la alfalfa en Argentina. TodoAlfalfa.com.ar trabajará por mejorar el marketing del cultivo de la alfalfa en la Argentina, promoviendo aumentar la calidad de los cultivos, ampliar el área de siembra, incentivando la industrialización y el aumento de la exportación.

Fomentamos la comunicación de novedades, investigaciones, innovaciones tecnológicas y toda iniciativa que sirva de ejemplo para producir más y mejores alfalfas.

En TodoAlfalfa, nos apasiona impulsar el conocimiento y el progreso en la industria de la alfalfa. Nuestra plataforma en línea reúne artículos de expertos, informes técnicos, investigaciones científicas y tendencias de mercado junto a todas las instituciones del sector: gobiernos, cámaras, clústers y empresas se promoverá la generación y publicación de información calificada, debates, reuniones y jornadas de capacitación. Queremos empoderar a nuestros lectores con los datos que necesitan para tomar decisiones informadas y estratégicas.

Sabemos que la alfalfa desempeña un papel fundamental en la economía agrícola de Argentina, y estamos comprometidos en destacar su importancia y potencial. Ya sea que estés buscando consejos prácticos para el cultivo de alfalfa, análisis de mercado, innovaciones en la producción o simplemente mantenerse informado sobre el mundo agrícola, TodoAlfalfa es tu recurso confiable y completo.

Explora nuestra plataforma y únete a la conversación mientras continuamos promoviendo el crecimiento y la excelencia en Argentina!

Name: Charte de Marseille sur l'information et les migrations
Description:
Cette charte, élaborée par des professionnels de l’information et des universitaires spécialistes des migrations, est un outil destiné aux journalistes et aux professionnels des médias.

Tout en réaffirmant la liberté éditoriale dont dispose chaque rédaction, cette charte souhaite répondre aux défis journalistiques liés aux migrations, un enjeu politique et social majeur du monde contemporain.

Elle vise à soutenir les journalistes et les professionnels des médias dans leur souhait de proposer une couverture de qualité, précise, complète et éthique des questions migratoires, en intégrant notamment les recommandations issues de textes déontologiques de référence.

Comme le rappelle la Charte mondiale d’éthique de la Fédération Internationale des Journalistes dans son article 9 : « Le/la journaliste veillera à ce que la diffusion d’une information ou d’une opinion ne contribue pas à nourrir la haine ou les préjugés et fera son possible pour éviter de faciliter la propagation de discriminations fondées sur l’origine géographique, raciale, sociale ou ethnique, le genre, les mœurs sexuelles, la langue, le handicap, la religion et les opinions politiques ».

Name: Guidafrica
Description:
Bienvenue sur GuidAfrica, votre portail vers la richesse et la diversité du continent africain ! Nous sommes fiers de vous présenter une expérience unique qui transcende les frontières et vous emmène à la découverte des trésors cachés de ce magnifique continent.

À GuidAfrica, nous croyons en la puissance du voyage pour élargir les horizons, favoriser la compréhension interculturelle et créer des souvenirs durables. Notre mission est de vous inspirer à explorer l'Afrique sous un nouvel angle, en mettant en lumière ses destinations captivantes, sa riche histoire, ses cultures vibrantes et sa nature à couper le souffle.

GuidAfrica c’est des :
Inspirations Voyage : Laissez-vous inspirer par nos récits de voyage, nos reportages exclusifs et nos conseils d'experts pour planifier des itinéraires inoubliables à travers l'Afrique.

Guides Locaux : Rencontrez les communautés locales, découvrez les traditions uniques et apprenez des histoires authentiques qui font de chaque voyage une aventure inédite.

Actualités Touristiques : Restez informé des dernières actualités touristiques en Afrique, des événements passionnants et des développements innovants dans l'industrie du voyage.

Partages d'Expériences : Connectez-vous avec une communauté de voyageurs passionnés, partagez vos expériences et découvrez des conseils pratiques pour maximiser votre plaisir de voyage.

GuidAfrica, plus qu'un simple guide touristique, est une invitation à explorer, à apprendre et à célébrer la beauté de l'Afrique. Bienvenue dans cette aventure extraordinaire, que nous allons écrire avec vous pour vous… Découvrez l'Afrique avec nous, découvrez GuidAfrica !

Name: Roteiros de vida | Histórias que inspiram

Aqui, reunimos depoimentos reais de profissionais em diferentes momentos de suas jornadas: quem está começando, quem passou por transições de carreira, quem enfrentou desafios e superou obstáculos, e quem encontrou novos caminhos quando menos esperava.

Nosso propósito é valorizar cada história e conectar profissionais por meio do aprendizado mútuo. Além de relatos inspiradores, trazemos insights sobre desenvolvimento profissional, oportunidades no mercado e dicas para quem busca recolocação.

Além disso, o Roteiros de Vida também é um espaço para dar visibilidade a talentos. Se você está disponível para novas oportunidades, aqui é o lugar onde sua história pode encontrar novos caminhos.

Porque quando escutamos e compartilhamos trajetórias, impulsionamos futuros.

Name: Conseil de déontologie journalistique (CDJ)
Description:
Like many other press and media councils in Europe, the Conseil de déontologie journalistique (CDJ) ensures compliance with journalistic ethics.

This independent self-regulatory body is organised and funded by those involved in the profession (journalists and media) in French- and German-speaking Belgium. 

Composed of representatives of journalists, media publishers, editors-in-chief and civil society, the CDJ has three main missions: information, mediation and self-regulation. 

In short, the Council lays down the ethical principles of journalism and ensures that they are respected by means of complaints, which can be settled by mediation. 

The CDJ is a moral authority, not a court.

Name: The Media Bias Meter
Description:
Media Bias Meter is an independent research and analytics organization dedicated to improving transparency and accountability in news reporting. We specialize in monitoring how major media outlets cover key global events and public-interest issues, using a combination of quantitative analysis, linguistic metrics, and data-driven methodologies.

Our team tracks large volumes of news content across multiple countries and languages, identifying patterns in language, framing, context, and sourcing. We translate these findings into clear, evidence-based bias scores that help journalists, researchers, policymakers, and the public better understand how narratives are constructed and where imbalances may occur.

Our mission is to support a healthier information ecosystem by providing rigorous, non-partisan insights that encourage accuracy, fairness, and transparency in media coverage. We collaborate with academic partners, civil-society organizations, and cross-disciplinary experts to continually refine our tools and expand the scope of our reporting.

At Media Bias Meter, we believe informed audiences are essential to strong democracies—and that trustworthy analysis empowers people to interpret the news with greater clarity and confidence.

- communicant.info s’intéresse aux sujets touchant de près ou de loin au développement culturel (musées et patrimoines, théâtre et lieux de spectacle vivant, artistes et entrepreneurs culturels…).

Fagbladet Byggfakta Nyheter(tidligere Byggaktuelt) ble etablert i 1985 og er et uavhengig fagtidsskrift for bygg, anlegg og kommunalteknikk. 1. januar 2013 skiftet bladet navn til Byggfakta Nyheter.

Våre lesere arbeider hos profesjonelle byggherrer, i arkitekt- og rådgivende ingeniørfirmaer, hos entreprenør- og håndverksbedrifter, i byggevarehandelen, i boligbyggelag og borettslag, VVS-bransjen, i kommunenes tekniske sektorer, på vegkontorene og i skoleverket. Name: Contente - PR & Content
Description:
Do you find it challenging to develop an effective PR and content strategy that lands?

This is where Contente, a strategic PR and content firm, comes in. With former editor-in-chief Karishma Tulsidas at the helm, Contente offers expert consulting services to help you craft a successful editorial and PR strategy.

Getting featured in the media isn’t just about visibility, it’s about influence. At Contente, we bridge the gap between your expertise and the right audience by crafting strategic media placements that elevate your authority.

Why Work with Contente?
* Exclusive access to top media outlets: With more than 15 years of editorial experience, the team at Contente has cultivated close relationships with Singapore’s leading publications. 
* A curated, non-intrusive approach: We pitch to media outlets one at a time, ensuring your brand maintains an authentic presence without overexposure.
* Tailored storytelling that resonates: We don’t just send press releases. We develop compelling angles that make you and your brand newsworthy.
* Outcome-driven pricing: No hefty retainers, just transparent, results-based pricing per placement.

How does it work? 
* Initial consultation: We interview the personality behind the brand to fully understand the PR objectives. The brand’s story, journey and impact is important here, allowing the team at Contente to craft the right pitch for the right publication. (This session is chargeable.)
* Pitch development & media matchmaking: We craft tailored pitches and connect your brand with publications that align with your message and audience.
* Placement execution & approval: You approve every media outlet before we proceed. Your story is placed as an editorial feature (not a paid ad) enhancing credibility and authority.
* Long-term strategy: While placements can happen within weeks, media strategy works best over a sustained period. Our typical engagement runs for a year.

Name: RadioNyra USA
Description:
About Radio Nyra – Arohi Media LLC
Located amidst the serene forest landscape of Durham, North Carolina, our journey began in 2014 with the launch of our very first radio station — WDUR 1490 AM, proudly owned and operated by Arohi Media LLC. Broadcasting through our 1,000-watt non-directional tower, we introduced the Triangle’s first 24/7 Desi Radio Network, bringing Hindi news, talk, and Bollywood music to the rapidly growing South Asian and Indian Subcontinent community in the Raleigh-Durham-Chapel Hill-Cary region.
Building on this success, we expanded our reach by leasing the HD-4 Channel of 99.9 WCMC-FM and soon launched our own FM translator on 101.9 FM — followed by 99.9 FM HD-3 Telugu. Today, Radio Nyra proudly broadcasts across multiple frequencies and digital platforms, connecting tens of thousands of listeners every week.
From Bollywood beats to community talk shows, immigration news to business insights, we bridge the gap between home and homeland — delivering content that informs, entertains, and inspires.
Beyond radio, Arohi Media LLC also provides comprehensive social media marketing and digital advertising solutions, helping brands reach the vibrant Indian and South Asian audiences across North Carolina and the United States. Our integrated marketing approach — combining on-air promotions, podcasting, events, and social media campaigns — ensures unmatched visibility and engagement for every client.
Whether it’s through 99.9 FM HD-3 Telugu, 99.9 FM HD-4 Hindi, 101.9 FM, or 1490 AM, Radio Nyra continues to be the voice of the community — a trusted platform where cultures connect and conversations thrive.

Poco a poco, y en estrecha colaboración redacción e informáticos, se fue gestando una herramienta que facilita tanto la tarea diaria en una redacción, como la optimización de los contenidos para sacarles el máximo rendimiento.

Lo que hace 10 años era una aventura para unos programadores recién licenciados, es ahora una empresa puntera que da servicio a muchos clientes, que han visto como el tráfico se va incrementando con nuestras soluciones tecnológicas y nuestro equipo.

Name: ФОКУС МЕДІА
Description:
Інформаційно-аналітичне видання Фокус було засноване в 2006 році спершу як друкований журнал, а згодом і як цифровий медіа-ресурс focus.ua. Один із перших українських аналітичних тижневиків завжди був лідером інформаційної та аналітичної журналістики. Видання стабільно входить до ТОП-10 новинних медіа України. 
Висока якість матеріалів Фокусу забезпечується редакційною політикою, якої дотримуються у своїй роботі журналісти та редактори видання.
ЗМІ фокусується на огляді та аналізі головних подій, основних ділових та політичних новинах в Україні та світі, публікує інтерв'ю із видатними постатями, колонки експертів про зовнішню політику України та досвід інших держав, дає аналітику зі сфер економіки та фінансів, висвітлює новини культури, науки, технологій, створює автомобільні огляди, гіди з подорожей та ін. 
Фокус оперативно дає читачам якісну та актуальну інформацію у діловому форматі, підкріплену авторитетними оцінками, коментарями експертів та лідерів думок.
«Фокусуйся на головному» разом з Фокус

Name: Talking Travel Writing
Description:
The travel media is a mystical thing. For outsiders, it can often feel like a closed book, and even within the industry, there’s a frustrating amount of secrecy around who does what, who wants what and how things work. But we don’t think it should be this way. We want the travel writing industry to be a more open and collaborative space, so we’ve launched a weekly newsletter that creates just that.

Talking Travel Writing is a publication that demystifies the travel media. We explore timely topics, covering everything from ethics to how you make money in this profession; drill down into pitching and PR relationships; and decipher all those pesky acronyms this industry just loves to use. Whether you have bylines under your belt, or you’re an aspiring travel writer, Talking Travel Writing is an essential resource to keep you in business.

Who are we?
We are Lottie Gross and Steph Dyson, two travel writers who have authored guidebooks for Rough Guides and DK, penned opinion pieces for The Telegraph, written features for The Times and, between us, travelled hundreds of thousands of miles around the world.

Why sign up?
Because we provide insider scoops on which editors are commissioning, we’ll seek out calls for travel pitches and tell you where to send your ideas, and we’ll offer genuinely practical, actionable advice to help you succeed as a travel writer.

Each month, we’ll explore a different topic or issue and deep-dive into the subject to offer you a game plan to help grow your portfolio, and your bank balance.

This comprehensive initiative seeks to create a virtual compendium, capturing the diverse and vibrant expressions of human creativity that define our world. 
The Explore Art project's primary objective is to bridge cultural divides and foster a deeper understanding and appreciation for the myriad ways in which communities express their identity, stories, and traditions through various artistic mediums. From the intricate dances of indigenous tribes to the contemporary urban art scenes in bustling metropolises, Explore Art aims to be an unparalleled repository of global cultural heritage.

Explore Art is a celebration of the artistic and cultural diversity that makes our world extraordinary. By bringing the arts and cultures of the world to a global audience, we hope to inspire a sense of interconnectedness and mutual respect, fostering a world where the beauty of each unique expression contributes to the collective masterpiece of humanity. 

Explore Art's vision is presented through a collection of digital magazines (Explore Art Magazine and Exploring Culture Magazine) and curated immersive solo/group exhibitions.  

Explore Art’s concept was conceived in September 2015 and encourages contributions from creative talent and cultural heritage worldwide, fostering a collaborative platform where readers can view artistic/cultural experiences and discoveries. This digital interactive platform aims to create a living and evolving cultural archive.

Name: Caregiver Bliss
Description:
Caregiver Bliss was born out of personal experience and a deep understanding of the unique demands and rewards of elderly family caregiving. Our founder, Jennifer Ann, witnessed firsthand the dedication and sacrifices made by family caregivers when caring for their aging parents.

Jennifer's mother had been a caregiver for her family members for more than three decades while also working as a home health care provider. Over the past ten years, Jennifer has taken on the role of caring for her mother. Her personal caregiving experience has spanned various situations, including long-distance care, caring at home, independent living, and assisted living.

Inspired by the resilience and the need for greater support for family caregivers, Jennifer embarked on a mission to create a space where caregivers could find the guidance they deserve.

At Caregiver Bliss, our platform offers a wealth of resources to address the diverse needs of caregivers. From practical tips on managing daily caregiving tasks to navigating complex healthcare systems, we strive to equip caregivers with the knowledge they need to make informed decisions and provide the best care possible.

We also deeply understand and appreciate the invaluable role of family caregivers. These remarkable individuals selflessly dedicate their lives to caring for their elderly family members, providing unwavering support in every aspect of their lives. Often, they find themselves juggling countless duties and making significant sacrifices.

At Caregiver Bliss, our mission is to empower and inspire caregivers through education and information. We strive to make a positive difference in the lives of those who selflessly care for others. We firmly believe that by equipping caregivers with the knowledge and resources they need, we can help them find balance, strength, and resilience in their caregiving journey.

Together, we can make a profound impact and improve the lives of caregivers and their loved ones.

PMG. Mehr Freude an stimmiger Kommunikation.

Profil | Boilerplate
Wir sind Experten für innovative und ganzheitliche Telekommunikationslösungen und Anbieter cloudbasierter und KI-gestützter Sprachkommunikationsplattformen für Telefonie, KI-Sprachassistenten & Contact Center Lösungen. Als solches konnten wir bereits mehrere Innovationspreise gewinnen und gelten mit einer täglichen Kontaktreichweite von 1 Mio. Konversationen als Vorreiter und Marktführer für akustische Kommunikation und Markenführung.

PMG Konzepte schaffen daher die hörbare Verbindung zwischen innovativer Technologie und einem smarten Dialog, der Kunden aller Branchen und Größen gleichzeitig mehr Effizienz nach innen und Zustimmung nach außen ermöglicht. 

Aus den neuen Medien (Rundfunkberatung, Moderation und Produktion) stammend ist PMG 2001 als Aktiengesellschaft in München von Daniel Pohlmann gegründet worden und beschäftigt eine wachsende Zahl an festen und freien Mitarbeitern sowie Entwicklungspartnern am heutigen Firmensitz in Inning am Ammersee um folgendes Leistungsportfolio anbieten zu können: Beratung, Planung und Entwicklung, Umsetzung bis Go Live, Service und Support, Tonstudio- und Trainingsleistungen. 

Dazu unterhält PMG ein eigenes Tonstudio und seit 2010 mehrere cloudbasierte Kommunikationsplattformen die unter den Marken AIRFON, MEDIFON und LIVECAST angeboten werden, um ganzheitliche Telefonie-, KI- sowie Soundkonzepte aus einer Hand anbieten zu können. 
 
 2025 PMG AG

Name: NEW6S - Les Acteurs de l'Info Constructive
Description:
« Good news, no news ? »

Traditionnellement, les événements relayés par les médias sont principalement négatifs. Leur traitement journalistique a souvent tendance à renforcer leur caractère anxiogène au point de provoquer aujourd’hui une saturation chez les lecteurs, auditeurs, téléspectateurs et internautes. Pour y remédier, l’information constructive apparaît comme l’ une des pistes à explorer.

Dans le respect évident de la déontologie et des règles fondamentales du métier, le journalisme doit englober dans la couverture de l’actualité, l’ensemble des informations, donc également les nouvelles positives. En outre, les rédactions devraient intégrer systématiquement dans le choix des angles celui des solutions existantes ou potentielles. 

Conscients de cette évolution, plusieurs médias et écoles de journalisme intègrent l’information constructive et de solution dans leur travail. Les Acteurs de l’Info Constructive entendent renforcer cette sensibilisation au sein des médias.

Name: Conseil de Presse
Description:
The Press Council, composed of an equal number of representatives from publishers and journalists, is the supreme self-regulatory body for the news media in Luxembourg. It is the author and guardian of the Code of Ethics, which defines the rights and responsibilities of publishers and professional journalists in the country.

The Press Council’s tasks are diverse and include, among others: issuing official press cards to professional journalists, handling complaints from individuals regarding information published in the media, examining issues related to freedom of expression in the media, and organizing training for aspiring and established journalists. The Press Council also organizes annual events dedicated to media literacy, such as the "Young Journalist Competition."

The Press Council is a member of the Alliance of Independent Press Councils of Europe (AIPCE) www.presscouncils.eu.

Established by the law of December 20, 1979, the Press Council is a legal public entity, governed by the law of June 8, 2004, on freedom of expression in the media, as amended on April 11, 2010.

The Press Council invites professional journalists to subscribe to its page to stay informed about press news in Luxembourg, press releases, upcoming journalistic training sessions, and much more!

"Le Gingembre de Continent Premier" qui peut se décliner en "Gingembre Littéraire", "économique, "politique" etc, concept mis sur les fonds baptismaux le 01 mai 2019 à la Salle Mahatma Ghandi de la Maison internationale des associations, à Genève, est issu du cycle de conférences portant sur " Réflexion sur le dialogue des civilisations et la place de l’Afrique dans le XXIe siècle ?" Le "Gingembre Littéraire" est, aujourd'hui, tant convoité par les milieux intellectuels et un public divers.

Name: Burda Procurement GmbH
Description:
Mit rund 10.500 Mitarbeiter:innen und über 500 gedruckten und digitalen Produkten ist Hubert Burda Media eines der größten europäischen Medienunternehmen. Wir arbeiten in einer der spannendsten Branchen, nutzen unsere gesellschaftliche Relevanz sinnstiftend und bieten unseren Mitarbeiter:innen die Freiheit, kreativ zu sein und Neues zu schaffen. 

Burda Procurement GmbH ist die eigenständige Einkaufsgesellschaft von Hubert Burda Media. Als Corporate Einheit tragen wir Verantwortung für die Beschaffungsstrategien des Konzerns, von IT über Content, Marketing, Professional Services und Engineering bis hin zu Eventleistungen, Logistik und Papier. Unser Ziel ist es, einen Einkauf zu etablieren, der den Unternehmern von Hubert Burda Media zu nachhaltigen Wettbewerbsvorteilen verhilft. Es treibt uns an, Einkauf als Love Brand für Business Spend Management etablieren, indem wir die Erwartungen unserer Klienten an übliche Einkaufsprozesse konstant übertreffen. Um dies zu erreichen, denken wir Einkauf unternehmerisch und damit ein gutes Stück neu, sei es durch die neuartige Burda Procurement Business Canvas, die NPS Messung, unsere 14täglichen Good2Great Trainings, unser Culture Deck oder die schlichte Tatsache, dass eines unserer größten Teams „Data Hub & eProcurement“ heißt. Burda Procurement befindet sich auf einer kontinuierlichen Transformationsreise, die im eigenen Team beginnt und weit in den Konzern hineinstrahlt.  

Neugierig geworden? Oder Lust selbst ein Teil dieser Transformationsreise zu werden? Dann schau vorbei auf unserer Website!

At AI Tools Explorer, we are dedicated to providing the latest information and insights on publicly available AI tools. As experts in the field of AI, we are passionate about making this cutting-edge technology accessible and understandable to everyone.

Our team of experienced writers and researchers scours the web to bring you the most up-to-date and comprehensive information on the AI tools available online. From beginner-friendly options to complex algorithms, we cover it all.

Whether you are an AI enthusiast, a business owner looking to implement AI in your workflow, or a researcher in the field, AI Tools Explorer is your one-stop-shop for all things AI. Our aim is to educate, inform, and inspire, and we are constantly working to bring you the latest and greatest AI tools to enhance your knowledge and skills.

So if you are interested in exploring the world of AI, visit us at aitoolsexplorer.com and stay up-to-date on all the latest AI tools and trends. Let's push the boundaries of AI together!

Name: The Meta Self Podcast
Description:
The Meta Self is built on the 1° Rule: Small inner shifts create Massive outer change. Hosted by Lucy Stepanyan (World Bank & UN consultant, entrepreneur, and interviewer of top economists and founders), the channel explores the new rules of a world transformed by AI, technology, and rapid change.

The world we grew up in and the world we’re entering operate on different assumptions. To thrive, we must evolve from the inside out.
Here, you’ll learn the skills and mindsets needed for the future of work, how global forces are reshaping our lives, and how neuroscience, psychology, and technology can help you stay sharp, adaptable, and resilient.
Each episode features leading thinkers, from futurists to neuroscientists, revealing what it takes to not just survive, but grow and seize opportunity in an age of transformation.

If you’re ready to level up — one degree at a time — welcome to The Meta Self. Subscribe and join the journey.

Name: breathe media
Description:
Breathe – Live and Local
Breathe is the leading platform for discovering and scaling wellness, fitness, and cultural events in the world’s most dynamic cities.

We connect event producers, venues, and consumers through curated event discovery, seamless ticketing, and powerful localized media. Our mission is to fuel the next generation of live wellness experiences, helping event producers sell more tickets, grow their brands, and build lasting communities.

What We Do:
 For Event Producers: List events, sell tickets, and access premium marketing & media support.
 For Consumers: Discover the best local wellness events—yoga, fitness, recovery, community experiences & more.
 For Brands & Venues: Reach engaged, high-spending wellness audiences through sponsorships & partnerships.

With successful launches in Miami, Los Angeles, Atlanta, and the Bay Area, and Dubai, New York, and London on the horizon, Breathe is rapidly becoming the go-to platform for experiential wellness at scale.

Join the movement. Discover. Connect. Breathe. 

#LiveAndLocal #WellnessEvents #Breathe #Community #EventDiscovery

Name: Affluent Society

Whether you are travelling on the road to success or have arrived at your destination, it is about the ability to afford more in life - the ability to own a larger home, drive a prestigious car, wine and dine at acclaimed places, dress in the latest fashion, stay at the best hotels and resorts, enjoy access to private banks, grow your wealth globally, have addresses in different cities, join the jet set crowd, and experience bespoke products and services delivered with great skill and personalized care. While we enjoy the finer things in life, we also remember others less fortunate. Affluence includes lending a helping hand to those who fall behind.

Affluent Society is a global business, lifestyle and social media for people who already enjoy the finer things in life and those who aspire to the lifestyle. 

It delivers content, events, giveaways and promotions on its website that sync with the needs and interests of affluent to ultra high net worth consumers in their personal and work life. Topics include food, health, travel, luxury, art, money, philanthropy, business, economy, technology, startups etc.

It also serves as a social media platform for users who want to share everyday news, stories, opinions, likes and dislikes with a wider audience in addition to their followers on Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter and Instagram.

Affluent Society is a part of Platinum Circle, the world’s leading business group consisting of over 100,000 decision makers from 1,800 corporations each with annual revenues exceeding USD100m, governments and intergovernmental organisations.

Fundado em 2014, o site faz parte do Grupo PLN, maior rede independente de mobilidade urbana do Brasil. Atuamos com jornalismo regional, dados úteis e presença nas principais redes sociais - conectando pessoas à cidade com agilidade, clareza e responsabilidade.

Seja você leitor, anunciante ou parceiro, aqui a mobilidade está na palma da sua mão.

Description:
Notre exigence ? Être unique

Réinventer la presse d’information gratuite était notre ambition.
Pourquoi ? Parce qu’elle génère plus d’opportunités.
De véritables magazines, facilement disponibles, qui séduisent et fidélisent les lecteurs au travers d’une ligne éditoriale utile et un contenu local qui les intéresse vraiment.

Notre objectif ? Faire parler de vous

Annonceurs, nos magazines existent grâce à vous.
L’équilibre entre contenus rédactionnels et publicitaires, ainsi que les expériences de communications que nous vous proposons, rendent intelligible cette connexion entre nos lecteurs et vos objectifs de com’ ! La diversité thématique de nos magazines et leur diffusion multicanale permettent d’élaborer des plans media efficients avec la garantie de budgets communication optimisés.

Notre état d’esprit ? La passion avant tout !

Créer du lien sur notre territoire, nous renouveler, écouter, cultiver ce regard et ce ton qui nous distinguent, ont construit un lien indéfectible avec nos lecteurs.
Et notre région nous offre tant de belles histoires à leur raconter, que l’on n’allait pas s’en priver !

Notre valeur ajoutée Participer à la vie des territoires

Faire du business, quand on est un media gratuit, c’est essentiel. Mais faut-il s’en contenter ?
Nos medias sont le support d’une synergie territoriale positive. Révéler les messages et les diffuser pour favoriser l’attractivité et l’activité d’un territoire, c’est ça notre dada !

Name: favourread
Description:
Books are a window to new perspectives and worldviews. As bookworms, we are on a mission to broaden our reading horizon by asking what your #favourread is. 

The books that had a transformative impact on us, the ones we still think about, or reread every once in a while, are a part of who we are.

We believe that talking openly, even with vulnerability, about such transformative reads deepens the connections we have with one another. 

We want to inspire people to read (more of) such books, and start meaningful conversations. 

To take part, post about your #favourread, tell the community how this book has impacted you, and tag 3 people to know what their favourread is. This page is in English, but feel free to post or comment in Dutch or French.

Stay tuned to follow this initiative, and reach out if you want to be involved !

Dorien, Mayada, Jan and Alixe
-- with a special thanks to Evelyn De Kesel for the logo design and overall support, as well as to the Belgium's 40under40 community

Name: Ingenios
Description:
Ingenios es un medio deportivo digital que se especializa en ofrecer una perspectiva analítica, apasionada y fresca del mundo del deporte. Nuestra misión es ir más allá del resultado final, explorando las historias, los protagonistas y el análisis profundo que mueven la industria y la afición.

Mediante un enfoque multimedia, nos aseguramos de que el contenido de calidad llegue a nuestra audiencia donde sea que esté. Creamos podcasts exclusivos con debates inteligentes, producimos vídeos dinámicos de calle para captar el pulso de los fans, y ofrecemos cobertura en profundidad de partidos y eventos clave. Esta mezcla de formatos nos permite conectar con la comunidad deportiva de una manera integral.

Hemos demostrado un crecimiento significativo y un impacto real en el panorama digital. Nuestra comunidad activa en redes sociales supera los 2.000 seguidores, generando un alcance que se traduce en más de 2 millones de impresiones mensuales. Esto subraya la alta participación y la constante demanda de nuestro contenido especializado.

En Ingenios, estamos siempre abiertos a la colaboración. Buscamos establecer sinergias con marcas, profesionales y creadores de contenido que compartan nuestra pasión por el deporte y deseen llegar a una audiencia comprometida y en expansión. Conéctate con nosotros para explorar oportunidades de colaboración!

Especializados em mensageria (SMS, WhatsApp Business e RCS) e automação orientada por inteligência artificial, proporcionamos uma plataforma única para disparos rápidos, integração por API, respostas automáticas e campanhas segmentadas que geram engajamento qualificado e conversão.

Nosso foco é oferecer uma infraestrutura robusta, segura e escalável, capaz de atender desde operações ágeis até grandes volumes de envio corporativo — sempre com monitoramento, relatórios e otimização contínua.

Acreditamos que a comunicação assertiva com o cliente é vital nos dias de hoje. Por isso, combinamos tecnologia de ponta com práticas de compliance, entrega e mensurabilidade, para que nossos clientes tenham transparência, eficiência e performance.

Seja para campanhas promocionais, notificações operacionais ou fluxos de atendimento automatizados, a Sintalk está pronta para elevar o nível da mensageria da sua empresa. Vamos conversar e descobrir como podemos construir juntos uma estratégia de comunicação que realmente impacte.

Name: RED – Netzwerk für Redaktions-Entwickler*innen (DACH)

Wir brennen dafür, Redaktionen immer besser und wirksamer zu machen. Und wir glauben: Das geht nur gemeinsam. Egal, ob wir bereits erfolgreich Redaktionen entwickeln, unseren wirksamen Platz noch nicht gefunden haben oder in unserer Organisation noch gegen Widerstände ankämpfen. 

Du möchtest dich anschließen? Wir sind gespannt auf dich!

Name: The Newcomers
Description:
Immigration gets plenty of bad press, but the press doesn’t give the whole story.

That’s why we are here: To tell the whole, real, human stories behind immigration.

The Newcomers explores the human perspective behind the immigrant experience—the struggles, frustrations, lessons, and joys of starting life afresh in a new country.

Each episode, guide, or story we publish tries to answer one question: what does it mean to be an immigrant?

I believe these stories contribute to a richer and more diverse understanding of the human experience.

I believe these stories help foster empathy and connection in a world that feels divided.

I believe these stories lead to more connection, understanding, and compassion.

My goal is that each of these stories lets us see familiar worlds in new ways.

"What I do know is that history not only shapes the stories we tell, but is shaped and reshaped by the telling of them. History not spoken of can be history forgotten, almost as if it never existed. History spoken of only by certain voices is seldom honest. And history that's not revisited — often many times and through many prisms — keeps us stuck in the past without learning much from it."

Jacqui Banaszynski

Name: МАЯК Lighthouse Media CIC
Description:
“Маяк” (Maiak) means “lighthouse” — in translation from Ukrainian. Our independent bilingual media was created to shine for Ukrainians scattered around the world, showing the way home through stories of light and humanity.

Maiak is a bilingual online magazine about people, Ukrainian culture, history, art, and social initiatives. We tell stories of ordinary individuals who quietly do extraordinary things — a couple rebuilding homes for those affected by war, a businessman who founded a volunteer initiative providing free surgical aid to the wounded, a teenager with autism who paints to raise funds for Ukraine’s defenders.

Our name reflects our mission. Like a lighthouse that offers both light and home, we illuminate the paths of real people whose courage, kindness, and creativity inspire others.

We don’t offer fast-food stories that live for a day. We craft meaningful stories that remain relevant for years — slow journalism that allows time to unfold. These are not the stories you scroll through on your way home from work or during lunch. These are the ones you read wrapped in your favorite blanket, holding a cup of tea — stories that bring calm, strength, and inspiration.

Maiak’s international team — editors and journalists from Ukraine, the UK, Wales, Azerbaijan, Brazil, and beyond — shares a belief in meaningful work, dignity, and empathy. We focus on human-centred storytelling, ethical journalism, and cross-cultural dialogue.

Our principles:
 Human stories first — every person is the hero of their own narrative.
 Ethics and dignity — we handle personal stories with care and respect.
 Bilingual bridge — connecting Ukrainian and English-speaking audiences.
 Anti-stereotypes — portraying migrants, refugees, and communities beyond the headlines.
 Solutions journalism — not just describing problems, but helping create change.
We are a growing, community-supported initiative developing media, cultural, and educational projects. Through partners

Name: Reading The Pictures
Description:
Reading The Pictures is the only site dedicated 100% to the analysis of news images and media images. Launched in 2004, Reading The Pictures is closely followed by the political and visual media, the political blogosphere, the photo community and university  communications and journalism programs.  

The site consists of three sections, each taking a unique approach to the still image:

• The Notes section addresses the framing of images in the news media and social media, as well as key issues in the practice of photojournalism. 

• The Salon is an on-line, real-time discussion between photojournalists, visual academics and other visual or subject experts. Each salon examines a set of images relevant to the major visual stories of the times often focusing on how the media and social media has framed the event.  

• The Originals section publishes original photojournalism addressing long-term social and documentary stories as well as the photographer's working process.

Reading The Pictures was a '06 Webby Awards finalist for Best Political Blog and a credentialed blogger at the '08 Democratic National Convention.  The site won a 2010 Picture of the Year International award for multimedia reporting and topped LIFE's 2011 list of Best Photo Blogs.  Michael Shaw, the publisher of Reading The Pictures and the first full-time news photo and photojournalism critic, is Shaw has been referred to as the first full-time news photography critic.

Avec plus de 800 000 exemplaires diffusés chaque mois, ce supplément disponible en

Parce que la sensibilisation autour des problématiques écologiques et de l’urgence

- Une rubrique sur le digital, sur tous les sites et applications mobiles, permettant de
s’informer régulièrement sur les initiatives locales en faveur de la transition écologique
avec des décryptages, reportages et interviews.

- Une newsletter Ici On Agit! pour recevoir une sélection des meilleurs articles et
reportages sur la transition écologique directement dans sa boîte mail. Aujourd’hui c’est près de 100 000 inscrits à la newsletter.

- Un compte TikTok @icionagit lancé en février 2024, qui regroupe une communauté de près de 9 000 abonnés et désormais cette page Linkedin.

Depuis 2025, Ici On Agit! organise aussi des événements qui rassemblent citoyens, entreprises, collectivités et associations autour des solutions locales à impacts positifs, avec des intervenants experts : Jean-Marc Jancovici, Valérie Masson-Delmotte, Jean Jouzel, Mehdi Coly, François Werner, Olivier Hamant, etc...

Name: Metroland Life Magazine & Blog
Description:
Bold, brainy and a little bit boujee—Metroland Life is your insider pass to the best of the Chilterns.

Your glossy guide to life in the leafy lanes, lively towns, and hidden corners of the Chilterns. We are the No. 1 digital magazine, blog, directory, and social PR platform for The Chilterns, publishing since 2016.

Born in Buckinghamshire and raised on flat whites, farmers' markets, and a serious love of storytelling, we’re here to celebrate everything that makes life in Metroland stylish, surprising, and full of soul. Think Sunday slow-living meets Thursday night cocktails. School-run chic with a splash of scandal. We’re here for indie businesses, bold voices, and beautiful things—whether it’s a secret garden supper club, a soul-soothing spa, or a 15-year-old eco-warrior changing the world from their bedroom.

We champion #SHOPLOCAL #LOVELOCAL - think local legends, secret supper clubs, bold new voices, and places so gorgeous you’ll want to move there immediately (or at least Instagram them heavily). We cover culture, countryside, people, places, and passions—with a splash of sparkle. 

With almost 10 years publishing, we have worked with a plethora of small and large brands over the years including Chiltern Open Air Museum, Pub in the Park, Hampton Court Palace, Windsor Castle, The Tower of London, Royal Opera & Ballet, Waddesdon Manor, Blenheim Palace, Chilfest, West End Shows, Roald Dahl Museum, Chesham Fringe, JoJo Maman Bebe, Premium Country Pub Collection, Aylesbury Waterside Theatre, Celebrity Chefs, Bespoke Hotels and many, many more. 

Metroland Life is for the curious, the creative, and anyone who’s ever wondered what lies beyond the commuter belt. 75,000 readers across Chesham, Amersham, Chalfont, and beyond! 

Proudly independent, we’re not just a magazine—we’re a movement. So pull on your boots (or your heels), and step into Metroland Life.

(Metroland Life, Bedfordshire Life, Beautiful Weddings UK published under The Foxy Deer brand).

Name: Club Acteurs Locaux en Mouvement
Description:
Le Club Acteurs Locaux en Mouvement a été lancé par l’association nationale AssoTvLocale-France, pour fédérer l’ensemble des acteurs d’un même territoire (associations, collectivités, producteurs, éleveurs, structures de l’ESS, artistes, entrepreneurs, clubs d’entreprises…) afin de créer des synergies, de l’attractivité, de l’emploi, de l’économie circulaire et des échanges qui ont du sens et de l’impact. L'objectif est de défendre la Souveraineté Economique, alimentaire et culturelle de chaque territoire.

Créé et animé par l’AssoTvLocale, le Club Acteurs Locaux se veut fédérateur et fera tout pour ne pas réinventer l'existant mais au contraire s'appuyer sur les structures locales bien ancrées tels que les CRESS, les syndicats, les collectivités, les chambres consulaires, les médias locaux… Le Mouvement des Acteurs Locaux agit pour la souveraineté territoriale et le vivre ensemble.

SmartreZo, partenaire du Club Acteurs Locaux a mis à disposition une plateforme numérique éthique, sans cookies, sans traceurs, qui promeut le circuit-court et qui comprend un maillage de médias collaboratifs locaux et un maillage de Places de Marché pour tous les territoires de France y compris les DOM auxquels se rajoute un réseau social BtoBtoC. 

Le Club des Acteurs Locaux s’appuie sur une plateforme média qui va bien évidemment toucher les personnes présentes sur les réseaux sociaux grâce au partage d’actualités mais elle va surtout permettre d’atteindre celles et ceux qui n’y sont pas car son média est ouvert à tous en lecture sans inscription.
En adhérant au Club Acteurs Locaux, les entreprises, associations, artistes, journalistes… vont ainsi pouvoir développer :

- Leur ancrage territorial, 
- Leur visibilité,
- Leur notoriété,
- Leur éthique.

Adhérez au Club  et accédez notamment à une boite à outils de communication très efficace pour gagner en visibilité ! 

Devenir partenaire --> https://www.acteurs-locaux.fr/UserFiles/SITES/37278/Devenez-Partenaire-2025.pdf

Name: Future of Media and Communication Forum
Description:
The Media Future Forum is a leading regional platform that brings together journalists, content creators, media professionals, policymakers, civil society, and international experts to explore the evolving landscape of media, communication, and technology.

In its third edition, to be held on September 20–21, 2025 in Amman, Jordan, the forum will convene prominent voices from the Arab region and beyond under the theme:
“From Freedom and Protection to Empowerment and Change.”

The program will feature high-level panels addressing pressing intersections between politics and the media. 
Also, the forum will focus on three parallel tracks that will spotlight:

Empowerment and Change

Professional Protection & Safety

New Media & Technology

The forum prioritizes the participation of media professionals, content creators, social media activists, civil society organizations, students of media and communication, as well as representatives of governments, international organizations, and diplomatic missions.

With the presence of influential Arab and international media figures, human rights advocates, UN representatives, and global media companies, the Media Future Forum is shaping the conversation on how media can drive empowerment, safety, and sustainable change in the region.

Name: JusCOM - Asociación Iberoamericana de Profesionales de la Comunicación Judicial
Description:
La Asociación Iberoamericana de Profesionales de la Comunicación Judicial (JusCom) surge como un paso natural del proceso de crecimiento de una disciplina incipiente. Quienes la integramos hemos asumido la necesidad de jerarquizarla. Para ello es necesario que logre autonomía respecto de la lógica judicial y de la práctica periodística: la Comunicación Judicial es otra disciplina y requiere de un aparato teórico y un marco institucional propios. Eso redundará en una mejora de la calidad del diálogo entre quienes integran ambos subsistemas, el judicial y el mediático, entre sí y con la sociedad.

Somos conscientes de que existe una enorme cantidad de saberes, prácticas, modelos, experiencias y talentos distribuidos en todos los países de la región. Y también que muchos de ellos son subutilizados por falta de un espacio institucional que los convoque y los expanda.

Se extiende la invitación a participar activamente en esta iniciativa a quienes trabajan o proyectan trabajar en el ámbito de la comunicación judicial y campos afines.

Name: Naked Food Magazine
Description:
NAKED FOOD MAGAZINE

Naked Food is an independent global health initiative that proposes the switch from the Standard American Diet (S.A.D.) to the New Authentic Kind and Enlightened Diet (N.A.K.E.D.). 

Naked Food is the whole food, plant-based nutrition approach to preventing and reversing disease. 

Naked Food means whole, plant-based, vegan, organic, non-GMO, and toxin-free foods and products that enhance a healthy lifestyle.

Naked Food Magazine is praise to life, love, and health. A way to honor the ones we have lost and whose strength and valor will live forever.


Our Mission:

~ To educate, inform, inspire, and empower about a naked whole food plant-based nutrition to prevent, reverse, and heal disease.

~ To educate consumers of the consequences of consuming processed foods, animal derived products, processed sugar and fad dietary practices.

~ To create awareness about organic and locally grown foods, and to encourage calls to action for food labeling, GMOs, CAFOs, and a safer food system.

~ To transform our current disease care system into an integrative medicine system that focuses on personalized care, nutritional education, prevention, and awareness for both patients and medical professionals.

~ To participate in local and global efforts that build consciousness concerning green practices, and ways to reduce carbon footprint and climate change.


Naked Food Magazine does not have any political, religious, economical, or financial bias.

Naked on Twitter @NakedFoodMag

Name: Netceed Poland
Description:
Netceed jest światowym liderem w dziedzinie dystrybucji, logistyki, inżynierii technicznej i projektowania rozwiązań, z ponad 30-letnim doświadczeniem i osiągnięciami we wspieraniu branży telekomunikacyjnej i szerokopasmowego internetu. 

Dostarczamy i dystrybuujemy kompleksowy asortyment urządzeń pasywnych i aktywnych oraz narzędzi do wdrażania, modernizacji i utrzymania sieci, wspierając wszystkie technologie, w tym FTTH, FTTx, HFC, Wi-Fi, 5G/mobile i centra danych.

Nasze portfolio obejmuje ponad 90 000 produktów od niemal 1 500 wiodących dostawców branżowych. Wraz z oferowanymi rozwiązaniami w zakresie łańcucha dostaw o wartości dodanej wspiera operatorów w sprawnym dostarczaniu usług szybkiego Internetu, video, danych i głosu dla użytkowników indywidualnych, biznesowych i mobilnych.

Zatrudniamy ponad 2 000 pracowników w 19 krajach i liczba ta wciąż rośnie. Nasz doświadczony zespół codziennie pracuje nad kształtowaniem przyszłości sieci komunikacyjnych na całym świecie.

Name: Lump Media
Description:
Chez Lump, la ville se vit à quatre pattes !

Parce que Paupiette, notre CEO bien truffé, en avait marre des « interdit aux chiens » et des regards de travers, on a lancé Lump.

Notre mission ? Faciliter la vie des chiens et de leurs humains en ville… et mettre en avant les lieux qui ont tout compris au dog-friendly.

 Média & Communauté Dog-Friendly

On recense et on teste les meilleures adresses dog-friendly : coffeeshops, bars, restos, hôtels, cabanes, parcs, boutiques…
→ Déjà +500 spots dénichés en France (et en Europe) où les chiens sont vraiment les bienvenus.
→ Partagés à une communauté engagée de plusieurs milliers de dog parents urbains CSP+, toujours en quête d’expériences à vivre avec leur chien.

Le Label qui a du chien

Pour devenir le repère des établissements dog-friendly, nous avons créé un sticker (un pour les petits gabarits et un pour toutes tailles de chiens). Plus qu’un simple “chiens acceptés”, c’est une garantie d’accueil 5 étoiles (gamelle, câlins et sourire inclus).

On accompagne les pros de l’hospitality pour valoriser cet accueil et en faire un vrai levier d’attractivité.

 Des cartes & supports qui ont du flair

En plus de nos contenus digitaux, nous créons des cartes dog-friendly.
Ces supports physiques permettent aux dog parents de trouver facilement les bonnes adresses. Nous réalisons aussi des éditions spéciales.

 Une communauté qui a du mordant

+10 000 dog lovers nous suivent déjà via notre magazine, Insta & newsletter.
Ils nous font confiance pour dénicher les bons plans et partager leurs expériences.
Un public CSP+ fidèle, curieux, en quête de lieux qui aiment les chiens autant qu’eux.

Parce que la vie est tellement plus belle quand on peut tout partager avec son meilleur ami poilu… 

Rejoignez l’aventure Lump et faisons bouger les lignes, une patte après l’autre

Name: TuckerMedia
Description:
Helping Media companies build sustainable performance improvements by optimizing processes for Creative Marketing & Content.  Organizational Design & Change Management to achieve commercial & ESG objectives.

TuckerMedia works with Media CEOs, functional heads and teams to identify and address gaps between intended strategy and results.

With over 25 years’ experience of driving transformational performance improvements for global Media organizations, including streaming, pay-tv and terrestrial media companies, TuckerMedia is uniquely positioned to address some of Media’s most pressing issues, such as:

Creative Marketing Strategy
•	How can Creative output be measured?
•	What is the ROI of a Creative Marketing campaign?
•	How to design promotional strategy for multi-platform promotion?
•	How can the presentation of Content be optimized for engagement? 
•	How to balance reduced Creative Marketing budgets with quality?
•	How to optimize budgets to launch new products eg. FAST channels?

Content
•	Which parts of the Content value chain can be made more efficient?
•	How can we streamline processes for Content management?
•	How can carbon emissions of Media processes be reduced?

Structure
•	What’s best for the business: localized or centralized Creative Marketing?
•	How can the Creative Marketing function be restructured?
•	How can we build a high-performing Creative Marketing team?
•	Should our Creative Marketing be centralized or localized?
•	How can localization costs be optimised?
•	What do we need to do to improve/implement an ESG strategy?

Systems
•	How can systems be used to render the Creative production process more efficient and effective?
•	How can users be persuaded to adopt a new system and use it effectively?

Through a holistic approach (Process, Systems and People), TuckerMedia enables Media companies to align their Commercial, Environmental, Social and Governance objectives for sustainable growth.

Name: Intuy AS
Description:
Helt siden Intuy AS ble etablert i 2007 har vi hatt fokus på brukeren.  Kompetanseopparbeidet gjennom mange års bransjeerfaring - en av våre ansatte har jobbet med videokonferanse siden Televerket startet sitt prøveprosjekt på 1980-tallet - har satt AV Fusion på kartet som leverandør av gode, brukervennlige møterom.  Våre kompetente teknikere sikrer gode installasjoner og hurtig oppfølging ved behov.

Hver dag gjør vi vårt beste for å gi det lille ekstra for alle våre kunder, og det er vi stolte av. Vi er passe store, og det også vår strategi. Dermed kan vi snu oss hurtig, uten for mye byråkrati. Og vi mener at våre kunder nyter veldig godt av det. Faktisk har en rekke av våre større kunder uttalt at de mye heller vil være en betydningsfull kunde hos en mindre aktør, enn å være en av veldig mange hos en stor aktør.

Det er også viktig for oss å være rådgiver for våre kunder, være tidlig inne i prosesser og veilede dem til å ta gode beslutninger. Beslutninger av den typen som gir mest igjen for pengene. På den måten har vi sikret at våre kunder får en fremtidsrettet løsning med mange muligheter og lang levetid på produktene. Ikke bare er det lønnsomt, det sikrer også bærekraft!

Name: Media+Tech Collective
Description:
Our mission is to create authentic relationships that go beyond traditional networking to benefit our members personally and professionally.

“Because Connections Matter,” the Media+Tech Collective is a 501c(6) non-profit, open industry association that is dedicated to bringing together members from throughout the businesses of video entertainment and technology – including broadband, telephony, commercial services and more – with networking opportunities, educational programs, and social events. By providing affordable and engaging programs and sharing valuable industry information and contacts with industry peers, MTC members stay better informed and fulfill opportunities to become impactful leaders in their respective organizations. The MTC is using 2021 to phase in full accessibility for those with disabilities and special needs.

The Rocky Mountain Cable Association was rebranded to become the Media+Tech Collective of the Rockies in January 2021 to meet the changing needs of its members in an evolving industry. Industry members, companies, vendors and support services in all areas of the industry (video, streaming, data, voice, mobile, IOT, web services, etc) in all functional areas (sales, marketing, product, IT, HR, software development, finance, and more) are welcome and supported by MTC. The RMCA was established in January 2012 as a local successor to the Cable & Telecommunications Association for Marketing Rocky Mountains chapter (CTAMRM). With the evolution of RMCA to the Media+Tech Collective the organization remains committed to its foundation of networking, education and giving back to the community.

Name: Comunidad Profesional
Description:

A través de la radio, la web y las redes sociales ofrece un espacio para la difusión, generando sinergia con los canales propios de cada institución, potenciando la visibilidad, a través de un producto que incluye el tradicional y vigente formado de radio y el apoyo
de las nuevas herramientas de comunicación digital.

Comunidad Profesional dará comienzo en el año 2023 a su sexta temporada en el aire, en una de las principales emisoras de frecuencia modulada de la región La Plata, Berisso, Ensenada, Brandsen y Chascomús: FM Classique 106.5, que ofrece el sistema de aire tradicional, su web (www. http://www.classique.com.ar) y cuenta con la aplicación para escucharla a través de distintos dispositivos móviles.

Se emite los viernes de 14 a 15:30. Cuenta con diferentes secciones: entrevistas. Actualidad. RRHH. Compromiso con la comunidad. Novedades, agenda y profesionales
destacados. Web: www.comunidadprofesional.com.ar. En Facebook.com/Comunidad Profesional // Twitter @Comuprofesional // Instagram @comunidadprofesionalok

Conducción: Romina Grigioni (Lic. en Ciencias Políticas. Gestión de comunicación y relaciones institucionales en el ámbito público y privado) y Gustavo Papa (Lic. en
Comunicación Social, más de 25 años en la Redacción de diario EL DIA de La Plata, edición de publicaciones sectoriales). Producción periodística y comercial: Guillermo Ponce (Lic. en Comunicación Social con más de 20 años de experiencia en comunicación institucional)

Name: Safety Promo
Description:
Safety Promo est un carrefour dynamique d'actualités technologiques et culturelles, destiné aux passionnés de culture, de technologie et d'innovation. Fondée en 2014 par Judelin Bedoite, Safety Promo a été intégré en 2024 dans le cadre d’un partenariat stratégique avec JLJ DIGITAL, tout en conservant son équipe et sa direction. Un partenariat visant à favoriser une évolution encore plus performante et innovante...

Chez Safety Promo, nous sommes fiers de partager notre riche patrimoine culturel et de diffuser des contenus de qualité qui informent, inspirent et engagent notre communauté. Nous sommes en perpétuelle exploration de nouveaux concepts, idées et tendances dans les domaines de la culture, de la technologie et de l'innovation.

Notre engagement en faveur de la promotion de la musique et de la culture a débuté en 2014, et depuis, notre croissance et notre impact ont été remarquables. Nos efforts ont été salués lors de la cérémonie Vibe Atis Honors en 2017, et nous avons eu l'honneur d'être nominés pour le Prix de l'Initiative Numérique Culture, Communication et Médias par le groupe Audiens en 2019.

Safety Promo offre une occasion unique à ses partenaires de collaborer et d'accroître leur visibilité en exploitant notre audience engagée. Nous sommes impatients de travailler avec des entreprises et des organisations souhaitant partager leur vision et leurs idées novatrices avec le monde.

Toujours en quête d'inspiration et de partage d'informations de qualité avec nos abonnés, Safety Promo continue de se positionner à l'avant-garde de la promotion numérique, prête à bâtir un avenir numérique plus connecté et enrichissant.

Name: Faktograf - Association for the Informed Public
Description:
Faktograf - Association for the Informed Public is a non-profit media organization based in Zagreb, Croatia.  Our Association is dedicated to the development of good journalism, critical thinking and informed public. For us, good journalism places things in context, emphasizes what is relevant and elaborates what is unclear.

The Association is the publisher of Faktograf.hr - the first Croatian fact-checking outlet, as well as of  “The Climate Portal” which operates based on the principles of solutions journalism and exposes and counters misinformation related to the climate crisis. 

Additionally, Faktograf engages in watchdog and advocacy activities regarding media freedoms, disinformation, and democracy. Faktograf is a part of International Fact Checking Network (IFCN), and European Fact Checking Standards Network (EFCSN), and a member of SEE Check - the network that Faktograf co-founded with colleagues from the same language area of South-Eastern Europe. Faktograf is also a signatory to the strengthened Code of Practice on Disinformation.
Faktograf produces research and analysis, among others: a pioneering study on “Harassment of Fact-checking Media Outlets in Europe” – Survey; an in depth analysis of harassment campaigns against Faktograf When disinformation campaigns fuel hate and harassment – Case study: Faktograf.hr and an  analysis on climate misinformation titled "Fabricating Doubt and Persecuting Science" published in 2024.

Im Radioprogramm setzen wir auf Information, Inspiration und Unterhaltung: Wir bieten ein Tagesbegleitprogramm mit Infos aus Kirche und Welt, Politik und Gesellschaft. Der Tag beginnt mit unserem "Morgenimpuls" und endet mit dem "Nachtgebet". Jede Stunde um "zehn vor" liefert "Das Wort" kleine Impulse für zwischendurch. An Sonn- und Feiertagen übertragen wir die Heilige Messe live aus dem Kölner Dom. Beliebt ist auch unser Musikmix: handverlesene aktuelle Hits mischen wir mit Evergreens. Unsere Moderatorinnen und Moderatoren komponieren aus all diesen Inhalten ein ansprechendes Radioprogramm, unseren "guten Draht nach oben". Werbung und Verkehrsmeldungen senden wir nicht. Das Radioprogramm ist über Internet, unsere App und in UKW in Köln empfangbar.
Auf dem Nachrichten-Portal DOMRADIO.DE finden Sie ein breites Angebot an aktuellen Nachrichten, Interviews und Reportagen. DOMRADIO.DE überträgt täglich live den Gottesdienst aus dem Kölner Dom im Web-TV. Die Messen können in HD-TV-Qualität mitgefeiert werden. Alle Mitschnitte sind zeitnah als HD-Video in der Mediathek abrufbar. Viele Radiosendungen sind on demand abrufbar und können als Podcast abonniert werden. Täglich mehrfach aktualisiert werden auch die DOMRADIO.DE-Videonachrichten.

Name: SKYPLAY
Description:
SkyPlay is a next-gen digital entertainment and connectivity platform in India offering fiber broadband, IPTV, and OTT aggregation in one seamless experience. With a mission to connect 1 million+ users by 2030, SkyPlay focuses on delivering high-speed internet, rich TV content, and personalized streaming with AI-powered features.

Services
SkyPlay’s broadband offers ultra-fast internet up to 5 Gbps with unlimited data and Wi-Fi 6 support. Their IPTV includes 900+ HD live channels across regional languages with features like cloud DVR, pause/rewind, and multi-device streaming—no set-top box required for smart TVs or Fire TV users.

OTT integration is another key strength, bundling platforms like Netflix, Amazon Prime, Disney+ Hotstar, SonyLIV, Zee5, aha, and SunNXT into one subscription with single-login convenience.

Devices & App
The SkyPlay experience is app-based, compatible with Fire Stick, Smart TVs, and SkyPlay’s own 4K box. Their Smart Home Manager app allows users to monitor Wi-Fi usage, set parental controls, prioritize devices, and manage screen time.

Key Benefits

All-in-one broadband + IPTV + OTT plans starting from ₹399/month

No installation cost for app-only use; refundable deposit for devices

Pan-India availability across states like Tamil Nadu, Delhi NCR, Telangana, Karnataka, Punjab, and more

24/7 customer support with reliable service uptime

Company Info
SkyPlay is powered by SkyLink Fibernet, based in Coimbatore. Launched in 2025 under SKYPLAY IPTV Services Pvt. Ltd., the company is quickly expanding its footprint with over 1 million activations and 500+ regional partners.

Conclusion
SkyPlay stands out as an all-in-one digital service provider that blends high-speed connectivity, live TV, and OTT streaming into a smart, affordable solution—perfect for Indian households looking to simplify their home entertainment setup.

Name: Blue Women Africa
Description:
Why Blue Women Africa?
Women play an indispensable role in the blue economy, from artisanal fishing to marine research, and from technological innovation to environmental conservation. Yet, they are often underrepresented and lack recognition and support. Blue Women Africa aims to bridge this gap by providing a platform dedicated to their achievements and needs.
Blue Women Africa is thus a platform dedicated to celebrating, supporting, and amplifying the voices of women who shape the blue economy in Africa. Our mission is to highlight the vital contributions of women in this crucial sector while promoting women's empowerment, gender equality, and sustainable development.
We aim to support the initiatives of various associations across the continent by becoming the leading media platform, advocating for a future where women are recognized and respected leaders in the sustainable management of our oceans and marine resources

-------

Pourquoi Blue Women Africa ?
Les femmes jouent un rôle indispensable dans l'économie bleue, de la pêche artisanale à la recherche marine, en passant par l'innovation technologique et la conservation environnementale. Pourtant, elles sont souvent sous-représentées et manquent de reconnaissance et de soutien. Blue Women Africa vise à combler cette lacune en offrant une plateforme dédiée à leurs réalisations et à leurs besoins.
Blue Women Africa est donc une plateforme dédiée à célébrer, soutenir et amplifier la voix des femmes qui façonnent l'économie bleue en Afrique. Notre mission est de mettre en lumière les contributions vitales des femmes dans ce secteur crucial, tout en promouvant l’autonomisation des femmes, l'égalité des sexes et le développement durable.
Nous voulons accompagner les initiatives des diverses associations du continent, en devenant le média de référence, pour promouvoir un avenir où les femmes sont des leaders reconnues et respectées dans la gestion durable de nos océans et de nos ressources marines.
