Description:
𝐂𝐎𝐔𝐏 𝐃𝐄 𝐆𝐔𝐄𝐔𝐋𝐄: 

On en a marre de lire des posts superficiels sous latex qui racontent de fausses success stories où l'entrepreneuriat est vu comme le nirvana, sans problème. Tout le monde est riche, en bonne santé, se dorant la pilule sur une île paradisiaque. 

Spoiler alert? Y'a jamais eu autant de burn out chez les entrepreneurs. 

On a donc créé 𝐂𝐡𝐮𝐭.

Ici on parle de tout ce que l'on ne vous dit pas sur 𝐥'𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐑𝐄𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐍𝐄𝐔𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐓. 

Toute la vérité, que des vérités, et des retours d'expériences de +300 entrepreneurs qui vont sûrement te parler et te faire sens.  

Avec passion, humour, authenticité, nous sommes persuadés qu'il faut aussi parler des sujets qui fâchent et dont on ne parle pas beaucoup en ligne. Et t'inquiète pas toi qui nous lis: tu n'es pas seul à vivre des galères.  

Nos posts vont t'aider à déculpabiliser de ne PAS FAIRE 50k€ par mois en passif en bossant 10min par jour.  

Nos posts seront une bouffée d'air de savoir que t'es PAS LE SEUL à faire des insomnies à rallonge avec ce cerveau qui ne s'arrête jamais de penser !

Nos posts vont sûrement raconter ce que tu vis ou a vécu: ni plus ni moins. Mais CHUT. Faut pas le dire. 

ATTENTION   

Chut. n'est pas là pour tirer des coups de canon sur l'entrepreneuriat. 

𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐫𝐞 𝐨𝐛𝐣𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐟 ? 

CHANGER les mentalités et EDUQUER au mieux sur les dérives et les risques de l'entrepreneuriat (tout en gardant les immenses bienfaits et aspects positifs !). 

ANTICIPER les milliers de burn out que les entrepreneurs subissent chaque année car "𝑖𝑙𝑠 𝑠𝑒 𝑠𝑜𝑛𝑡 𝑐𝑟𝑎𝑚𝑒́𝑠" à croire que bosser 90h/semaine sans se payer est un passage obligé. 

PRENDRE CONSCIENCE que les réseaux sociaux ne sont PAS la réalité de ce que vivent les gens, les patrons, les entrepreneurs, les solopreneurs. 

Bref: t'es pas nul. Lis nos posts, tu verras: 𝐜̧𝐚 𝐟𝐚𝐢𝐭 𝐝𝐮 𝐛𝐢𝐞𝐧. 

Si toi aussi tu es un CHUT. qui a des choses à raconter: contacte nous en mp ! Cœur sur toi.

Name: CSN GmbH
Description:
Wie oft erreichen Ihre Botschaften wirklich die Teilnehmer?

Leider geht das häufig schief.

Webinare in der Finanz- und Versicherungsbranche sind oft austauschbar, uninspirierend und wirken wie Pflichtveranstaltungen.
Die Folgen? Sinkende Teilnehmerzahlen, geringes Engagement und schlechte Lerneffekte.
So wird aus geplantem Erfolg schnell ein Imageschaden.
Das Problem: Die meisten Tools sind für den Massenmarkt gemacht und passen nicht zu den spezifischen Anforderungen der Finanz- und Versicherungsbranche.
Vielleicht kennen Sie die Probleme:
 Geringe Reichweite: Sie erreichen die Teilnehmer nicht effektiv.
 Hohe Konkurrenz: Ihre Events heben sich nicht von der Masse ab.
 Kein Erfolg: Ihre Inhalte kommen nicht an, der Umsatz bleibt unverändert.
 Hoher Aufwand: Manuelle Nachbereitung (z.B. IDD-Schulungen) kostet Zeit und Nerven.
Mit Standardlösungen riskieren Sie Ihren Ruf und den Ihres Unternehmens.
Dabei sind Webinare ein wirksames Mittel, um Menschen für Ihre Inhalte zu begeistern.
Sie erreichen Ihre Teilnehmer persönlich, interagieren mit ihnen und zeigen, dass sie Ihnen wichtig sind.
Richtig gemacht, wird sich das deutlich auf Umsatz oder Anlagevolumen auswirken.
Deshalb machen wir es anders.
Unsere Plattform ist nicht 08/15, sondern wurde speziell für Sie entwickelt.
Seit über 20 Jahren sind wir Partner der Branche und wissen, worauf es ankommt.
6 der 10 größten deutschen Versicherer und 3 der 5 führenden Asset Manager setzen auf uns.
Warum?
 Effektive Teilnehmerbindung: Sie erreichen Ihre Zielgruppe nachhaltig.
 Exklusive Events: Heben Sie sich mit professionellen Erlebnissen ab.
 Messbarer Erfolg: Ihre Botschaften wirken – sichtbar in Zufriedenheit und Ergebnissen.
 Automatisierte Prozesse: Zertifikate und Nachbereitung sind kinderleicht.
Das Ergebnis? Webinare, die Wirkung zeigen und Umsatz bringen – ohne Stress.
Bereit für Webinare, die wirklich überzeugen?
Buchen Sie jetzt eine Demo und erleben Sie den Unterschied.

Name: Climática
Description:
Climática empezó siendo lo que suelen ser las noticias de cambio climático: una sección en un medio. En nuestro caso, en La Marea.

Tras varios años publicando con regularidad noticias y análisis sobre esta temática, MásPúblico, la cooperativa que edita esta revista desde 2012, decidió crear un espacio específico dedicado al clima en 2019.

Así fue cómo Climática se convirtió en el primer medio español especializado en cambio climático. En 2023, dimos un nuevo paso y comenzamos a informar regularmente sobre la crisis de biodiversidad.

En la actualidad, publicamos artículos, análisis y reportajes en profundidad de temáticas muy distintas, pero todos ellos con un elemento común: siempre están en sintonía con la ciencia.
Vivimos un momento histórico en el que la civilización humana se enfrenta a una crisis climática y ambiental sin precedentes. La subida de temperaturas y sus efectos amenazan la vida, las estructuras y los tejidos sociales en todos los rincones del mundo.

La crisis climática afecta antes y con mayor intensidad a quienes tienen menos recursos. Al Sur global. A las personas migrantes. A las mujeres. A los barrios obreros. Al mismo tiempo, quienes son más responsables del calentamiento global, las empresas y Estados que se han enriquecido y se enriquecen gracias al modelo que lo causa, pueden adaptarse mejor a sus consecuencias.

En Climática entendemos que solo desde la independencia podemos realizar un análisis verdaderamente crítico de las causas y las consecuencias del cambio climático. Por eso rechazamos la publicidad de las empresas e instituciones que no cumplen nuestro código ético.

Name: Meaningful Impact
Description:
Through our awards program and podcast, Meaningful Impact recognizes projects which benefit both a company and the greater good.

For example, award-eligible projects include: product marketing that also supports a cause; sustainability initiatives that also reduce costs; advocacy campaigns that also attract new customers; strategic philanthropy which also boosts reputation; as well as employee inclusion and volunteer programs that also boost retention.

In fact, to inspire the greatest good, any kind of corporate responsibility is eligible for a Meaningful Impact Award if the project achieves a win-win… win:
1. a mission win for a cause
2. a financial win for the company
3. a self-fulfillment win for the project-team leaders, personally or professionally

If you're responsible for marketing or PR at your company, or if you help clients manage their reputation, you’ll especially appreciate the publicist-friendly features of the Meaningful Impact Awards.

Unlike annual award competitions which consider nominations just once per year, nominations for Meaningful Impact Awards are typically reviewed within two weeks. So, you can submit an award nomination today and potentially win soon. There’s even an expedited-review option available, if you've got an imperative to announce good news within a few days.

Optional publicity add-ons are also available, making it easy to promote your win via sponsored content at partner publications, such as CSR.org. 

Visit MeaningfulImpact.com/PR for more information on the publicity options.

When you apply for a Meaningful Impact Award, the first step is to select your nominated project and its award recipients.

Nominations are accepted on behalf of:
• individuals
• project teams
• companies
• trade associations

If your nominee does win a Meaningful Impact Award, the recognition will be conferred in one of three award tiers:  Goodwill, Leadership, or Paragon.  

Download the Entry Kit & Success Guide at MeaningfulImpact.com/Kit

Por meio de música, testemunhos, reflexão, cultura e temas atuais, buscamos comunicar a fé de forma acessível, dinâmica e profundamente humana.

Nosso conteúdo é voltado para jovens, adultos, famílias, educadores da fé e todos que desejam fortalecer sua caminhada cristã com leveza, verdade e entusiasmo. Acreditamos que a juventude é uma fase da alma — e que todos podem viver com o coração jovem quando estão com Deus.

Mais do que um programa, somos uma ponte entre gerações, unidas pelo Evangelho e pelo desejo de transformar o mundo com amor e esperança.

Transmissão: (adicione o canal/plataforma, dia e horário)
Público-alvo: Todas as idades — com linguagem jovem, acolhedora e evangelizadora.
Missão: Evangelizar com alegria, formar com profundidade, unir gerações pela fé

Name: Live Greatly
Description:
Kristel Bauer is a Keynote Speaker, Corporate Wellness Expert and TEDx speaker with a mission of supporting companies and individuals on their journeys for more happiness, success & well-being. With Kristel's unique background in healthcare, Integrative Psychiatry, business and media, she provides invaluable insights and strategies to empower, inspire and motivate companies, leadership and sales teams as well as other groups and organizations.  Kristel shares key insights into high power habits, leadership development, mental well-being, peak performance, resilience, success & a modern approach to work/life balance. Using a blend of authenticity, Psychology & Science, Kristel provides insights to excel in sales and thrive as a team leader. Kristel's messaging supports company profitability while promoting vibrant company cultures with healthier and happier employees

Kristel is the creator and host of her global top 1% self-improvement podcast, Live Greatly, where she talks with the top minds about business, happiness, mindset, success and wellness.  Kristel is a contributing writer for Entrepreneur and she is an influencer in the business and wellness space having been recognized as a Top 10 Social Media Influencer of 2021 in Forbes.  As an Integrative Medicine Fellow & Physician Assistant, Kristel has a unique perspective into optimizing well-being and achieving success. Some companies and universities that have booked Kristel to speak include Bank of America, General Mills, Northwestern University, Quest Mindshare, Commercial Metals Company, Trelleborg Sealing Solutions, NAWBO & Rosalind Franklin University of Medicine and Science. Kristel has been featured in Forbes, Forest & Bluff Magazine & Podcast Magazine and she has contributed to Real Leaders Magazine. Kristel has been live on ABC 7 Chicago, WGN Daytime Chicago & Ticker News.

To book Kristel to speak at your next event or to view her speaking & media reels visit www.livegreatly.co

Name: Mujeres del Mar
Description:
Mujeres del Mar es más que un proyecto; es una misión, una pasión y una comunidad. Nacido de la inspiración y el deseo de dar voz a las mujeres de todo el mundo que dedican su vida al océano, este espacio busca ser un punto de encuentro.

Historias que Inspiran: En Mujeres del Mar, compartimos relatos y vivencias de mujeres extraordinarias que, día a día, enfrentan retos, celebran triunfos y trabajan incansablemente por el bienestar de nuestros océanos. Cada historia es un recordatorio de la fuerza, determinación y pasión que caracterizan a las mujeres de esta comunidad.

Una Red de Colaboración: Pero más allá de contar historias, aspiramos a construir una red sólida de mujeres dispuestas a colaborar, compartir experiencias y conocimientos, y apoyarse mutuamente. Porque juntas, somos una marea imparable.

Recursos para el Cambio: Sabemos que el camino hacia la conservación del océano y el empoderamiento femenino no es fácil. Por eso, en Mujeres del Mar, también encontrarás una variedad de recursos pensados para ayudarte a potenciar tu carrera profesional y a tomar acciones concretas para proteger nuestros mares.

Mujeres del Mar es, en esencia, un llamado a la acción. Una invitación a todas las mujeres, ya sean científicas, pescadoras, activistas, estudiantes o simplemente amantes del mar, a unirse y trabajar juntas por un futuro más justo y un océano más sano.

Porque somos mujeres. Somos océano. Somos cambio.

Description:
PressPlay 為台灣第一家全方位影響力經濟集團，自2016年成立至今以將影響力價值極大化及善用影響力創造各種新的商業可能經營事業版圖，環繞人們的生活從360度各角度出發，打造各領域的影響力價值：
「娛樂」影響力價值，不僅有創作者經紀、廣告，還有團購、聯名等全面向發展。
「品牌」影響力價值，從食品出發跨足家庭及女性生活，與創作者共同打造更貼近新世代需求的產品品牌。 「知識」影響力價值，與創作者共同放大知識影響力，不僅僅是推出多元領域、多元學習形式，更是一同建立創作者的知識影響力品牌。
秉持「活在變化，創造變化，成為變化」的精神，攜手創作者用影響力顛覆產業。
「PressPlay核心使命」：讓影響力更好地為人群服務 
PressPlay關注現在也放眼未來，一直致力於讓新世代有價值的內容發揮影響力，在各領域創造價值極大化，為創作者打造360度的影響力生態圈。 PressPlay與創作者們一同努力，持續創造人們每天不可或缺的娛樂、知識與衣食等生活內容，融入人們的生活，以期讓影響力更好地為人群服務。

Our Mission 
Provide the best-in-class service for individuals with influence to create value for their community

Who we are
PressPlay is the first all-around business solution media company for content creators.

Since 2016, PressPlay has been investing and servicing the creator economy with the mission to “Maximize the value of influence” and “Utilize influence to innovate on new business opportunities”. 

We take a human-centered approach to help creators across all genres create and extend the value of their influence. 

Capturing the value of “Entertainment” stretches beyond talent management, brand sponsorship, but also launching group deals and co-branding opportunities  

Building “Brand” by co-creating new products with creators that meet the needs of next generation consumers across food, house appliances, and beauty products. 

Scaling “Knowledge” by providing a broad range of tools and services to enable subject-matter experts to launch e-courses, membership subscription, and audiobooks to educate and entertain their users. 

PressPlay “lives in changes, creates changes, and leads changes” to disrupt the industry by working hand in hand with creators to capture the full value of their influence.

Timely Updates: Access breaking news and developments in workplace health and safety.

Expert Resources: Explore articles, case studies, and practical guides written by industry leaders.

Community Engagement: Share best practices, discuss challenges, and connect with peers through our interactive features.

Comprehensive Data: Stay ahead with access to the most up-to-date statistics, regulations, and trends.

Whether you're looking to stay informed on industry changes, enhance your professional knowledge, or connect with like-minded professionals, National Safety Online is your go-to resource. Together, we’re building a safer, healthier future for workplaces across Australia.

A Intellinet Conectividade Inteligente foi criada para facilitar a transformação digital e a jornada de inovação nas corporações, trazendo a experiência de mais de 30 anos em ambientes desafiadores que estão constantemente mudando e gerando demandas desafiadoras em um mundo que nunca esteve tão cheio de oportunidades, e o nosso objetivo é, junto a você, poder capturá-las.

Nosso compromisso é com o bom desempenho e o aprimoramento contínuo organização, ajudando-a a percorrer os caminhos e desafios da economia digital. Juntamente com nossos parceiros e clientes, ajudamos a criar soluções que contribuem para que as empresas realizem todo o seu potencial digital. 

Com experiência técnica de nível mundial, os serviços de consultoria e implementação da Intellinet ajudam você a alcançar o valor máximo em tecnologia, dados e operações para acelerar sua transformação digital. Nossos consultores altamente experientes têm o suporte de ferramentas, arquiteturas, roteiros e aceleradores desenvolvidos ao longo dos anos de experiência ajudando centenas de cliente na América Latina e Oriente Médio.

Acelere sua agenda de negócios e repense sua estratégia de transformação, aproveitando a automação inteligente, análises avançadas, tecnologias modernas e novas maneiras de trabalhar para melhorar a agilidade e a experiência do usuário final. Vamos criar juntos modelos para reduzir custos e complexidade, trazendo benefícios aos seus negócios, à sua operação e ao seu propósito.

A Intellinet ajuda a expandir seus negócios com uma estratégia reformulada, que abrange pessoas, processos e tecnologia. Incorpore governança e valor de negócios em sua seleção de tecnologia e operações.

Description:
Somos una empresa venezolana con más de 20 años de experiencia en la industria del entretenimiento móvil, que ha sido capaz de reinventarse a la velocidad de la transformación digital para conectar necesidades con soluciones tecnológicas. 

Saber adaptarse, no ser arrogante y estar preparados ha sido la norma para lograr desarrollos vanguardistas que van desde servicios basados en mensajería de texto, hasta complejas soluciones móviles. El cliente y sus necesidades son el centro de nuestra operación.

Name: Spa de Beauté
Description:
Spa de Beauté est le média de référence pour les décideurs Spa, Beauté, Bien-être et Santé. Actualités, innovations, soins, thermalisme, management, gestion… Spa de Beauté vous accompagne pour vous apporter des solutions à vos besoins pour votre réussite. 

Spa de Beauté organise « Le Village Spa », un espace dédié aux professionnels du spa au cœur du « Congrès International Esthétique & Spa » qui se tient tous les ans à Paris, Porte de Versailles, Hall 5. Vous y découvrirez tout ce qui fera le spa de demain… pour vous différencier et vous inspirer ! 

En complément de l’exposition des marques phares du secteur, le Village Spa organise des Trophées et des Concours prestigieux, comme le Trophée du Meilleur Soin Signature Spa et le Concours du Meilleur Spa Praticien Corps et Visage. Des conférences ultra-pratiques et non publicitaires seront également proposées, avec des tables rondes réunissant des experts de terrain. 

Pour lire Spa de Beauté, découvrir le Village Spa ou vous abonner au magazine, rendez-vous ici : www.spa-de-beaute.fr

Name: Discover Sport
Description:
Our Passion for Sport

Here at Discover Sport, our passion for sports is what drives us. We live for the thrill of a buzzer-beater, the intensity of a last-minute goal, and the magic of a perfect game. Sports aren’t just about winning or losing - they’re about the stories, the struggles, and the triumphs that inspire us all.

Connecting Brands and Athletes

We believe in the power of collaboration. Discover Sport serves as a bridge, connecting top brands with sports talents who embody their values and vision. By spotlighting promising athletes, we help them gain the support they need to further their careers. Whether it's through sponsorship deals, exclusive content, or special fan experiences, these collaborations open new doors for athletes and bring exciting opportunities to the sports community.

Giving Everyone a Platform

At Discover Sport, we’re committed to showcasing the full spectrum of sports. We believe every sport deserves its moment in the spotlight, and every athlete should have a platform to shine. From the well-known to the underrepresented, we celebrate the diversity of sports and give a voice to athletes and fans from all corners of the sports world.

Our team is a mix of sports nuts and media pros who are dedicated to bringing you new ways to make your experience more exciting and immersive.

Join the Team

We invite you to be part of our ever-growing community. At Discover Sport, every fan has a front-row seat, and every athlete has a stage. Together, let’s celebrate the spirit, the drama, and the joy of sports.

Name: KaucjaNews
Description:
KaucjaNews.pl – Twoje źródło wiedzy o systemie kaucyjnym w Polsce i Europie 

KaucjaNews.pl to pierwszy w Polsce specjalistyczny portal w całości poświęcony systemowi kaucyjnemu oraz zagadnieniom związanym z gospodarką odpadami opakowaniowymi. Powstał z potrzeby rzetelnego, profesjonalnego informowania o rynku, który znajduje się na progu ogromnej transformacji — wdrożenia ogólnokrajowego systemu kaucyjnego.

Na łamach portalu publikujemy:

 Najnowsze raporty branżowe, analizy i dane rynkowe
 Eksperckie komentarze, opinie oraz wywiady
 Przegląd aktualności legislacyjnych z Polski i Unii Europejskiej
 Praktyczne case studies z innych krajów
 Informacje dotyczące gospodarki obiegu zamkniętego (GOZ)

KaucjaNews.pl to przestrzeń dialogu między biznesem, administracją publiczną i społeczeństwem obywatelskim. Pokazujemy, jak system kaucyjny może przyczynić się do zwiększenia poziomu recyklingu, ograniczenia zaśmiecenia przestrzeni publicznej i realnego rozwoju GOZ w Polsce.

 Partnerzy merytoryczni i eksperci:
 Partner merytoryczny: Reloop Platform
 Ekspertyza prawna: Wolf Theiss
 Partner społeczny: Cycling-Recycling.pl

 Interesuje Cię, jak system kaucyjny wpłynie na Twój biznes lub otoczenie?
 Szukasz rzetelnych danych i analiz?
 Chcesz być częścią odpowiedzialnej transformacji odpadowej?

 Zajrzyj na www.kaucjanews.pl
 Dołącz do naszej społeczności — razem budujemy bardziej zrównoważoną przyszłość!

Bij FourVision geloven we in de kracht van samenwerking en het delen van kennis. Ons platform is ontworpen om u te helpen uw zakelijke doelen te bereiken door middel van gerichte leads en waardevolle inzichten. Name: Corporación Voz de Galicia
Description:
Desarrollada a partir del notable despegue materializado por La Voz de Galicia en las últimas décadas del siglo XX, la Corporación Voz –presidida por Lois Blanco Penas– domina hoy todos los campos de la comunicación con una amplia diversificación, basada en una línea editorial que se fija en la pluralidad, el equilibrio y la objetividad.

La división de prensa está formada por La Voz de Galicia, diario líder en la comunidad gallega y tercero a nivel nacional, y el digital La Voz de Asturias. En la división de radio, la Corporación apuesta por la cercanía al oyente a través de las emisoras de RadioVoz. Por su parte, Voz Audiovisual se ha consolidado como una de las productoras más activas en el panorama audiovisual gallego. Mientras, la empresa de demoscopia Sondaxe analiza la realidad social a través de encuestas, estudios de mercado y demás investigaciones sociológicas.

La Corporación también incorpora además a otras empresas de servicios como Distribuidora Gallega de Publicaciones y Galicia Editorial, la planta de impresión con mayor capacidad de la comunidad donde se imprime La Voz de Galicia así como otros productos editoriales.

We also have national experience in creative museum projects including the College Football Hall of Fame, California Academy of Sciences, The Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation, the Smithsonian Institution, the Walt Disney Family Museum, the Old Faithful visitor center in Yellowstone, Texas A&M Alumni Center, and the Las Vegas Springs Preserve.

By using a variety of multifaceted digital platforms ParisianVibe discovers unique voices to tell authentic stories to their audience. covering fashion, beauty, interior décor, and lifestyle, centred around Paris and the culture this French capital emulates.
 
By breaking the boundaries PV focuses on the audience and provides consistent, original content which includes short-form videos and dedicated series — bringing you a piece of Paris, wherever you are. PV dives deep into the essence of being a Parisian, however, you don’t have to be from Paris to apply these lessons. These are important for today’s fast-paced society as PV brings it back to basics. They story-tell timeless and minimal lifestyles which, when done correctly, are sustainable for all.

Name: Le Monde Décrypté
Description:
« Il y a naturellement plusieurs façons de regarder le monde. Celle que je propose est de donner une priorité absolue aux faits.
Le monde du XXIème siècle est porteur d’une empreinte géopolitique spécifique. Nous ne sommes plus dans l’affrontement d’un pays contre un autre, ou d’une alliance contre une autre, mais dans un système mondial « d’arcs de crises » simultanées.

Nous les vivons en Mer de Chine, ou tout le long de la frontière russe, dans le Moyen-Orient et à travers la longue bande Saharo- Sahélienne. 
Il faut donc savoir identifier, assembler, comparer.

Partager ces faits « pertinents » pour les faire mieux comprendre, cette conviction m’a conduit à l’écriture… »

Fondateur du média web Le Monde Décrypté, analyste en géopolitique, chercheur associé à la Fondation pour l'Etude du Moyen-Orient, Gérard Vespierre analyse la géopolitique différemment.  

Découvrez les dernières publications de Gérard Vespierre en vous abonnant au Monde Décrypté !

Lancé en juin 2019, le collectif Focus est né d'une volonté commune : pratiquer un journalisme de terrain, qui prend le temps de l’enquête et de la rencontre.

Résolument multimédia, notre collectif est une force. À la plume ou derrière l'objectif, micro levé, oreille tendue, nous partageons nos savoirs-faire au service de différents formats : investigation, podcasts, résidences au cœur des territoires, écriture de livres et de films documentaire. 

Notre journalisme est un travail de patience qui appréhende les finesses et les failles de nos sujets, éclaire différentes réalités. Du no man's land ukrainien aux cités ouvrières du Pas-de-Calais, dans la jungle cambodgienne, les villes rebelles du Kurdistan ou le long des trottoirs parisiens : chercheur.se.s d’histoires, nous passons l’actualité au tamis pour changer d’angle de vue. Déplacer la focale.

Name: Curso de Periodismo de Alcañiz
Description:
La salud mental es uno de los grandes temas de nuestro tiempo. Y también uno de los más difíciles de contar. Hablamos de pantallas, estrés, soledad, ansiedad, suicidio, desigualdades, violencia… pero ¿cómo lo hacemos?, ¿con qué palabras?, ¿Desde dónde y con quién?

El VII Curso Nacional de Periodismo Especializado de Alcañiz, que se celebrará los días 15 y 16 de septiembre de 2025, pone el foco en una necesidad urgente: comunicar la salud mental con responsabilidad, sensibilidad y rigor. Un reto que no solo compete a periodistas y comunicadores, sino también a docentes, profesionales sanitarios, psicólogos, estudiantes, entidades sociales y ciudadanía. Porque la salud mental, de un modo u otro, nos atraviesa a todos.

Durante dos días, Alcañiz se convertirá en un espacio 
La comunicación sobre temas ligados a la ciencia es uno de los principales retos de periodistas y divulgadores. Para dar respuesta a cómo crear contenidos atractivos y rigurosos se reunirán en Alcañiz profesionales de reconocido prestigio a nivel nacional e internacional en la quinta edición de esta cita, que ya se ha convertido en referente nacional y que supone una atractiva propuesta puente entre el final del verano y el inicio del curso. 

Televisión, radio, diarios digitales y en papel, podcast, redes sociales, ensayos, monólogos, instituciones y museos, empresas, ¿Cómo se comunica la ciencia? Durante veinte horas los asistentes entrarán en contacto estrecho con los ponentes desde la cercanía que ofrece la capital bajoaragonesa. El currículum de todos los participantes es un aval indiscutible y su compromiso para participar en esta cita, una muestra clara de vocación por una profesión que día a día construye la opinión crítica, la reflexión, el conocimiento y el entretenimiento de nuestra sociedad.

El curso ‘Comunicación y ciencia. Los divulgadores esenciales’ está abierto a profesionales, estudiantes e interesados en comunicar un amplio abanico de temas que abarca la propia área científica.

Name: Reframing You
Description:
Reframing you is a non profit initiative that focuses on providing a FREE platform for people to communicate with experts in all fields from all around the world because not everybody has the privilege to do so. It prioritizes the benefit of people, mental health problems and for upcoming/well known artists to express themselves and talk about their journey and advise people who are interested in their field. Reframing you divides its focus into two parts:
1) Artists- The exploration of any form or types of artists such as- musicians, writers, photographers, filmmakers, models, painters, graphic designs, tattoo artists, hair stylists, directors, producers, art critics, content makers, bloggers, illustrators, sculptors, make up artists, and other craftsmen.
2) Mental Health- The other section focuses on therapists, experts, survivors, and victims and people diagnosed with Cluster B personality disorders and deficiency disorders- mainly Narcissistic personality disorder, borderline personality disorder, antisocial personality disorder, histrionic personality disorder, ADHD, Autism, OCD and Anxiety accompanied by severe mental health problems such as depression. It also focuses on helping codependency, people pleasing as well and PTSD( post traumatic stress disorder) AND CPTSD (complex post traumatic stress disorder) to help break generational patterns and cycles of abuse )

Name: Citiznz
Description:
Citiznz (launching in July at Citiznz.com) is Subscriber-Controlled News Media.

Our mission is to help our readers, and the world, to rediscover common ground – through honesty in news coverage and mutual respect.

Citiznz communities can define and express themselves, as well as determine their own membership, in any way they like.

A community may be as simple as a few beer enthusiasts that like to get together to compare IBUs on a Friday night.

However, it is the conversations themselves that are the most important to us. Beer or no beer.

As a society, we seem to have a lot of trouble these days talking to each other: particularly when we are coming from very different viewpoints.

But surely, if there is any one thing that characterizes a healthy society, it is that people within them tend to engage in an overflow of meaningful conversations. Whether the talk is about big problems, small problems, or if people are just being human together, society requires communication. Open, honest communication.

We can hardly begin to even think about how to make things better in our institutions, our culture, and our own lives if we avoid or simply don’t mention problems.

To make things better, we have to talk about them.

Name: Sabores de Mexico y el Mundo
Description:
Amantes de la gastronomía,viajeros incansables, paladares mexicano en busca de sabores y aromas del mundo

Buscamos los sabores de México en cada rincón del mundo, los mejores lugares donde comer, viajar y disfrutar excelentes bebidas y experiencias alrededor de la gastronomía. 

Los Sabores de México y el mundo ofrece la oportunidad de volver a experimentar con los cinco sentidos, recorrer lugares mágicos y consentirse en los espacios más bellos del planeta.

En Los Sabores de México y el mundo creemos que la verdadera forma de experimentar México es directamente a través de sus platillos, su gente, su historia y directo en el lugar de origen.

Como apasionados que somos de la gastronomía, queremos compartir con el mundo entero la inolvidable experiencia que se convierte cada país al coexistir con su cultura y sus sabores. Como amantes de la gastronomía, los descubrimientos de sabores, aromas y colores de otras culturas culinarias forma parte de las vivencias que nos enriquecen y nos gusta compartir con quienes nos leen y siguen paso a paso creando inspiraciones de viajes y experiencias.

Estamos en la búsqueda de los ingredientes, platillos y sabores de México que se encuentran en todos los rincones del mundo y hoy son inspiración de chefs y cocineros para sus creaciones y la fascinación de los consumidores. Las influencias y enriquecimiento de la cocina mexicana en ingredientes y tradiciones culinarias de otros países y culturas a han llevado a ser hoy una de la mas ricas del mundo y a los mexicanos tener de los paladares más diversos.

Name: Kinda Cool Magazine
Description:
Kinda Cool Magazine started with a pure love for music and popular culture. We strive to create a positive environment that showcases the abilities of both performing artists and hard workers behind the scenes of the industry.

Under three general guidelines, Kinda Cool is able to exist. Number one — genre is not binary. In a media-based world, it’s impossible to encapsulate the incredulity of music within small categories. At KCM, genre does not exist. We refuse to limit our contributor’s coverage opportunities by the genre of the artists they’re interested in, and we hope to satisfy a larger group of music fans with our boundless coverage.

Rule number two — youth have the most powerful voices in society today. They are the future of the music industry and the world. Regardless of age, we want to hear what’s on your mind if you’ve got something to say. Our goal is to stop silencing the voices of today’s youth, and instead provide a platform to the game changers of this generation.

The final guideline is that the future is female. In a male-dominated industry, we are so proud of our entirely female team for going above and beyond in everything they do. By providing this platform to strong, motivated women in the music scene, we hope to play a role in moving towards a primarily female future of this industry.

 Between forming in Canada, being designed and distributed in the USA, and including contributors based as far away as the UK and Russia, KCM features voices from multiple backgrounds and cultures. We truly believe we’ve created an environment where it is possible to support each other endlessly, no matter our differences, and in turn, begin to break the mold of traditional music journalism. We are very proud to work with a group of talented, motivated creatives. We will always believe in lifting up those who have something to say, providing them with a platform to do so, and creating media that is fresh and unseen.

Amacımız, müşterilerimizin hedeflerini anlamak ve onların özgün kimliklerini yansıtan etkileyici ve özgün içerikler oluşturmaktır. Yaratıcı tasarım becerilerimizle, markaların görsel olarak çarpıcı bir şekilde öne çıkmasını sağlıyoruz. Sosyal medya platformlarında, markaların hedef kitleleriyle daha yakın ve etkileşimli bir iletişim kurmalarını sağlayarak, güçlü bir marka varlığı oluşturmalarına yardımcı oluyoruz.

Müşterilerimizle yakın bir işbirliği içinde çalışıyoruz ve onların ihtiyaçlarını anlayarak özelleştirilmiş çözümler sunuyoruz. Yaratıcılığı ve teknolojiyi bir araya getirerek, müşterilerimizin dijital dünyada fark yaratmalarına katkıda bulunuyoruz.

Nova Dijital Medya olarak, dürüstlük, profesyonellik ve mükemmeliyetçilik ilkelerine bağlıyız. Müşterilerimize değer veriyor ve onlarla uzun vadeli ilişkiler kurmayı hedefliyoruz. Her projede kaliteyi ve sonuçları önceliğimiz olarak kabul ediyoruz.

Misyonumuz, müşterilerimizin dijital medyadaki rekabetçi ortamda öne çıkmasına yardımcı olarak başarılarını artırmaktır. Nova Dijital Medya olarak, müşterilerimizin hedeflerini gerçekleştirmek için yaratıcı, stratejik ve özgün çözümler sunmaya devam edeceğiz.

Name: Lebanon Files
Description:
Lebanonfiles was founded in 2006 by a group of young Lebanese journalists. www.lebanonfiles.com was the second website to be launched in Lebanon. 
With the launched of Lebanonfiles, a new era in the Lebanese journalism media started. Online News in Lebanon.
Lebanonfiles receives over 130000 visitors every day and nearly 1.2 million page views. The site is updated around the clock, 24 hours a day, and contains numerous parts such as a breaking news bar for local, regional, and international news, 5-10 editorials per day, and covers approximately 1100 stories per 24 hours.
The Lebanese News are divided into several sections: 
•	"Hadath حدث" which includes more than one editorial/article daily about Lebanese politics, 
•	"Khas خاص " which is a political investigative section with more than one editorial/article daily, 
•	"mitl ma hieh متل ما هي ," which sheds light on a social topic daily, 
•	"bi aklamihim بأقلامهم " which is a section for specialists in various fields writing editorial/article about salient social, health, or political topics, 
•	“Marsad مرصد  and Kawalis" كواليس  sections are political and entertainment secrets that have been uncovered through intelligence and investigation.
Lebanonfiles covers all Lebanon political local news as well as, regional and international news covered in "iklimi dawli إقليمي دولي" section. 
In addition to other sections, such as: 
•	“Entertainment and Media”, which covers all news about arts and artists, media, and journalists, 
•	“Economy” News, 
•	“Sports” News, 
•	“Civil society” News, 
•	“Video entertainment” News section with proprietary video productions, and a photo album.

Lebanonfiles employs more than 35 journalists and technicians.

Name: ଚାଷୀ ସଂଳାପ - Chasi Sanglapa - KV Dialogue
Description:
ଚାଷୀ ସଂଳାପ | Chasi Sanglapa – KV Dialogue
“I’m Ready to Drive Meaningful Change!”

ଚାଷୀ ସଂଳାପ (Chasi Sanglapa) is the Odia edition of the widely acclaimed KV Dialogue – KhetiValah Dialogues (AgriTalks) — a unique platform dedicated to promoting agriculture, rural development, and the upliftment of farmers.

ଆମ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିକୋଣ | Our Vision:

"କୃଷିର କଥା, ଚାଷୀଙ୍କର ଭାଷାରେ" — Let agriculture be discussed in the farmer’s own language.

This initiative is built on the belief that real change begins when farmers are heard, respected, and empowered in their own cultural and linguistic context.

ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ | Our Purpose: 
Chasi Sanglapa aims to connect traditional agricultural wisdom with modern innovations, encouraging open and inspiring discussions among:

ଚାଷୀ (Farmers)
କୃଷି ଉଦ୍ୟମୀ (Agri-entrepreneurs)
ନୀତି ନିର୍ମାତା (Policymakers)
ନବପ୍ରବର୍ତ୍ତକ (Innovators)
ଗ୍ରାମୀଣ ସମୁଦାୟ (Rural Communities)

Through inspiring dialogues and expert insights, this platform helps create a space for learning, sharing, and collaboration across Odisha and beyond.

ମୁଖ୍ୟ ବିଷୟବସ୍ତୁ | Key Focus Areas:
 ସସ୍ୟ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥାପନା ଓ ଟିକେଇଥିବା କୃଷି ପ୍ରଥା (Sustainable Farming Practices)
 ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତିତ ପାଣିପାଗ ପାଇଁ ଅନୁକୂଳ କୃଷି (Climate-Resilient Agriculture)
 କୃଷି ତନ୍ତ୍ରଜ୍ଞାନ ଓ ନବିନତା (Agri-Tech & Innovation)
 ସରକାରୀ ଯୋଜନା ଓ ନୀତିମାନ୍ୟ (Government Schemes & Policies)
 ଜୈବ କୃଷି, ବଜାର ଯୋଗାଯୋଗ ଓ ଅନ୍ୟାନ୍ୟ (Organic Farming, Market Linkages & More)

Each ଚାଷୀ ସଂଳାପ episode is designed to give voice to the farming community, celebrate their stories, and spark ଜ୍ଞାନ ଓ ଅନୁଭବ ବିନିମୟ (knowledge and experience exchange) — all in our own Odia language.

ଆମ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ | Our Mission:
To build a resilient, innovative, and inclusive agricultural future that empowers Odisha’s farmers and helps India take the lead in global agriculture.

 ଆସନ୍ତୁ, ଏକ ଶକ୍ତିଶାଳୀ କୃଷି ଓ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟସମ୍ପନ୍ନ ଜଗତ ଗଢିବା ପାଇଁ ଏକତ୍ର ହେବା।
Let’s unite to build a "Wealthy India and a Healthier Globe." 
 ଜୟ ଭାରତ | Jai Bharat!

Team KV Dialogue – ଚାଷୀ ସଂଳାପ

Name: Kizwork
Description:
KIZWORK stands as a carbon-neutral platform that merges VR & AI to revolutionize remote work and education. It boasts a suite of virtual rooms, replete with user-friendly collaborative tools and customizable avatars, crafting a lifelike office or school ambiance while preserving your corporate essence through digital twins. Kizwork is tailored for businesses, offering high efficiency without sacrificing performance in remote settings, as KIZWORK’s energy and CO2 consumption is a mere fraction—30 times less—than traditional video conferencing solutions. Aligning with your ESG goals, KIZWORK harnesses WEB3.0 to ensure security and reliability through Blockchain technology, all while creating NFTs and generating carbon credits.

KIZWORK offers several benefits for enterprises embracing hybrid working and distance education:

Immersive Experience: It provides virtualized rooms with intuitive collaborative tools and personalized avatars, making remote interactions more engaging1.
Carbon Neutral: As a carbon-neutral platform, it helps reduce the environmental impact of remote working2.
Enhanced Creativity and Collaboration: The platform promotes creativity and collaboration, improving remote productivity2.
Seamless Integration: With APIs for business functionalities like 3D visualization and document management, KIZWORK simplifies the implementation process2.
Brand Image Boost: By creating custom digital twins, KIZWORK enhances the company’s brand image.
These features aim to recreate the sense of belonging and freedom that comes with in-person interactions, making remote work and learning more immersive, creative, and collaborative.

Description:

Through the readily downloadable YAKIN app and staying true to its slogan The Muslim Lifestyle Digital App, consumers can use the app as a one stop centre to gain access to a selection of services offered by PPIM from their smartphones such as consumer affairs complaints services, assistance for victims of loan sharks (ah longs or illegal chetis) and donation services; as well as the latest information from PPIM. YAKIN aims to help Muslim customers to adopt more Muslim elements in their daily lives with ease. Among the features or characteristics presented in the Ibadah Module of the YAKIN app include prayer (solat) times, qibla direction, tasbih – a compendium of important zikir and many more. Another interesting feature for consumers of the YAKIN app is that they have the option to choose the call to prayer (adzan) recited by one of the country’s well-known artists, Black Hanifah when they select the solat notification that is exclusively available on the app. The app is powered by Crescent Digital.

Name: SOCIETE DES LECTEURS DU MONDE
Description:
La Société des lecteurs du Monde, créée en 1985, réunit 12 000 lecteurs-actionnaires. Elle est destinée à grouper des personnes physiques ou morales attachées à l’existence du quotidien Le Monde.
Nous croyons au pouvoir de l'information et à son rôle essentiel dans la construction d'un monde plus informé, plus éclairé et plus juste. En tant qu'actionnaire du journal Le Monde, nous nous engageons à en assurer l’indépendance à l’égard de tout pouvoir économique et politique.

La SDL est aujourd’hui dans le monde des médias, un exemple unique d’une société de lecteurs à détenir une part significative du capital de son journal au sein d’un grand groupe multimédia de référence.
A ce titre, elle est présente dans les trois instances de gouvernance majeures du groupe : le conseil de surveillance du Groupe, le Pôle d’indépendance et le comité d’éthique et de déontologie.

Notre Mission :
  Soutenir un journalisme indépendant et de qualité.
  Promouvoir l’accès et le partage d’une presse libre, à travers son action lecteurs sans frontières.
  Encourager le débat et la participation active des citoyens, à travers des conférences.

En rejoignant notre page, vous faites partie d'une communauté passionnée qui reconnaît qu’une telle presse, à l’exigence quotidienne et aux valeurs éthiques et déontologiques, est une composante essentielle d’une grande démocratie. C’est un bien précieux que seule une stricte indépendance permet de préserver.
 Restez informé avec Le Monde, soutenu par la Société des Lecteurs du Monde. 

#LecteursDuMonde #LeMonde #LibertéDeLaPresse #IndépendanceDeLaPresse

Pour en savoir plus sur notre rôle en tant qu'actionnaire et nos activités, visitez notre site : www.sdllemonde.fr

Contactez-nous : sdl@lemonde.fr

Name: ISBITELECOM
Description:
Isbitelecom SL ofrece una amplia gama de productos y servicios diseñados para mejorar las comunicaciones empresariales y potenciar las ventas. A continuación, se presenta un resumen de sus principales soluciones:
Comunicaciones Unificadas (UC&C): Wildix proporciona un paquete completo de comunicaciones unificadas basado en la nube, accesible desde cualquier dispositivo a través del navegador. Esta solución integra herramientas como llamadas de voz, mensajería instantánea y videoconferencias, facilitando la colaboración y aumentando la eficiencia empresarial. 
Inteligencia Artificial (IA): Las herramientas de IA de Wildix ofrecen asistencia en tiempo real durante reuniones o llamadas, proporcionando transcripciones, análisis de sentimientos y resúmenes automáticos. Estas funcionalidades mejoran la productividad y la formación de los equipos, además de optimizar la atención al cliente. 
Análisis y Supervisión: Wildix ofrece herramientas como CDR-View y x-caracal para analizar y supervisar el tráfico telefónico y las comunicaciones en tiempo real. Estas soluciones permiten obtener informes detallados sobre llamadas, tiempos de respuesta y rendimiento de los agentes, facilitando la toma de decisiones estratégicas. 
Videoconferencia y Webinars: Con Wizyconf y Wizywebinar, Wildix proporciona soluciones profesionales para videoconferencias y webinars. Estas herramientas permiten realizar reuniones, presentaciones y sesiones de formación de manera eficiente y sin complicaciones técnicas, directamente desde el navegador. 
Integraciones: La plataforma de Wildix se integra con software líder en diversos mercados, como SAP, Salesforce, Microsoft Teams y Zoho, entre otros. Estas integraciones permiten una sincronización fluida de datos y procesos, mejorando la eficiencia operativa y la experiencia del usuario. 
En conjunto, las soluciones de Wildix están diseñadas para transformar las comunicaciones empresariales, incrementando la productividad, mejorando la atención al cliente.

Name: InVisible
Description:
Nous sommes la génération des douleurs qui ne se voient pas. De celles qu'on tait pour ne pas déranger. De celles qu'on subit en silence parce qu'elles n'ont pas de visage, pas de plâtre, pas de diagnostic clair. Nous vivons avec des corps instables, des esprits tendus, des rythmes décalés. 

Et pourtant, nous sommes là. 
Présents. 
Actifs. 
Brillants, souvent. 
Invisibles, toujours.

InVisible, c’est la voix de cette majorité silencieuse. Ce n'est pas une plainte. C'est une prise de pouvoir. Nous ne voulons pas être vus pour être plaints. Nous voulons être reconnus, écoutés, considérés. Nous ne cherchons pas à nous distinguer, mais à élargir les normes.

Ce que la société appelle "handicap invisible", "maladie chronique", "trouble mental", nous l'appelons « fondation invisible » : la base de nos résiliences, de nos choix.

Nous croyons en un monde où la vulnérabilité n’est pas un risque à cacher mais une compétence à intégrer.
Nous croyons que les institutions doivent écouter ceux qu'elles ne savent pas voir.
Nous croyons que la parole a une valeur politique, même quand elle tremble.

InVisible, c'est un média, un think tank, un studio de conseil. C'est une puissance douce, un récit de fond, une onde de choc dans les organisations.

Nous sommes InVisible.
Nous ne demandons plus l'autorisation d'exister.
Nous prenons la parole.

Name: Humans of Kuala Lumpur
Description:
Humans of Kuala Lumpur (HOKL) meets the people of KL, documenting the transformation, changes and diversity of our people with portraits that present a personal glimpse of the humans living in KL photo by photo. 

We personally believe that everyone - no matter how poor, rich, black, white, yellow, tall, short, beautiful or ugly you are, there is always a story to be told. 

HOKL has transformed from being a story telling narrative into a social advocacy platform, recognizing its potential to influence, empower and educate Malaysians on important issues. 

The trend first started with Brandon Stanton of Humans of New York, and freelance photographer/photojournalist Mushamir Mustafa started Humans of Kuala Lumpur in 2012.
We are now a formidable and diverse team of 15 unique storytellers in the photography and videography medium, led by a leadership team of experienced individuals of different backgrounds and industries - whose mission is to change, influence, inspire, educate and create change amongst Malaysians - through what we do best, telling stories that touch people’s hearts. 

If you have an interesting photo and story to tell us, or one that you took yourself, feel free to message us on Facebook as well! We also respond at thehumansofkl@gmail.com.

-Access to reliable information about local affairs is a right, not a privilege.
-Approaching every community we cover with the care of a good neighbor.
-Providing the journalism that people need, not the journalism we think they need.

-Worker-led practices that reduce power imbalances in and out of the newsroom.

TodoManí.com.ar, dedicado a la cadena manicera.

A esto se suma TodoAgroTV, nuestro canal de YouTube que ofrece entrevistas exclusivas, coberturas de actualidad y transmisiones en Streaming HD como soporte a capacitaciones y eventos online propios y de terceros.

En el área de Eventos, hemos organizado más de 190 jornadas y exposiciones presenciales y virtuales, consolidándonos como un espacio de referencia para el intercambio técnico y la actualización profesional. Entre nuestras iniciativas más destacadas se encuentran la Expo TodoLáctea, las Jornadas Lecheras Nacionales, las Jornadas Nacionales de Alfalfa, el Tour Lechero, las Jornadas TodoSoja y TodoMaíz.

En TodoAgro creemos en la importancia de la comunicación estratégica y la capacitación continua como motores de crecimiento para el agro argentino. Por eso, acompañamos a nuestros públicos con propuestas innovadoras, contenidos de calidad y el compromiso de siempre.

Name: The Stunt List
Description:
Over 50,000 script views in 2024 | Two writers signed | Projects penned by sold and produced industry pros, repped and ready writers, to undiscovered and underrepresented voices on the verge.

The Stunt List website is created by writers, for writers. We aim to amplify a diverse portfolio of voices through writer-forward initiatives and radical kindness. Our website vibe aims to feel like a “Netflix For Writers”—projecting a completed brand image at the script stage. The Stunt List Website is created by Ash Lazer and Eric Moyer, Executive Produced by Elizabeth Ditty, Shauna Joy, & Chris O’Bryant and runs on the sweat equity of a team of brilliant writers.

Our market-ready, original screenplay showcases are called The Dead List, The Originals Bureau, Velvet Pulp & The Ballers List.

The Stunt List: "The Fusion of IP and Original Voice." The Stunt List feature scripts based on existing IP the writer does not own. "Stunt" scripts are sometimes also called "fuck-it" scripts, but usually mash up IP for a big splash in the market place, but also can be traditional specs of existing TV shows written for fellowships applications and Showrunner meetings. 

The Dead List: A curation of the raddest, most sinister celluloid in the city — All original, market-ready horror scripts. Season 1 & 2 exploded into the Hollywood marketplace and put us on the map for discovering originals, landing an unrepped writer with representation at Heroes & Villains, among other high profile success stories.

The Originals Bureau: A marquee of dynamic & diverse, market-ready original scripts. Season 2 blew up with dozens of high profile industry requests from folks like a Co-Ep of a network show on CBS, and a handful of A-list producers and directors. 

The Naughty List: From romantic comedies meet cute-ing under the mistletoe to Christmas carnage and mayhem, these 12 market-ready screenplays and stunts will surely stuff your stockings with season’s readings.

Name: Flute & Synth
Description:
Flute & Synth is usually engaged to advise and take the lead on a specific market opportunity requiring specialist media experience and global media networks. Flute & Synth will work with the company to build a scope or a set of initial plans to action and will also deliver aspects of the plan.

Companies may already have teams in Australia or New Zealand or Southeast Asia; or they may have clients in the region, but no ‘on the ground’ team, or they may have no business in the region and are seeking to make a start.  

We start small, and we are pragmatic - but we think and plan big. Flute & Synth’s current clients include BBC Studios Australia & New Zealand, Ampere Analysis, and MTM Consulting. The work we do tends to be focused on: 

EXPANSION PLANNING

Defining a client’s target market and undertaking market profiling & competitive analysis to determine the expansion opportunity and inform a ‘routes to market’ plan. Assessing the client’s product/service fit with the target market and advising on product / service refinement needs & product / service expansion opportunities.

MARKETING AND SALES ACTIVATION

Devising and implementing a marketing and sales strategy for clients, which can be around growing existing business and developing new business. In both instances, we focus on building market awareness, targeting specific leads and securing sales.

PARTNERSHIPS

Flute & Synth is expert at identifying potential partners to accelerate growth for clients. Flute & Synth conducts partner approaches and strategic business development for clients, including for clients who already have established business in region but need to step- change their momentum and strategic engagement with the market.

Name: ФОКУС МЕДІА
Description:
ФОКУС МЕДІА— 16 років лідерства, інновацій і драйву.

Компанія заснована у 2006 році. «Фокус Медіа» включає загальнонаціональний тижневик «Фокус» та сайт focus.ua .

Журнал «Фокус» 15 років є одним з найавторитетніших друкованих видань України.
Наклад журналу – 32 000 екземплярів. Аудиторія одного номера складає 87,5 тис. осіб. (за даними TNS MMI 2020/3+2020/4).

Focus.ua  — інформаційно-аналітичний двомовний сайт. У листопаді 2022 року зайняв 8 місце серед українських сайтів у категорії News, Bussiness&Finance за метриками Gemius Ukraine. Аудиторія сайту focus.ua – 9 млн користувачів, 28 млн сесій та 52 млн сторінок на місяць (за даними Google Analytics за листопад 2022 року).

ЗМІ фокусується на огляді та аналізі головних подій, основних ділових та політичних новинах в Україні та світі, публікує інтерв'ю із видатними постатями, колонки експертів про зовнішню політику України та досвід інших держав, дає аналітику зі сфер економіки та фінансів, висвітлює новини культури, науки, технологій, створює автомобільні огляди, гіди з подорожей та ін. 
Фокус оперативно дає читачам якісну та актуальну інформацію у діловому форматі, підкріплену авторитетними оцінками, коментарями експертів та лідерів думок.

Name: DITO CME Holdings Corp.
Description:
DITO CME Holdings Corp. (Formerly: ISM Communications Corporation) (“DITO CME”) provides telecommunications, multimedia, and IT services that impact the way people communicate, transact, share information and consume content and data. Through our subsidiaries, we have a far-reaching influence to transform enterprises and the lives of customers and the general public through Telecommunications, Digital Media and Content, Managed Analytics, Intelligent Lifestyle and Commerce Platforms, and Enabling Infrastructure.

Originally incorporated in 1925 as a mining company, the firm transformed in the early 2000s into ISM Communications Corporation, engaged in information technology, multimedia telecommunications, and other similar industries. The firm obtained the approval of the Securities and Exchange Commission to become a holding company in November 2016, and in March 2020 changed its name to DITO CME Holdings Corporation.

In November 2020, DCME announced its share swap deal with Udenna Corporation, wherein DCME will acquire 100% stake in Udenna’s subsidiary, Udenna CME Holdings Corporation, which co-owns DITO Holdings Corporation, the parent company of DITO Telecommunity. Through this transaction, DCME gained an indirect interest and majority shares in DITO Telecommunity, and became part of the Udenna Corporation, a diversified conglomerate based in Davao City, Philippines, with interests in petroleum, logistics, real estate, retail and food, education, hospitality and infrastructure.

True to its mandate, DITO CME is constantly on the lookout for new opportunities and is equipped with the financial resources to make significant investments for the benefit of its shareholders.

Name: Met Golf Writers Association
Description:
Since 1952, the Metropolitan Golf Writers Association has celebrated the great game of golf by honoring the outstanding players, contributors, clubs and organizations that have done so much for the sport.  These initiatives are realized each year at the MGWA’s National Awards Dinner, and we are proud to say that ours is the longest-running  golf dinner in the United States.  The MGWA National Awards Dinner has raised millions of dollars for the Long Island, New Jersey and Westchester Caddie Scholarship programs; the MGA Foundation; the Dave Marr Memorial Journalism Scholarship, and other worthy golf-supported causes.  MGWA contributions from the Dinners have helped fund scholarships and change the lives of thousands of young men and women in the New York metropolitan area.

At each Dinner the MGWA recognizes golf’s greatest players, contributors and organizations.  The Gold Tee Award, our highest honor, has been presented to such luminaries as Bobby Jones, Ben Hogan, Sam Snead, Patty Berg, Byron Nelson, Arnold Palmer, Jack Nicklaus, Gary Player, Nancy Lopez, Annika Sorenstam, Charlie Sifford, Phil Mickelson, and Ernie Els.  Other honorees include Fred Couples (2014), Nick Price (2015), Davis Love III (2016), Mark O'Meara (2017), Padraig Harrington (2018), Jim Furyk (2019), Butch Harmon (2020/21), Dottie Pepper (2022), Larry Nelson (2023) and most recently, Luke Donald (2024).

Many of the sport’s top journalists and commentators have been MGWA members.  Lincoln Werden, the golf writer for The New York Times during the 1950s and 1960s, was the organization’s first president.  Other members, both past and present, include Dave Anderson, Guido Cribari, Will Grimsley, Arthur (Red) Hoffman, Al Laney, Dave Marr, Jim Nantz, Jimmy Roberts, Nick Seitz, Damon Hack and Jack Whitaker.  Anderson, the Pulitzer Prize-winning columnist of The New York Times, was a long-time member of the MGWA’s Board of Directors.

Name: buildbetter
Description:
Welcome to buildbetter, a weekly newsletter where I provide actionable ideas helping you understand and build meaningful relationships—in every aspect of your life.

This isn’t about shoving cliché's about connecting in your face…"your network is your net worth!" and "It's not what you know, it's who you know!"

Because meaningful relationships and social connection are much more than that. They're a fundamental human need, as essential to survival as food, water, and shelter. Not surprisingly, it plays the largest role in our happiness and success.

Now I spend all my time deepening connections, refining tactics, reading, researching, hosting events, and meeting with trailblazers all within the connectivity space.
Then I take all of that and in 5 minutes every Wednesday at ~7am ET, I help you learn about:

• Why it's tough to make meaningful connections—from psychology to social media's impact to how we ended up in a loneliness epidemic
• Things we can do to feel more connected to friends, family, colleagues, communities, and professional networks
• Benefits of meaningful connection—living longer, lower rates of depression, how it brings meaning to our lives, and its impact on professional success
• The products, companies, events and content that can help us make relationships a habit in our lives

But best of all, you'll gain real ways each week to improve how you connect and create relationship habits that withstand major life and career changes.

Name: RSALUD Revista
Description:

RSALUD surge ante la necesidad de manifestar las acciones que se llevan adelante para mejorar la salud y el medio ambiente en materia pública y privada, como también el compromiso de las empresas ante esos campos, los ejemplos nacionales e internacionales que puedan servir de guía y las opiniones de los especialistas que nos alertan e informan.

RSALUD busca convertirse en un instrumento idóneo para que los que tienen la posibilidad de actuar en el sector puedan decir qué hacen, qué piensan hacer y quiénes son los mejores intérpretes para concretar un programa armónico, integrado y proactivo en las diversas esferas de la responsabilidad social en salud.

Name: WHY GO PROJECT — [RE]DEFINING THE HUMAN EXPERIENCE THROUGH THE LENS OF TRAUMA
Description:
Inspired by Pearl Jam’s Why Go and CEO/Founder, Lauren’s four-decade transformative, jaw-dropping journey — A purpose-driven enterprise organization and Global Healing Ecosystem [Re]defining the human experience through the lens of trauma and a holistic view of wellness — the Art & Science of Connection. Biohack an embodied comeback with nervous system literacy — we can’t change or solve for what we don’t understand.

Focused on a holistic, trauma-informed and neuroscience-based view of living and wellness, with an emphasis on education, empowerment and experiential events. Helping humans navigate the ebbs, flows and tidal waves of life through the power of connection with curated resources and actionable tools.

Blending cross-disciplinary expertise, lived, consequential experience and thought-leadership to connect seemingly disparate systems, ideas and under-served communities. The  Why Go Project empowers individuals and organizations to alchemize survival into strength, transmuting pain into power, fostering profound and lasting growth.

Why Go Project traverses art, science, storytelling, lived and shared experiences to inspire a Sic Parvis Magna Moment(greatness from small beginnings) and inner growth, peace and freedom.

Dentro de la disciplina de la ecología política se centra en aspectos como los conflictos ambientales, las desigualdades en el acceso a los recursos y las cargas de contaminación, las políticas ambientales, las redes de resistencia y movimientos sociales y los referentes del pensamiento ambiental.

Name: Federación de Periodistas del Perú
Description: "La Federación de Periodistas del Perú (FPP), fundada el 18 de julio de 1950, es una asociación civil autónoma e independiente de los periodistas, con fines profesionales, gremiales y sin fines de lucro. Su existencia se sustenta en la Carta Universal de los Derechos Humanos, en la Constitución Política del Perú, y en las normas que regulan el sistema jurídico nacional. La Federación de Periodistas del Perú (FPP) reconoce en la libertad de expresión un derecho fundamental del ser humano porque sin ella no existe sociedad democrática. Consecuentemente, toda persona tiene derecho a expresar sus ideas por los medios de comunicación en igualdad de condiciones."

Name: ACI MENA
Description:
The Association for Catholic Information Middle East and North Africa, or ACI MENA, publishes original news content in Arabic using a network of correspondents across the region. The news agency operates from the campus of Erbil’s Catholic University (CUE.) 

ACI MENA is the latest addition to the ACI Group, which includes ACI Prensa, the world's largest Spanish-language Catholic news organization with headquarters in Lima, Peru; ACI Digital, the São Paulo, Brazil-based news organization, which serves the Portuguese-speaking world; ACI Stampa, the Italian-language news organization based in Rome; and ACI Africa, which covers news from the African continent in English, French, and Portuguese. 

ACI Group is part of the larger EWTN News, Inc. division, which also includes Catholic News Agency (CNA), the German-language news service CNA Deutsch, and several other Catholic news outlets, including the National Catholic Register, "EWTN News Nightly," "EWTN News In Depth," and several other television news programs.

Name: LFE by It Seemed Like A Good Idea at the Time Enterprises
Description:
It Seemed Like a Good Idea at the Time Enterprises LLC is an umbrella brand housing For-Profit sub-brands focused on Complex Trauma — so pervasive and so obvious that it’s hiding in plain sight from professionals AND persons living in perennial chaos. A Pediatric Complex Trauma Non-Profit to launch. 

Founder and CEO, Lauren Friedman, a prolific 20 year AdTech veteran experienced almost four decades of disparate somatic responses to trauma without being properly diagnosed. Lauren has been being treated for Adrenal Fatigue/High-Functioning Complex PTS(R) since 12/2021 after "living" in Survival Mode unknowingly from under the age of two thru 39. 

Lauren's story of resilience, mental fortitude and her ability to engage & connect with people of all ages, globally, through her myriad experiences is unparalleled. 

Leveraging her signature brand of quick wit, sarcasm, (dark)humor, authenticity, diplomacy & joie de vivre Lauren personalizes & humanizes abstract/serious topics, bringing them to life & opening a dialogue amongst audiences. 

It Seemed Like a Good Idea at the Time Enterprises’ mission is to give a voice, platform, community, resources, experiential healing & more to those who are suffering in silence and don't even know that Peace is a Possibility.

Find out why the brand names in this portfolio are double entendres. Follow @the_LFExperience IG, @the-LFE YT!

Topics including but not limited to: Complex Trauma, Survival Mode is my Superpower, Hypervigilance, Dissociation, Disordered Eating, Somatic Trauma Responses, cPTS(R), Suicide, Mental Health, Fitness, Addiction, EMDR, Sex/Love Addiction, Mind/Body Connection, Fat Like Me, Adult Child, Dysfunctional Family, Women's Health/Misdiagnosis, Hormones, Thyroid, Healing Trauma, Sobriety Spectrum, Navigating lifelong 360 degree chaos

Sub-brands: Consultancy, Podcast/YT programming, Retail/CPG, Merch, Music Partnerships, Experiential Events, Books, Movies

El Surti nació en 2016 como una página en Facebook y creció para convertirse en una redacción de periodistas, ilustradores y diseñadores reconocidos en la región y en el mundo por cómo combina la reportería original con imágenes remixadas de la cultura popular, desde cómics hasta memes. 

El Surti ha recibido el Premio Gabo 2018 en Innovación y el Youth&News Media Prize en 2019. Ha sido finalista del IPI Free Media Pioneer Award y de los Sigma Awards. Forma parte del International Press Institute, el Global Forum for Media Development, el Global Investigative Journalism Network, Latamchequea, entre otras redes.

Name: Waves.com.br
Description:
Desde 1998, o Waves conecta pessoas ao oceano. Somos a principal plataforma de previsões de ondas e conteúdo especializado no Brasil, reunindo em um só lugar tudo o que os surfistas e apaixonado pelo lifestyle de praia precisam. Também oferecemos um marketplace completo para equipamentos, guias detalhados do litoral brasileiro, matérias editoriais, coberturas de eventos, vídeos, fóruns de discussão e muito mais, para entregar a melhor experiência ao nosso público em toda a América Latina.

Nossos valores são a base de tudo: Paixão pelo que fazemos, Respeito ao mar, Humildade para aprender, Consistência no que entregamos, Inovação constante, Sustentabilidade e Tecnologia como pilares fundamentais para o futuro. Esses princípios nos guiam em cada decisão, garantindo que nossas ações sempre reflitam nosso compromisso com a qualidade e a conexão com a natureza.

Através de um modelo proprietário, oferecemos as melhores informações e previsões das ondas, ajudando nossos usuários a se conectarem com o mar e aproveitarem ao máximo suas experiências. Ao fornecer dados precisos e conteúdos relevantes, contribuímos para que cada surfista e amante do lifestyle de praia viva sua paixão com segurança, confiança e diversão, elevando suas vivências à beira-mar.

Ao olhar para o futuro, o Waves se posiciona como uma plataforma única e inovadora, que une tradição e tecnologia em um só lugar, para moldar o mercado do surfe. Buscamos não só antecipar as tendências, mas liderar mudanças positivas, oferecendo serviços personalizados e soluções sustentáveis, que maximizam os benefícios para o ecossistema do surfe e para todos que compartilham dessa paixão pelo Oceano.

Name: খেতি সংলাপ - KhetiSanlapa - KV Dialogue - KhetiValah
Description:
"I’m Ready to Drive Meaningful Change!"

খেতি সংলাপ | KhetiSanlapa – Agri Dialogues in Bengali

KhetiSanlapa (খেতি সংলাপ) is the Bengali edition of KV Dialogue – also known as KhetiValah Dialogues (AgriTalks) – a unique platform dedicated to meaningful and insightful conversations on agriculture, rural development, and the lives of farmers.

Rooted in the belief that "কৃষির কথা হোক কৃষকের ভাষায়" ("Let agriculture be discussed in the farmer’s own language"), KhetiSanlapa aims to bridge the gap between traditional wisdom and modern agricultural practices. Through engaging dialogues and expert-led discussions, this initiative encourages জ্ঞান বিনিময় (knowledge exchange) among farming communities across Indian states and even globally.

Our core mission is to create a space where farmers, agri-entrepreneurs, policymakers, and innovators can connect, learn, and grow together. KhetiSanlapa covers a wide range of relevant topics including:

Sustainable farming practices
Climate-resilient agriculture
Agri-tech innovations
Government schemes & policies
Organic farming, market linkages, and more

Each dialogue (সংলাপ) is designed to empower the কৃষক সমাজ (farming community), amplify their voices, and share stories that matter — all in a language that feels like home.

Join us as we build a resilient, innovative, and inclusive agricultural future. 

Let us all come together to elevate India to the top in the field of agriculture.  Join KhetiValah’s mission in building a "Wealthy India and Healthier Globe." 

Jai Bharat! 

 Watch, Share & Subscribe:
 YouTube: www.youtube.com/khetisanlapa 
 LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/company/khetisanlapa
 Facebook: www.facebook.com/khetisanlapa

Name: NBO Film Festival
Description: The NBO Film Festival is one of the most anticipated cultural events in East Africa, attracting filmmakers, critics, and cinephiles from across the region. Held annually in the heart of Kenya’s capital, the festival showcases a wide array of films, from feature-length dramas to cutting-edge documentaries and short films. By promoting reflection on Kenyan identity and celebrating independent cinema, the festival fosters a dynamic film culture. It is committed to showcasing Kenyan art and film, inspiring audiences to explore the nation’s rich storytelling. In its first three editions, the festival hosted world premieres of top Kenyan films, including ‘Lusala’ (which had its international premiere at the International Film Festival Rotterdam) and ‘Supa Modo’ which became Kenya’s 2019 Foreign Language Oscar submission after winning 44 international awards and securing an extended cinema run. NBO Film Festival also advocates for the expression of all Kenyan voices, fostering discussions around previously banned films like ‘Stories of Our Lives’ and ‘Rafiki’. It has been a springboard for the theatrical releases of Kenyan films such as ‘New Moon’, ‘Disconnect’ and ‘Softie’, the latter of which received a great deal of positive media and community engagement in Kenya and abroad.

While I’m personally connected to brain cancer, Combating Cancer is not limited to any one type of cancer. It’s a space for all cancer journeys—whether that’s brain cancer, breast cancer, lung cancer, or any other form of the disease. I hope to include a diverse range of voices so that the podcast can reach as many people as possible and offer support and solidarity to everyone who has been affected by cancer.

Name: Mental Health Storytelling Initiative
Description:
The Mental Health Storytelling Initiative harnesses the power of storytelling to transform how mental health is seen, understood, and prioritized in our cultural narrative. 

We are a groundbreaking alliance of 70+ organizations—from major studios and production companies to leading mental health organizations—working collaboratively to ensure mental health stories are told with authenticity, nuance, and impact.

Our work includes:
- Creating resources like the Mental Health Media Guide and Digital Storytelling Guide
- Facilitating direct partnerships between mental health experts and content creators
- Providing training and consultation for authentic mental health portrayals
- Supporting innovative collaborative projects across all platforms
- Amplifying powerful mental health narratives that reduce stigma

Founded in partnership with MTV Entertainment Studios and the Annenberg Inclusion Initiative, we're now a fiscally sponsored project of Moore Impact, a 501c3 public charity, to expand our impact and create more opportunities for authentic mental health storytelling.

Studies show that accurate mental health portrayals can reduce stigma, increase help-seeking behaviors, and make people feel less alone. With young people facing unprecedented mental health challenges, we believe media has the power to transform how we understand, talk about, and support mental health.

Together, we're creating a world where mental health is understood, prioritized, and integrated into cultural narratives through authentic and resonant storytelling.

Name: DIACOMET
Description:
The existing framework of public communication does not empower citizens to influence the ways the media institutions and actors operate in European democracies. Digital communication enormously expands the ways of human interaction for good, but also challenges European societies by spread of hate speech, disinformation, and instigation of conflicts.

DIACOMET contributes to the advancement of ethical and accountable communication by fostering capacity building for civic resilience against information distortions and promoting civic accountability.

DIACOMET aims to generate a concept of dialogic communication ethics (DCE), which would provide a framework for an inclusive model of accountability mechanisms that combine media accountability (the level of organisations) with civic accountability (the level of citizens) and is guided by a Civic Code of Good Communication Conduct (CGC) (a new type of code of communication ethics). DIACOMET will also create an interactive ‘dilemma game’ and a forum for learning and discussion. DIACOMET proposes to establish a European network of civic accountability bodies for supporting individuals, groups and organizations to implement the CGC, and to assist in managing ethical issues emerging in public communication.

Consortium partners from 8 countries:
- Vytautas Magnus University, Lithuania (Coordinator)
- University of Tartu, Estonia
- Tampere University, Finland
- Austrian Academy of Sciences, Austria
- University of Ljubljana, Slovenia
- University of Applied Sciences Utrecht, Netherlands
- Hungarian Europe Society, Hungary
- Praxis Centre for Policy Studies, Estonia
- Delfi UAB, Lithuania
- Universita della Svizzera italiana, Switzerland (Associated partner)

*The project is funded by the European Union's Horizon Europe Culture, creativity and inclusive society programme, grant agreement ID: 101094816.

Name: Onda Minera RTV Nerva
Description:
Onda Minera RTV Nerva es la emisora municipal de radio y televisión de la localidad onubense de Nerva. Forma parte de la asociación de emisoras municipales de radio y televisión de Andalucía, EMA-RTV, y ofrece una programación local y regional las 24 horas del día, los 365 días del año. Hablamos por tanto de uno de los medios de comunicación locales más veteranos que existen en la provincia de Huelva y gran parte de Andalucía, con más de 30 años de historia, que bien podrían haber sido más de 80. Ofrece un servicio múltiple de comunicación pública a los vecinos de Nerva, muy en particular, y a los de la Cuenca Minera, en general, así como a todas aquellas personas interesadas por lo que ocurre a nuestro alrededor desde cualquier rincón del mundo.

La radio de Nerva, tal y como se la conoce hoy en día, surgió en el otoño de 1984, aunque hay indicios más que probados de la existencia de una emisora local en la década de los años 30 del siglo pasado, la primera que se creaba en la provincia de Huelva, que desgraciadamente vio truncado su desarrollo por culpa de la Guerra Civil.

Con el tiempo, esta veterana emisora se ha transformado en un ente de comunicación local que, bajo la denominación actual de Onda Minera RTV Nerva, comparte protagonismo con la TV municipal, creada en la primavera de 2003, y las redes sociales existentes en Internet con una más que notable presencia en las más importantes.

Na *Net Agora*, defendemos que o acesso à internet é um direito básico fundamental para todos os brasileiros. Nosso objetivo é promover a democratização do acesso às tecnologias.

Atualmente, mais de 20% dos lares nas classes D e E do Brasil ainda estão sem conexão à internet, o que impede milhões de cidadãos de aproveitar os benefícios da conectividade.

Na *Net Agora*, acreditamos que "Nada empodera mais uma comunidade do que o acesso à informação. Informação é poder." Esse princípio orienta nossas ações e projetos, reafirmando nosso compromisso com a inclusão digital.

Mesmo sem apoio externo até "agora", estamos dedicados a garantir que mais brasileiros tenham a chance de se conectar, aprender e evoluir. Ao facilitar o acesso às tecnologias, estamos contribuindo para construir uma sociedade mais justa e equitativa.

Name: Moore Squared Communications
Description:
When we say we understand investors, we mean it. We have spent years talking to and working in investment organisations. We understand how rapid changes in recent years have caused asset managers’ client pool to shrink. We know the current government’s suggested pension reforms will have unexpected and unsettling consequences.
Natasha spent a decade working in communications in the asset management sector while Charlotte built a freelance journalist career specialising in how pension schemes allocate assets. 
A decade of working in corporate communications at asset managers means Natasha understands the pressures those departments face. Charlotte has conducted thousands of interviews with asset managers and owners – as well as their advisors – giving her a profound insight into the industry.
We know how regulation and market structures shape the way institutional investors allocate their assets. We have tracked how rapidly the market has changed and the challenges this throws up for both asset managers and owners.
This adds up to a combined 50 years’ experience of what good investment communications should look like. We are passionate about helping you to build deeper connection with your existing and potential clients.
The key to building those relationships is to show you understand your clients’ challenges and to demonstrate you are the solution. This sounds obvious but in our experience the industry too often focuses on what it can sell rather than what it can solve.
We create bespoke communication strategies – and oversee plans – so you can build those long-term relationships. We provide the opportunities for those must-have face-to-face interactions.
Sustainable investment is important to both of us and we know it is vital to have the right  philosophies and processes in place if you want to be credible. Communication is key. A good sustainable investor who talks about it badly will lose business to a less adept sustainable investor who talks about it well.
