Name: Donbas Media Forum
Description:
Donbas Media Forum (DMF) is an annual conference that brings together journalists, editors, media managers, and experts from Ukraine and around the world to discuss pressing challenges in the media sphere, share experiences, and strengthen professional networks. Founded in 2015 by the media organization DII-Ukraine, the forum emerged as a response to the difficult conditions faced by journalism in Donetsk and Luhansk regions following the war launched by Russia against Ukraine in 2014.

The mission of Donbas Media Forum is to create a safe and open space for dialogue, support, and the development of the media community amid conflict and crisis. The forum not only helps restore professional connections but also shapes new standards for quality, responsible journalism that counters disinformation, censorship, and the challenges of our time.

Over the past 10 years, DMF has grown into the largest media event in Ukraine, attracting hundreds of participants and speakers from across the country and abroad. The forum’s program includes panel discussions, workshops, training sessions, presentations of new tools and technologies, documentary film screenings by media professionals, public interviews, as well as a platform for exchanging ideas on supporting freedom of speech and media literacy.

The forum serves as a venue where trends are born and collective responses to the challenges of modern journalism are formed. It unites media experts, human rights defenders, activists, and representatives of the international community to support Ukraine’s media industry during war and transformation.

Donbas Media Forum is more than just a conference — it is a community of like-minded professionals standing guard over core journalistic values and helping preserve the voice of independent journalism, even in the most difficult times.

We invite you to join our community, follow updates, and be part of the future of Ukrainian media.

Name: ENACT
Description:
The ENACT project (Easy-to-Understand News for Collaborative Transformation), a pioneering European initiative, co-funded by the EU's Creative Europe programme.

The project is led by RTV Slovenija and brings together partners from Spain (Universitat Autònoma de Barcelona, UAB; Corporació Catalana de Mitjans Audiovisuals, CCMA), Italy (Uniamoci APS), Austria (Österreichischer Rundfunk, ORF ), and Latvia (Latvijas Radio, part of the Latvian Public Service Media). The project seeks to bridge linguistic, cultural, and societal gaps in media accessibility. It is designed to make news more inclusive and easier to understand on web, radio, and television platforms.

The ENACT project will span two years and focus on three primary goals:
1.      Upskilling media professionals through training and collaboration programs.
2.      Developing shared guidelines for using clear and easy-to-understand language in media.
3.      Promoting media literacy by engaging underrepresented groups, including people with disabilities and language learners.

ENACT is co-funded by the European Union through the Creative Europe programme under the Journalism Partnerships – Collaborations call. The project aligns with European goals of promoting diversity, accessibility, and media transformation.

Name: Green Shift Pod
Description:
Green Shift is a collaboration between Austin Media, the Centre for Strategic Energy and Resources (CSER) and Organizational Analytics.

What: Green Shift, a podcast focused on Southeast Asia’s transition to a sustainable, secure, and net-zero energy future that keeps life liveable.

Why: Formal policy dialogs and corporate white papers are important but can be stuffy and boring. Green Shift brings the same burning topics — equitable growth, energy transition, geopolitics, green financing, etc. — into a friendly, informed and lively discussion that you don’t have to be an expert to understand. 

Who: Co-hosted by David Austin, veteran media strategist and podcast host, Dr. Victor Nian, energy and nuclear expert, and Dr. Andreas Raharso, innovation and strategy thought leader. Together with expert guests and policy practitioners they explore what actually needs to happen to accelerate SEA’s green shift.

How it’s different: Green Shift is independent, not the communication arm of a consultancy or financial institution. It’s conversational, not overly scripted or formal. The core content is always free, with no paywall. And Green Shift is based in and focused on Southeast Asia specifically and Asia more broadly, giving voice to the stories and information that is often overlooked on the international stage.

We will be exploring everything from a just energy transition to carbon credits, sustainable cooling, ASEAN regional cooperation, green taxonomy, green financing, to the water energy food nexus.

Name: SRG Zentralschweiz
Description:
Mit etwas über 2'500 Mitgliedern ist die SRG Zentralschweiz die grösste Medienorganisation der Zentralschweiz. Sie ist eine der sechs Mitgliedsgesellschaften der SRG Deutschschweiz und somit Teil des Vereins SRG SSR, welcher das grösste Medienunternehmen der Schweiz mit öffentlichem Auftrag betreibt. Der Verein gewährleistet einen wirtschaftlich und politisch unabhängigen audiovisuellen Service public in allen Landesteilen. Sie macht sich stark für eine angemessene Präsenz der Zentralschweiz im Schweizer Radio und Fernsehen und vertritt die Anliegen der SRG SSR in den sechs Kantonen der Zentralschweiz.

Die Sektionen Luzern, Nidwalden, Obwalden, Schwyz, Uri und Zug fördern den Kontakt zwischen ihrem Kanton und dem Radio- und Fernsehstudio in Luzern.
Die SRG Zentralschweiz engagiert sich für eine angemessene Präsenz der Zentralschweiz in den Programmen von Schweizer Radio und Fernsehen. Sie begleitet Radiosendungen und TV-Beiträge des Regionalstudios Zentralschweiz. Die SRG Zentralschweiz vergibt den Medien- und den Förderpreis.

Die folgenden sechs Gründe sind Grund genug für eine Mitgliedschaft:

- Sie tragen dazu bei, dass die SRG ihre Unabhängigkeit und ihren Rückhalt in der Bevölkerung bewahrt.
- Sie stützen den föderalistischen Aufbau der SRG SSR – Garant dafür, dass auch Ihre Region in den elektronischen Medien gebührend Platz findet.
- Sie erhalten Zugang zu exklusiven Veranstaltungen.
- Sie werden regelmässig über aktuelle Medienthemen informiert.
- Sie können Anregungen oder Kritik an Sendungen anbringen.
- Sie stehen in direktem Kontakt zu den Programmschaffenden von Radio und Fernsehen.

Name: Network of Women in Media, India
Description:
The Network of Women in Media, India (NWMI) is a vibrant forum for women in media professions to share information and resources, exchange ideas, uphold media standards and ethics, and promote gender equality within the media as well as society. Launched in January 2002, it has been steadily growing and currently has a membership of about 1000 media women across the country, working in multiple languages. Local networks currently exist in 17 places in different parts of India.

Over the years the network has emerged as a group that takes strong public positions on journalists’ rights and media ethics, while standing alongside women mediapersons in various struggles for justice – both individual and collective.

As a collective endeavour – informal, decentralised and non-hierarchical, with no institutional affiliation, infrastructure, secretariat, office-bearers, staff or funds – the NWMI's evolution and potential impact depends on the participation and contribution of everyone involved. Decision-making has been largely transparent and consensus-based, following extensive deliberation.

The periodic national-level meetings of the NWMI, held in different parts of the country almost every year since 2002, have become eagerly anticipated features of network activity. Each meeting is planned and organised by volunteer members of local networks, who somehow make the time and summon up the energy and enthusiasm to do so in the midst of their own professional work and other preoccupations.

Name: Nobis Communication srl
Description:
Diamo forma ai brand con metodo, strategia e creatività.
Siamo Nobis Communication, un’agenzia di comunicazione con sede a Pomezia, specializzata in branding, grafica, marketing digitale e design visivo per aziende che vogliono distinguersi nel proprio settore.
Affianchiamo realtà farmaceutiche, cosmetiche, alimentari e B2B per trasformare idee in identità forti, visibili e coerenti su ogni canale.

Crediamo che ogni brand meriti una voce unica, un linguaggio visivo distintivo e una strategia chiara. Per questo, ogni progetto parte da un’analisi approfondita del mercato, del target e dei valori aziendali. Solo così possiamo costruire una comunicazione che funziona davvero: su misura, senza cliché, pensata per ottenere risultati concreti.

 Cosa facciamo

Brand identity: naming, logo design, visual system, brand book

Graphic design: brochure, cataloghi, materiali informativi, espositori

Packaging design: farmaceutico, cosmetico, alimentare, anche multilingua

Marketing digitale: campagne social, advertising Meta e Google Ads

Comunicazione scientifica: schede prodotto, presentazioni, materiali per informatori

Eventi e trade marketing: kit aziendali, materiali per fiere e congressi

Utilizziamo strumenti professionali come Adobe Creative Suite, Meta Business Suite, Google Ads e CMS avanzati per garantire un lavoro curato in ogni dettaglio. Lavoriamo in modo agile e diretto, mantenendo alta la qualità anche su progetti con deadline serrate.

 Siamo operativi tra Roma, Pomezia, Ardea e Aprilia, ma gestiamo progetti anche da remoto, in tutta Italia e all’estero.

Con Nobis Communication il tuo brand non solo si fa notare: parla, convince e resta nella mente delle persone.

Name: Distances+
Description:
Distances+ est un média numérique journalistique francophone indépendant consacré à la course à pied, et plus particulièrement au trail running, à l’aventure et aux sports de plein air.

Le Magazine Distances+ est né au Québec en 2015, avec un lancement officiel lors de l’UTMB 2016.

En 2020, une édition française du webzine a vu le jour, marquant une nouvelle étape dans son développement international.

Devenu en 2022 un média spécialisé global, Distances+ a franchi un cap avec la création du podcast La Bande à D+, le talk-show du trail et de l’ultra-trail. Il n’a cessé d’évoluer et de se diversifier depuis.

Aujourd’hui propriété des Productions D+, Distances+ a lancé en 2025 trois formats hebdomadaires dédiés à l’actualité du trail :

– le Récap D+, un carrousel d’informations diffusé sur les réseaux sociaux ;
– le podcast Récap D+, un flash info audio sur l’actualité du trail ;
– la newsletter Extra D+, un rendez-vous éditorial exclusif.

Distances+ s’est également forgé une solide réputation grâce à la qualité de ses reportages et à sa couverture à 360° des événements sur le terrain.

À l’été 2025, les Productions D+ ont aussi lancé PC Course, un podcast conversationnel, inspirant et intimiste, animé par Mélissa Mergoil, qui donne principalement la parole à des femmes.

Name: Money Talk
Description:
Découvrez la finance sous un nouvel angle ! 

La finance est partout : dans le sport, l’industrie, la santé, le luxe ou encore l’environnement. Pourtant, elle reste souvent perçue comme un domaine complexe et technique. Notre projet a pour ambition de la rendre accessible à tous en explorant son impact dans ces différents secteurs à travers une série de podcasts, de vidéos et de publications sur les réseaux sociaux.

- Les podcasts (30 à 45 min) accueilleront des experts pour analyser la finance sectorielle et réfléchir à son évolution.
- Des contenus pédagogiques (posts) permettront de mieux comprendre les fondamentaux de l’analyse financière et les métiers du secteur.

Objectif ? Démocratiser la finance, montrer son rôle dans les enjeux éthiques et durables, et offrir un regard nouveau sur ce domaine essentiel à l’économie. 

Rejoignez-nous pour découvrir comment la finance façonne notre monde !

Name: Medien-Club München e.V.
Description:
Der Medien-Club München e.V. ist ein renommiertes Netzwerk für Fachleute aus der Medien- und Kommunikationsbranche, die in München und der Region tätig sind. Seit unserer Gründung im Jahr 1985 fördern wir den professionellen Austausch, die Weiterbildung und das kreative Zusammenwirken von Medienschaffenden aus unterschiedlichsten Bereichen – von Film, Fernsehen und Radio bis hin zu Digital- und Online-Medien. Unsere Mitglieder umfassen erfahrene Profis ebenso wie aufstrebende Talente und Start-ups, die sich den Herausforderungen und Chancen der sich stetig wandelnden Medienlandschaft stellen.

Unsere Mission:

Als zentrale Plattform für den Medienstandort München schaffen wir Raum für Inspiration und Dialog. Wir bieten unseren Mitgliedern wertvolle Kontakte und Expertise, die ihnen dabei helfen, in einer dynamischen Branche erfolgreich zu agieren. Durch regelmäßige Clubabende, Fachvorträge und Netzwerk-Events bieten wir die Möglichkeit, sich mit führenden Persönlichkeiten aus Politik, Wirtschaft und Medien auszutauschen und aktuelle Entwicklungen zu diskutieren.

Für wen wir da sind:

Unsere Türen stehen allen offen, die sich für die Zukunft der Medienbranche interessieren – vom Freelancer über Unternehmensvertreter bis hin zu Kreativen, die sich weiterbilden und vernetzen möchten. Auch für Unternehmen, die medienpolitische und wirtschaftliche Themen voranbringen wollen, sind wir die richtige Anlaufstelle.

Warum der Medien-Club München?

Unser Verein blickt auf eine lange Tradition zurück, doch unser Blick ist fest auf die Zukunft gerichtet. In einer Zeit, in der Medien- und Kommunikationsformen sich schneller verändern als je zuvor, bieten wir Orientierung und Unterstützung. Gemeinsam setzen wir Impulse, um München als Medienstandort zu stärken und den Wandel der Branche aktiv mitzugestalten.

Treten Sie mit uns in Kontakt und werden Sie Teil unseres Netzwerks!

Name: Health Media Consultancy
Description:
At Health Media Consultancy, we provide bespoke strategy and services to help our clients deliver impactful health-related campaigns.

As clinicians and established creators ourselves, we know the power of impactful public health campaigns via social media. We’re here to help your organisation to reach out to your intended target audience. Our personal profiles reach a global audience of over 1 million people a month. We’ve forged strong links with social media companies, global health organisations, and fellow creators. We base our strategy on strong industry experience and networks, as well as high volume data-driven analytics, to establish personalised solutions.

OUR SERVICES:

1. CONSULTING: We provide advice and consultancy services on how your organisation can best utilise and take advantage of social media, in order to deliver impactful health campaigns.

2. CONTENT STRATEGY: We will work with you to create a tailor-made content strategy. We can help align your brand’s voice to the health message you’d like to portray, and customise it for each of your target social media platforms.

3. PROFESSIONAL COACHING: Whether you want to gain new clients, become a key opinion leader, take up a leadership role, or reach out to a global audience – we’re here to help you reach the next level, with a focus on social media outreach.

4. ANALYTICS & RESEARCH: Our clinical and academic background means that we pride ourselves on being evidence-based and data-driven. We provide deep analytics to inform creators, organisations, and policy makers. We analyse multiple sources to understand current and future trends. We have a track record of national public health campaigns via social platforms, with our data analytics informing policy changes.

5. VIDEO PRODUCTION: As experienced creators ourselves, we know what great health-related videos look like! We can help in the production process and get you up to speed on the best practices.

Name: Zakład Elektroakustyki - Politechnika Warszawska
Description:
The Electroacoustics Department of the Warsaw University of Technology conducts research in the following subjects: physical fundamentals of acoustics, musical acoustics, architectural acoustics, sound perception and modelling, psychoacoustics, methodology of listening tests, subjective and objective methods of sound quality research, acoustic and electroacoustic measurement systems, electroacoustic transducers, sound studio technology, digital audio technology, digital audio signal processing, digital audio systems, environmental noise protection, hearing protectors, signal processors in audio applications, sound synthesis methods and algorithms.

Zakład Elektroakustyki prowadzi działalność badawczą w następujących tematach: fizyczne podstawy akustyki, akustyka muzyczna, akustyka architektoniczna, odbiór i kształtowanie dźwięku, psychoakustyka, metodyka testów słuchowych, subiektywne i obiektywne metody badań jakości dźwięku, akustyczne i elektroakustyczne systemy pomiarowe, przetworniki elektroakustyczne, dźwiękowa technika studyjna, cyfrowa technika foniczna, cyfrowe przetwarzanie sygnałów fonicznych, cyfrowe systemy foniczne, ochrona środowiska naturalnego przed hałasem, ochronniki słuchu, procesory sygnałowe w zastosowaniach fonicznych, metody i algorytmy syntezy dźwięku.

Name: Ruta1825
Description:
Bienvenidos a Ruta 1825!
Llegaste a este espacio digital porqué te gusta conocer, disfrutar, saborear, vivir cada instante de tu vida. 
En Ruta 1825 tendrás una travesía que te ofrecerá información valiosa e imágenes espectaculares de lo que sucede en el corazón de América del Sur. Bolivia tiene una superficie de 1.098.581 Km2 y te llevaremos desde las montañas más altas, como el Illimani, hasta la imponente Amazonía. 
Conocerás historias de éxito de emprendedores y empresarios cuyos productos y servicios están marcando diferencia desde el mercado boliviano para el mundo. Y también tendrás la posibilidad de ir tejiendo redes de contactos de calidad.
Encontrarás contenidos de valor e impacto, con veracidad, oportunidad, confiabilidad y ética. Los diversos géneros periodísticos nos permiten contarte lo que acontece en la cultura y economía boliviana, con énfasis en el turismo, gastronomía, moda, artesanía, la industria automotriz, la oferta exportable y una diversidad de acciones que generan impactos positivos.
Inicia tu aventura...

Name: Infotur Dominicano
Description:
Infotur Dominicano es tu fuente diaria de información especializada en turismo, economía y noticias de crecimiento estratégico para República Dominicana. Nos comprometemos a proveer contenido confiable, actualizado y relevante, que impulsa decisiones informadas en los sectores turístico, financiero, empresarial y social del país.

Qué hacemos:

- Cubrimos eventos y tendencias ligadas al turismo nacional e internacional, aviación, desarrollo de destinos, infraestructura hotelera y servicios asociados.

- Reportamos novedades macroeconómicas que influyen en el sector turístico: inflación, políticas públicas, inversión extranjera, regulaciones, etc.

- Publicamos historias de innovación local, ferias, emprendimientos, inclusión social y sostenibilidad vinculada al turismo.

Nuestra misión:
Ser el puente entre actores del turismo, inversores y la comunidad general, ofreciendo un panorama claro y multidimensional de lo que sucede en RD. Nos interesa no solo lo que está pasando, sino lo que viene, cómo aprovecharlo y cómo todos podemos crecer con él.

Por qué elegirnos:

Información fresca y verificada, con enfoque local pero visión global.

Cobertura de temas diversos, que van más allá de lo tradicional: economía, medio ambiente, tecnología aplicada al turismo, responsabilidad social.

Plataforma de diálogo: conectamos al lector con las historias, los actores y las oportunidades que están dejando huella.

Síguenos para mantenerte al día con lo que sucede en el turismo dominicano, compartir ideas, descubrir oportunidades y construir alianzas. En Infotur Dominicano creemos que todos tenemos un papel en desarrollar un turismo más fuerte, inclusivo y sostenible.

Name: Muzikalia

Name: Di Tieri
Description: La nostra storia ha più di 60 anni… inizia nel 1961 con l’apertura del primo punto vendita a Pescara. Abbiamo attraversato le epoche tecnologiche che si sono susseguite negli anni sessanta, settanta e ottanta, dalla tv in bianco e nero al colore, dalla radio all’alta fedelta’. Negli anni novanta il tradizionale negozio di elettrodomestici si rinnova proponendosi come specialista audio video ma l’avvento della telefonia mobile e’ alle porte e impone una specializzazione sempre piu’ marcata. Nel maggio 1998 abbiamo inaugurato il secondo punto vendita a Pescara, in viale Marconi. E’ l’inizio dello sviluppo della attuale rete di punti vendita, tutti contraddistinti da uno staff competente e disponibile, in grado di proporre prodotti e servizi di telefonia fissa e mobile mirati alla soddisfazione delle necessità di comunicazione dei nostri clienti, siano essi privati o aziende. La determinazione nel proporre sempre il miglior prezzo, l’attenzione che dedichiamo al cliente al momento dell’acquisto, la consulenza che offriamo nel post vendita rappresentano la nostra missione.

Consistent Execution at First-Class Standards
We build out curated systems for each client that ensure content is delivered on schedule, at the highest level, and always aligned with your brand identity. We don’t cut corners: we create consistency that actually converts.

Tailored Experiences
Every client has direct access to a dedicated Content Manager who leads strategy, communication, and creative development. It’s a real working relationship, not a customer service rep. Our team becomes your team, and we move fast, smart, and with care.

Accessible Excellence

Créé en 1974, le journal est écrit et géré par les étudiants de droit. Sont également publiés des textes de collaborateurs internationaux, essentiellement des étudiants de la Faculté participant à des programmes d'échanges.

Le Pigeon Dissident est distribué dans les murs de la Faculté de droit, sur le campus de l'Université de Montréal ainsi que chez certains collaborateurs du milieu juridique et non-juridique.

Healing Lifestyles & Spas' content focuses on infusing integrative spa modalities and destination spa experiences ~ healing remedies ~ integrative medicine ~ safe beauty & body ~ wellness and sustainable practices into our daily lives; providing tools and inspiration to live a more healthy and healing lifestyle.

We believe that 'spa' living is a day-to-day experience. We all need to slow down, press pause, and nurture this absolute need to give back to ourselves. Living a healing lifestyle means taking care of the Earth and its people, and we thereby emphasize environmental wellness and sustainable living as a necessary component on this path.

Name: Sesayè
Description:
Sesayé is a curated platform at the intersection of fashion, culture, and neuroscience. Fashion, to us, is more than clothing. It’s storytelling, identity, and cognitive experience. Our mission is to create a space where authenticity meets insight, helping our audience uncover the psychological and cultural layers behind the styles they choose and the trends they follow.

We aim to highlight the ways fashion and neuroaesthetics intersect, providing perspectives that inspire creativity and elevate the conversation around style. Each piece reflects our commitment to individuality, intellectual curiosity, and purposeful self-expression.

Sesayé is for those who want to engage deeply with fashion, explore its cognitive and cultural dimensions, and embrace a personal aesthetic that’s informed, intentional, and authentic. We’re not just a brand—we’re a platform for thinking, feeling, and experiencing fashion and the arts in a more inspired and insightful way.

Name: Media for Democracy
Description: Media for Democracy (MFD) is a project run by Universal Reach Foundation, a non-governmental organization. MFD works to promote and protect freedom of expression, access to information, and independent media as key components of democratic societies. They aim to support the development of a strong and independent media sector that can serve as a watchdog, holding those in power accountable, and as a platform for public debate, facilitating the exchange of diverse views and opinions. MFD's programs focus on strengthening the capacity of media professionals and organizations, promoting media literacy and digital skills, advocating for legal and policy reforms that protect freedom of expression and access to information, and supporting innovative initiatives that use media to empower marginalized communities and promote social change. MFD is based in India, but their work has a regional and global reach, collaborating with media stakeholders, civil society organizations, and governments in South Asia and beyond.

Name: TRIK TALK
Description:
*** TRIK TALK – en quelques mots

TRIK TALK, c’est une journée pour parler de la route en Algérie. On réunit décideurs, entreprises et experts, non pas pour décrire les problèmes, mais pour envisager des pistes de solutions.
Au programme : échanges, ateliers, retours d’expérience. L’ambition est de rendre la route plus sûre, de fluidifier la circulation et d’encourager des choix technologiques cohérents avec le quotidien.On écoute, on échange, on avance.
En une journée, on passe du constat aux solutions envisageables.

*** Un événement porté par Info Trafic Algérie ***

Depuis 2013, Info Trafic Algérie est le premier média digital dédié au transport, à la logistique et à la mobilité.
Avec plus de 2 millions de citoyens connectés, il informe, sensibilise et fédère une communauté engagée autour des enjeux de mobilité et de sécurité routière.

*** Appel à sponsors & speakers ***

TRIK TALK s’adresse aux acteurs qui façonnent la mobilité. Entreprises, institutions et experts sont invités à partager leurs visions et retours d’expérience.

Devenir sponsor, c’est associer sa marque à un événement de référence et gagner en visibilité auprès des décideurs B2B.
Intervenir comme speaker, c’est nourrir les échanges et contribuer au débat sur les enjeux de la route en Algérie.

Name: Fight To Repair News
Description: In a world that is increasingly populated by smart, Internet connected and software driven "stuff," your rights of ownership - including the right and ability to service and maintain your own property - are in jeopardy. Even as the world moves to embrace "circular economy" principles that minimize waste and maximize reuse, repair and recycling, large, powerful corporations and corporate interests are pushing in the opposite direction: using expansive arguments about copyright and intellectual property to push small businesses out of existence and build software-enforced monopolies over service, parts and repair. But people are fighting back. Fight to Repair covers the grassroots battle to be able to fix our own stuff and - in the process - empower consumers, small businesses, the marketplace and the planet. Free subscriptions include our weekly Fight to Repair news roundup. Paid subscribers get early access to our original reporting, podcasts and other exclusive content.

Promis, Musikerinnen und Musiker sowie Stars kommen gerne im KISS-Studio vorbei und sind regelmäßiger Teil der Shows: On Air & Off Air sowie bei Social Media & digital.

Línia és singular perquè és alhora un diari digital metropolità que aspira a ser un altaveu de la gran metròpoli i, paral·lelament, l’únic mitjà de comunicació local que cobreix els deu districtes de la ciutat de Barcelona amb 10 edicions diferents, més una onzena edició específica centrada exclusivament en la Rambla, la qual cosa permet potenciar i segmentar el missatge en tots els barris de la capital catalana.

A més, distribueix edicions amb continguts específics i diferenciats al Barcelonès Nord, l’Hospitalet, Cornellà, Castelldefels, Gavà, Viladecans, el Prat, Sant Boi, l’entorn d’Esplugues i de Martorell (Montserratí) i el Baix Maresme. També cobreix tota la comarca del Vallès Oriental (entorns de Granollers i Mollet) i té una edició específica a la zona de Cerdanyola.

Nacimos de procesos migratorios singulares que nos confrontaron con la identidad, la lengua y el deseo de alojar la incertidumbre de otros. Por ello creamos un espacio colectivo de palabra y escucha, donde las historias se narran como son: sin adornos ni romanticismos.

Este podcast invita a habitar lo incómodo, lo ambiguo, lo incierto. A dejar que las palabras viajen, tropiecen y se reconstruyan. A decir lo que muchas veces no se dice: poner voz — a veces rota, a veces extranjera- a experiencias que transforman para siempre.

Name: Voix d'Exils
Description:
Voix d’Exils est un site d’information destiné à l’expression libre des personnes migrantes. Ses missions sont de porter leurs voix au travers des contenus qu’ils publient sur le site, créer un pont avec le pays d’accueil et stimuler un débat constructif sur les questions de migration et de société. Voix d’Exils est un des rares médias en Suisse qui offre une vision de la migration et de l’asile de l’intérieur en privilégiant les témoignages et les points de vue des acteurs du terrain. Ce média en ligne publie des contenus multimédia en français, anglais et arabe. 

Le média Voix d’Exils est produit par un programme d’intégration intercantonal qui est le fruit d’une collaboration entre l’Etablissement vaudois d’accueil des migrants, le Service de l’action sociale du Valais et le Service des migrations de Neuchâtel. Le programme Voix d’Exils vise à favoriser l’intégration sociale et professionnelle des personnes migrantes qui l’anime en leur offrant la possibilité d’acquérir des compétences transférables et spécifiques en communication.

Name: Darsh Digital Network Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Mr. Sushil Kumar had dreamt of venturing into Entertainment/Cable industry and they joined hands and hence the plan was given shape in the form of DARSH DIGITAL NETWORK PVT. LTD. (DDNPL) established on 13th Aug. 2008 and gained massive popularity within a very short period i.e. approx. 4 years by covering a maximum area of entire Bihar which gradually became the biggest Cable Network. As the time elapsed a strong need was felt for a Hindi News Channel which could deliver Local & Regional News. By this time Darsh Music, Darsh Entertainment & Darsh Cinema (three already successfully running Channel of DDNPL) had already gained enough popularity and only thing missing was a News Channel which emerged in the form of Darsh News. So, an initiative was taken to launch an Infotainment Channel of Bihar. The Channel is broadcasted 24 * 7 with true and current news running every hour as well as variety of Programs such as Aap Ki Rasoi, Cinema Aap Aur Hum, Darsh Talkies, Dil Ki Baat, Fashion Ka Jalwa, Rang Tarang etc. to cater the need of diversified group of viewers. Darsh News was on Test Signal from 20th November 2009 and was finally launched on 14th March 2010 by his Excellency Governor of Bihar, Mr. Devanand Kunwar along with the Honorable Chief Minister of Bihar Mr. Nitish Kumar. The other key invitees were Ravi Kishan, Shweta Tiwari, Debojeet, Anwesha & and Broadcasters of several leading Channels were also present in the launching ceremony.

Name: Agencia CTyS-UNLaM
Description:
Nacida a fines de 2010, la Agencia CTyS-UNLaM (Ciencia, Tecnología y Sociedad) de la Universidad Nacional de La Matanza se propone, desde sus orígenes, contar el devenir de la ciencia y la tecnología que se realiza en instituciones y universidades públicas de Argentina. Para ello, utiliza un lenguaje ameno y atractivo, incluyendo, al mismo tiempo, la rigurosidad científica.

Sus contenidos periodísticos (artículos, crónicas, informes, entrevistas y columnas de opinión, entre otros), con gran impacto a nivel nacional e internacional, dan cuenta las novedades y el día a día de la ciencia, con resultados de investigación, innovaciones y hallazgos, entre otros.

A su vez, los artículos también narran las problemáticas, desafíos e inquietudes que enfrentan los actores que hacen y producen la ciencia y la tecnología en el país. De esta forma, la Agencia contribuye a la construcción de un concepto de la ciencia como un producto cultural y político, que no solo se limita a publicaciones de papers sino que está íntimamente ligado a otras esferas y ámbitos de la sociedad.

La producción periodística de la Agencia, además, está atravesada por una perspectiva tanto federal (con entrevistados a lo largo y a lo ancho del país) como interdisciplinaria (con la inclusión de distintos saberes y lenguajes científicos). Al ser parte de la Escuela de Artes y Medios de Comunicación de la UNLaM, se vale, además de la gráfica, de otros lenguajes (radiofónicos, audiovisuales, redes sociales, etc.) para contar la ciencia y llegar, así, a más públicos.

Los contenidos de la Agencia CTyS-UNLaM son totalmente gratuitos y de libre difusión (con la correspondiente cita de la fuente), contribuyendo, de esta manera, al fortalecimiento de la comunicación pública de la ciencia en distintos ámbitos.

Name: Purple Sneakers
Description:
#TrustedForTaste for over fifteen years, Purple Sneakers is Australia’s most respected electronic, dance, hip hop and indie music hubs. With its origins as one of Sydney’s most notorious underground parties and becoming a trusted music tastemaker, Purple Sneakers is the place underground music fans have turned for nearly two generations to connect with what’s hot both today and tomorrow.

Anchored by the country’s most respected music website with a true passion for both music and independent, quality music journalism, Purple Sneakers has created a passionate community with live events, playlists, parties, compilation albums and DJs.

Purple Sneakers continues to be the glue that holds the scene together with monthly parties in its hometown of Sydney and a dedicated social media following across TikTok and Instagram that has the brand continuing to evolve and grow its audience. 

Some of Australia’s biggest musical names got their first shows at Purple Sneakers parties including Flume, Rufus du Sol, Alison Wonderland, The Rubens, What So Not, The Jezabels and Nina Las Vegas, while Purple Sneakers DJs have brought the tunes at festivals including Splendour in the Grass, Groovin The Moo, Falls, Beyond the Valley, Big Day Out and many more as well as on Sydney’s FBI Radio.

Part of the SGC Media Group

Name: Multi-Hyphenate Women
Description:
Building a media and learning company that closes the wealth gap and visibility gap for women who refuse to choose one thing. We create tools, co-produce original media, and invest in women-led platforms shaping culture and economic power.

Our mission: Turn visibility into value. Make infrastructure for women with range. Fund the next generation through scholarships and micro-grants.

1. AI For Real Life 


Most AI training is designed by tech bros, for tech bros. It assumes unlimited time, no caregiving responsibilities, and doesn’t address what women actually ask: “How do I use this without losing my voice?” “Will this replace me?”
AI For Real Life is different: weekly co-working sessions, bi-weekly office hours, monthly masterclasses, and a community where women learn AI by doing—not theory. We cover prompts, automation, content creation, and real business applications.

2. The Dream Life Engine

A life design membership platform where women learn, track, and achieve goals across six categories: Money & Career, Health & Wellness, Relationships, Lifestyle & Creativity, Mindset & Spirituality, and Adventure & Contribution.
What you get: AI coaches, Productivity tools, accountability pods, masterclasses, goal tracking with gamification, and a dashboard showing how all six life areas connect.

Every membership funds a scholarship seat for another woman + micro-grants for women-led projects. Your growth fuels someone else’s.

3. Media Studio
We co-create original IP like books. TV and media with women and mission-led brands. 

What makes it different: We don’t extract stories. We co-own them. Equity > exposure.

4. Media Fund
We invest in women-led media platforms shaping the future of content, technology, and economic power.

𝗪𝗵𝘆?

Every hour women spend on unpaid care is an hour not building wealth. Every AI tool built without us is another system that leaves us behind. We’re done waiting for permission to be visible, valuable, and paid what we’re worth.

Name: The Daily Dazzling Dawn
Description:
The Daily Dazzling Dawn an inspiring and ambitious project with a noble mission of promoting ethical journalism with truth, accuracy, and proficiency. As the first and only international non-profit newspaper owned by professional journalists from British Bangladeshi origin with 20 years of experience in global journalism, it has the potential to make a significant impact in the field of media and journalism.

Ensuring that the content published in The Daily Dazzling Dawn upholds the highest standards of journalism, adhering to principles of accuracy, fairness, and transparency. Encourage investigative reporting, in-depth analysis, and diverse perspectives on global issues.

Fostering a strong relationship with our readers and the communities we serve. Encourage feedback, promote dialogue, and actively listen to the voices of our audience to ensure that The Daily Dazzling Dawn remains relevant and responsive to their needs.

The Daily Dazzling Dawn to advocate for important causes, champion press freedom, and drive positive change in society. Highlight issues of social justice, human rights, and environmental sustainability through impactful journalism.

Journalist and Writer Munzer Ahmed Chowdhury is the founder of the newspaper. From its founding, he has played for Editor & Publisher role. Who said, "A quality newspaper publishing, especially in this day's more than a war in the financial context. We are trying to keep journalistic ethical practice alive with our best efforts. Let the practice of this media house towards our moral values, non-partisan journalism, and professional journalism inspire the reader. We owe it to the reader. Our journalism is dedicated to the development of Britain and Bangladesh. We search for news from country to country in the world. Even though we are non-partisan, we keep the voice of oppressed people in the world and society above religion, race, and ethnicity.

Name: Karsh Journalism Fellowship
Description:
The just-launched Karsh Journalism Fellowship is the world’s only journalism program that gives early-career journalists education, training, and mentorship to report on Jewish issues with depth and accuracy. 

Beginning in 2026, it aims to do for Jewish issues what the Knight Science Journalism Fellowship does for science — providing the specialized training reporters need to cover a nuanced and often misunderstood beat with expertise.

The fellowship is nonpartisan and adheres to the highest standards of journalism. Its mentors include journalists from The New York Times, Atlantic, New Yorker, CNN and many esteemed outlets. It is open to recent J-school graduates and working journalists on all platforms. 

In the inaugural year, we will select 10 fellows from around the country who will attend a total of three retreats, in Los Angeles, New York and Washington, D.C. Fellows receive a $4,000 stipend and all travel expenses paid.

During the three retreats, fellows will learn from academics, activists, journalists and Jewish leaders. There will be on-site visits, such as to the Academy Museum in L.A. for a session with a leading showrunner on Jews and Hollywood, as well as sessions examining Israel, antisemitism, the Holocaust, the Jewish vote, and other issues.

The fellowship is nonpartisan and dedicated to the highest journalistic standards. The fellows, mentors and presenters will come from a variety of backgrounds, outlooks and platforms. 

Applications now open!

Name: Associated Press Sports Editors (APSE)
Description:
The Associated Press Sports Editors (APSE) is a national organization of sports editors and digital sports media leaders committed to advancing the profession of sports journalism.

Since our founding in 1974 — when 126 editors gathered in New York City — we’ve grown into a powerful force for professional development, ethical standards, and industry innovation. Our early efforts led a national movement to elevate sports journalism across all platforms.

Today, APSE empowers members through year-round workshops, leadership development, and our annual summer conference. Our cornerstone programs include:

• The APSE Contest – Recognizing the best in sports writing, projects, and digital presentation
• The Red Smith Award – The highest individual honor in sports journalism
• The Diversity Fellowship and Sports Journalism Institute – Cultivating the next generation of journalists through mentoring, training, and opportunity

We also maintain strong partnerships with major sports leagues and organizations like the NCAA and U.S. Olympic Committee to advocate for access, equity, and journalistic standards.

From metro newspapers to digital startups, APSE is the home for anyone serious about sports media. If you believe in great storytelling, bold leadership, and a better future for journalism, you belong here.

Description:

¿Por qué un podcast de Latinoamérica?
Latinoamérica enfrenta numerosas amenazas y desafíos, desde el cambio climático hasta la vulneración de los derechos humanos, pasando por la pérdida de la biodiversidad, los esfuerzos para alcanzar la sostenibilidad y la voraz expansión de las industrias extractivas.

Más de 17 millones de personas podrían ser desplazadas debido a la escasez de agua y otros recursos vitales causados por la crisis climática. No podemos quedarnos de brazos cruzados!

Es por este motivo que Late Latinoamérica busca abordar los contextos territoriales desde una mirada regional diversa que abarque aspectos culturales, sociales, políticos, económicos y ambientales.

Nuestro compromiso
Te ofrecemos un formato fresco, informativo y conversacional que te permite adquirir diversas perspectivas sobre los desafíos de nuestra región.

En Late Latinoamérica podrás encontrar y escuchar las voces de agentes de cambio, lideresas y líderes de pueblos, comunidades, organizaciones y asociaciones, activistas y expertos de la región.

Name: Lekker Passport
Description:
Lekker Passport is a South African movement dedicated to discovering and supporting local places — especially the ones you’d miss if you stayed on the main road.

It began with a simple pattern. Every time we visited a brewery in a small town, the conversation quickly moved beyond beer to everything else worth seeing: the farm stall locals swear by, the baker who opens early, the café everyone argues about, the maker quietly doing things right.

Lekker Passport exists to capture those recommendations.

We celebrate small towns, local makers, and the people who give places their character. Not the obvious stops — the meaningful ones.

At the heart of the movement is the Lekker Map, a digital guide that helps you find local places and trusted recommendations as you travel, and the Lekker Passport, a printed companion designed to help you remember the journey with notes, stamps, and stories.

The map helps you find your way.
The passport helps you remember the journey.

Lekker Passport is proudly South African. It’s shaped by our roads, our towns, our humour, and our way of doing things. It doesn’t try to travel the world. It stays rooted — because that’s where its strength lies.

The movement is powered by Friends of Lekker Passport — trusted explorers who help keep it grounded in real experience by sharing the quiet “you must go there” recommendations that make our roads worth travelling.

Take the long way.
Support local.
Discover what makes South Africa lekker.

Name: The Shorthorn Media
Description:
Years before the “UT” preceded the “A’  at the college now known as the University of Texas at Arlington, and years before there was a Longhorn in the family, there was The Shorthorn. No relation, thanks. 

In 1919, students at what was then known as Grubbs Vocational College needed a name for their fledgling literary/humor magazine. With a $2.50 prize from the dean as incentive, an ensuing contest yielded such poetic possibilities as KornKob, Swat News, Horse Sense, Grubworm and Tool for the name of the new publication. In a three-ballot election runoff, the student body chose Shorthorn over other finalists GVC Shots and Thistle.

The first issue — 6 by 9 inches, 48 pages with a bull in a bull’s-eye for a cover — appeared in April 1919. The first newsroom masqueraded as a wide spot in the hallway leading to the adviser’s office on the third floor of Ransom Hall, the campus' oldest building. 

The Shorthorn evolved into a newspaper in 1921 and has thrived in spite of a world war, the Depression, ice storms and too many technical conversions and computer crashes to count. On a campus noted for change, The Shorthorn has been a constant, growing into a daily publication in 1977 after stints as a biweekly and weekly. Theshorthorn.com, our online edition, was added in 1997, making Shorthorn content available to anyone, anywhere 24/7. The Shorthorn, which celebrated its centennial in 2019, remains one of UTA’s oldest traditions and most-respected sources of news, information and experience.

At the Citrus County Chronicle, we take pride in being a trusted source of news and information for the residents of Citrus County and beyond. Our dedicated team of journalists, editors, and staff members is committed to upholding the highest standards of journalism ethics and providing our readers with a comprehensive understanding of the issues that matter most to them. We believe in the power of journalism to inform, inspire, and engage, and we strive to be a catalyst for positive change within our community.

Beyond our print publication, we have embraced the digital era, leveraging cutting-edge technology and platforms to reach an even wider audience. Our online presence allows us to deliver news updates in real-time, engage with our readers through social media, and provide multimedia content that enhances the storytelling experience.

We understand the importance of community involvement and actively seek to foster a strong connection with our readers. We encourage open dialogue, invite constructive feedback, and value diverse perspectives. By actively engaging with our community, we aim to strengthen the bond between our publication and the people we serve.

As the Citrus County Chronicle, we are more than just a newspaper. We are a dedicated team of professionals who are passionate about journalism and dedicated to serving the information needs of our community. We are proud to be a trusted source of news, a platform for open dialogue, and a driving force behind positive change in Citrus County.

Name: Tideline Partners LLC
Description:
At Tideline Partners LLC, we specialize in delivering comprehensive media brokerage, consulting and valuation services to radio and television broadcasters across the United States. Our mission is to help clients maximize the value of their broadcasting assets, navigate the ever-changing media landscape, and achieve their strategic objectives. With a legacy of experience spanning over two decades, we are committed to delivering results with unwavering integrity.

Greg Guy, the driving force behind Tideline Partners, has over 25 years of media brokerage experience. His career has seen him successfully broker the sale of more than 500 stations, collectively valued at over $2 billion. This includes expertise in representing a diverse range of broadcasters, from small local owners to publicly traded corporations.

In a competitive landscape, it's our commitment to integrity that truly sets us apart. We believe in conducting business with transparency, honesty, and the highest ethical standards. Our clients trust us not only for our expertise but also for our unwavering dedication to their best interests.

Results speak for themselves, and at Tideline Partners, our track record is a testament to our commitment to delivering exceptional results. We have consistently exceeded client expectations, and our success stories are a reflection of our dedication to achieving our clients' objectives efficiently and discreetly.

In the current economic climate, station values are more dynamic than ever. It takes a broker with extensive experience and a keen understanding of the industry to guide clients through the complexities of selling broadcasting assets. Tideline Partners is your trusted partner in navigating this uncertainty.

Name: Actualidad Castellón
Description:
Ubicado en el núcleo de la provincia de Castellón, "Actualidad Castellón" emerge como el principal canal digital que revela la cultura, vida y eventos de esta región única. Desde su fundación, nos dedicamos a mantener a la comunidad al tanto, presentando noticias actuales, relevantes y veraces que encapsulan la esencia castellonense.

No es meramente un periódico digital; es una entidad comunicativa que prioriza la calidad periodística y la veracidad. Nuestro equipo combina tradición periodística con avances digitales, asegurando información fresca, objetiva y profunda para nuestros lectores.

La rica diversidad de Castellón se refleja en nuestras secciones: desde política y economía, hasta cultura y deportes. Además, contamos con colaboraciones de voces locales, lo que garantiza una representación íntegra de la provincia.

Comprendiendo la era digital, hemos adaptado plataformas interactivas y aplicaciones móviles, permitiendo a los seguidores mantenerse informados en cualquier lugar. Valores como la comunidad son fundamentales para nosotros. Fomentamos la interacción lectora a través de encuestas, foros y opiniones, creando un diálogo enriquecedor.

En "Actualidad Castellón", el compromiso trasciende las noticias; se extiende a toda la provincia y su gente. Eventos y charlas son parte de nuestro aporte para consolidar el vínculo cultural y social de Castellón.

Te invitamos a ser parte de nuestra comunidad y a descubrir, día a día, las maravillas de esta región.
Location: Castellón de la Plana, Valencian Community

Name: Al Mawja Al Jedida
Description:
Média centré sur les pays arabo-musulmans – de l’Afrique du Nord au Bilad al-Cham, jusqu’au Golfe arabo-persique – Al Mawja choisit de raconter la région par ses dynamiques sociales internes plutôt que par ses crises ou les regards extérieurs. Là où l’imaginaire médiatique dominant est saturé de cartes géopolitiques, d’analyses militaires et de prismes sécuritaires, notre ambition est d’élargir l’horizon : mettre en lumière les cultures vivantes (musique, art, gastronomie), suivre les transformations sociales (identités, diasporas, jeunesse, place des femmes), explorer les villes et territoires (urbanisme, mobilité, patrimoine), valoriser les savoirs et la recherche (climat, innovation, sciences), et analyser une multitude de sujets par le prisme des sciences sociales (le sport comme force de rayonnement et de soft power, la diplomatie  culturelle...).

Analytique sans être académique, engagé sans être partisan, Al Mawja Al Jedida est une invitation à dialoguer, à multiplier les regards et à relire les évidences. Parce que comprendre la zone Méditerranée Moyen-Orient suppose de dépasser les conventions, d’écouter les voix intérieures, et d’oser des narrations nouvelles.

Name: Mary Ann Shadd Cary Centre for Journalism and Belonging
Description:
Housed at Carleton University’s School of Journalism and Communications, the Centre conducts research, creates community-focused journalism and networking opportunities for equity- deserving groups, produces research-based journalism that Centers belonging, and archives all associated work, creation and activities. Through research, student training, community building and media production, and by partnering with industry organizations, community leaders and youth, the Centre will focus on race, gender, sexual orientation, disability, socioeconomic status and the intersections therein to foster a more inclusive journalism industry.

The Mary Ann Shadd Cary Centre for Journalism and Belonging was founded in 2023 by journalist and educator @nanaabaduncan with permission from the Shadd family to emphasize Shadd Cary’s contribution to journalism in Canada.

Name: Red Arubiano di Prensa Profesional
Description:
Red Arubiano di Prensa Profesional (RAPP) is an association
dedicated to encouraging the free practice of journalism and the promotion of high standards of ethical behavior. RAPP works to inspire and educate current and future journalists through professional development; and protects fundamental rights guarantees of freedom of speech and press through its advocacy efforts. The organization is establishing itself as an association following the ethical guidelines of the Dutch Association of Journalists (NVJ). 

Our principles  
• Promoting Quality Journalism: We focus on enhancing the skills and knowledge of journalists by organizing specialized training, workshops, and seminars. 
• Upholding Journalistic Ethics: We adhere to strict ethical guidelines to ensure the integrity and credibility of journalism. 
• Supporting Professional Development: Through ongoing educational programs and networking opportunities, we assist journalists in their continuous professional growth. 
• Protecting Fundamental Rights: We advocate for laws that safeguard press freedom and access to information, while also providing legal support to journalists when needed. 
• Media Literacy: We are dedicated to increasing media literacy within the Aruban community through educational initiatives and publications.

Nos dirigimos a inversores, empresarios y gestores de alto patrimonio en España y Latinoamérica interesados en maximizar su legado y patrimonio a través de estrategias sofisticadas y discretas.

Exploramos oportunidades de inversión alternativa que van más allá de los mercados tradicionales: desde activos exclusivos como el metaverso de alto valor o las tierras raras, hasta modelos de negocio replicables con potencial disruptivo. Ofrecemos análisis profundos sobre cómo replicar éxitos internacionales en nuestros mercados, facilitando la expansión empresarial y la generación de nuevas fuentes de ingresos.

Nuestra visión va más allá de lo financiero. Abordamos el lujo como una experiencia, no una posesión, curando los destinos, servicios y objetos más exclusivos que resuenan con un estilo de vida de élite. Además, dedicamos una sección fundamental a la filantropía estratégica y el lujo consciente, mostrando cómo el gran capital puede ser un motor de cambio social y ambiental. Presentamos casos inspiradores de familias y líderes que utilizan su influencia y patrimonio para construir legados duraderos en áreas como la ciencia, la educación y la cultura.

The Silent Capital es tu guía para una inversión inteligente, un estilo de vida aspiracional y una filantropía con propósito. Únete a una comunidad que valora la discreción, la excelencia y la capacidad de forjar un legado real.

Name: Nouveautés Digital
Description:
Minha apresentação antecede a da revista, pois nossas histórias se misturam de maneira que não posso falar sobre ela, sem falar de mim. A revista Nouveautés não nasceu apenas de uma lacuna editorial do mercado de beleza. Nasceu do desejo que me acompanha e a partir do qual tento traçar meus caminhos, o desejo de compreender. Sou psicóloga, meu olhar para a vida é embasado pela ética da psicanálise. A escuta, conceito importante da psicologia e da psicanálise, busca o não óbvio dos fenômenos e assim sigo sempre à procura de respostas. A revista Nouveautés pretende ser a resposta à demanda do mercado de beleza por “relacionamento”. E falando em relacionamento, meu marido segue com a apresentação da revista…

A reportagem inaugural da revista Nouveautés não poderia estar mais alinhada à sua proposta. Ela fala sobre como a indústria de beleza tem se valido das collabs com outras marcas para avançar em territórios novos de mercado, gerar diferenciação no portfólio e somar forças para entregar algo novo para as consumidoras. Esta edição também traz a cobertura, em texto, imagem e vídeo, do Summit de Perfumaria Independente de Atualidade Cosmética, evento que reuniu os principais nomes desse mercado para um dia de discussões e troca de experiências. Para enriquecer a publicação, a cada edição, a revista Nouveautés terá convidados diferentes para falar sobre tendências, compartilhar seus pontos de vista sobre um tema relevante e abrir o seu dia a dia para você.

- Creatividad: Generamos ideas originales y personalizadas para cada cliente, buscando siempre el impacto y la inspiración.

- Compromiso: Practicamos la escucha activa para entender mejor a nuestros clientes y desarrollar piezas que comunican eficazmente la esencia de su marca o proyecto.

Nuestra visión es ser líderes en la industria de la producción audiovisual en Europa, reconocidos por nuestra capacidad para transformar ideas en experiencias visuales impactantes y memorables. Aspiramos a influir positivamente en la sociedad a través de contenidos que no solo entretengan, sino que también inspiren.

Nuestra misión es ofrecer soluciones audiovisuales innovadoras y personalizadas que cumplan y superen las expectativas de nuestros clientes. Nos comprometemos a trabajar con pasión, integridad y creatividad, utilizando nuestra experiencia multidisciplinar para crear contenidos que cuenten historias poderosas, conecten con las audiencias y refuercen la identidad de las marcas con las que colaboramos.

Name: OHERIC Média
Description:
OHERIC Média est une plateforme éditoriale engagée, dédiée à l’analyse rigoureuse et à la diffusion de points de vue éclairés sur des sujets variés tels que l’économie, la sécurité, l’industrie, l’éducation, la culture, l’histoire, la santé, l’agriculture, la science, l’immigration, et l’environnement. Conçue pour redonner la parole aux experts, aux professionnels et à ceux qui font, OHERIC Média s’inscrit en contrepoint des discours simplistes et populistes qui dominent trop souvent la scène publique.

Dans un paysage médiatique souvent saturé de prises de position non fondées, OHERIC Média se distingue par un engagement inébranlable envers la véracité des faits et la profondeur des analyses. Chaque article est le fruit de recherches approfondies et d'une réflexion nuancée, visant à apporter des solutions pragmatiques aux défis contemporains.

En valorisant les contributions de spécialistes reconnus, OHERIC Média aspire à devenir une référence pour ceux qui cherchent à comprendre le monde à travers un prisme sérieux et documenté. Plus qu'un simple média, OHERIC se veut un espace de réflexion et de débat où le bon sens et la connaissance priment sur l’idéologie et l’émotion.

Notre mission est de déconstruire les discours simplistes pour proposer des perspectives fondées sur l’expérience et l’expertise, afin d’aider nos lecteurs à naviguer dans la complexité des enjeux actuels avec discernement et responsabilité.

Sébastien Tertrais, Rédacteur en chef

Name: Artchetypes
Description:
Art Stories Podcast es un proyecto dedicado a hacer del arte contemporáneo un espacio más accesible, cercano y comprensible. Cada semana exploramos historias, artistas, exposiciones, ferias, tendencias del mercado del arte y mucho más, a través de un formato dinámico y atractivo.

 ¿Qué ofrecemos?
 Podcast semanal en Spotify donde analizamos temas clave del arte contemporáneo.
 Entrevistas con artistas, curadores y profesionales del sector.
 Cobertura de exposiciones y eventos, con visitas a museos, galerías y ferias de arte.
 Contenido en redes sociales (Instagram, TikTok y LinkedIn) con análisis, vídeos y debates sobre arte contemporáneo.
 Un espacio de conversación y aprendizaje, donde tanto profesionales del sector como amantes del arte pueden compartir sus perspectivas.

 ¿Para quién es este podcast?
 Para artistas emergentes, curadores, coleccionistas y estudiantes de arte.
 Para quienes quieren iniciarse en el arte contemporáneo y romper con la barrera de lo “incomprensible”.
 Para todas aquellas personas que sienten curiosidad por el mundo del arte y su impacto en la sociedad.

 Escúchanos cada domingo a las 19:00 en Spotify y síguenos en redes para no perderte ninguna historia.

 ¿Eres artista, galerista o profesional del sector y te gustaría colaborar? Escríbenos, estamos abiertos a nuevas voces y perspectivas.

#ArtStoriesPodcast #ArteContemporáneo #PodcastDeArte #ArtMarket #CulturaVisual #Curaduría

Name: Julkisen sanan neuvosto
Description:
Julkisen sanan neuvosto (JSN) on tiedotusvälineiden kustantajien ja toimittajien vuonna 1968 perustama elin, jonka tehtävänä on tulkita hyvää journalistista tapaa ja puolustaa sanan- ja julkaisemisen vapautta. Kantelun voi neuvostolle tehdä kuka tahansa, jonka mielestä lehdistössä, radiossa tai televisiossa on loukattu hyvää journalistista tapaa. JSN ei ole tuomioistuin eikä se käytä julkista valtaa. Sen päätöksiä seurataan silti tarkoin. 

The Council for Mass Media (CMM) is a self-regulating committee established in 1968 by publishers and journalists in the field of mass communication. Its task is to interpret good professional practice and defend the freedom of speech and publication. Any person who considers that there has been a breach of good professional practice by media may bring this to the attention of the Council. CMM does not exercise legal jurisdiction.

Para que se escuchen las voces de más personas racializadas no-blancas, migrantes, con discapacidad, del colectivo LGBTIQ+, personas mayores o del mundo rural, nace Humanidad Aumentada: un proyecto de Salomé Herce (Sacalomejor) y Gorka Urrutia (Urlan Heat) que funciona como una plataforma digital para conectar a periodistas, creadores de contenido y otros públicos con fuentes diversas, historias y experiencias de vida valiosas.

Porque dar voz a lo invisible es cambiar nuestra manera de ver el mundo.

¿Y tú? ¿Tienes una historia que contar o buscas dar visibilidad a voces diversas? Escríbenos: hola@humanidadaumentada.com.

Proyecto apoyado por el programa The Break (Escuela de Organización Industrial), cofinanciado por la Unión Europea.

Emitimos para radio 8 despachos diarios (uno a las 5 am en versión quechua) en tanto en televisión se transmite 3 informativos a las 8 a.m, 12 m. y 4 p.m.Además difundimos información a través de las redes sociales de R360 y en nuestra página web.

R360 busca brindar información  de interés regional en todos los campos del desarrollo económico y humano. Así como promover mediante la información oportuna las potencialidades de las regiones, proyectos, necesidades y el cómo encararlas para alcanzar las metas de cada región y en general del país.

Name: Urgent Futures Podcast
Description:
URGENT FUTURES is the show that finds {signals} in the noise—a podcast for those taking a hard look at the realities of tomorrow. 

My guests are artists and activists, ecologists and economists, theorists and technologists, and the many other interdisciplinary experts whose ideas clarify the chaos, from culture to the cosmos. Through their work we encounter the critical ideas that illuminate emerging futures today.

Past episodes including Washington Post columnist Taylor Lorenz, Nobel Prize-winning Physicist Kip Thorne, Curator/Theorist Legacy Russell, Ecological Economist William E. Rees, Artist-Activist Autumn Breon, Anthropologist Lisa Messeri, Lawyer-Philosopher Nita Farahany, Trend Forecaster Emily Segal, ecologist Gerardo Ceballos, biologist Paul R. Ehrlich, among many others.

Name: Brevity.Live
Description:
De kern van Brevity is eigenlijk onze Midday Brief. Elke middag krijgen abonnees 12 tot 14 korte nieuwsitems: internationale inzichten, opvallende passages, dingen die je normaal niet tegenkomt in Nederlandstalige media. Het zijn stukjes van drie à vier zinnen, snel te lezen, maar altijd de moeite waard omdat ze relevant én betekenisvol zijn. En dat werkt: onze open rate gaat richting de zeventig procent, wat echt uitzonderlijk is.
Rond die nieuwsbrief hebben we Brevity.live gebouwd, een micro-leerplatform. Daar vind je Nederlandstalige samenvattingen van de beste businessboeken over sales, marketing, management en AI, plus podcasts. En we hebben Nova, onze AI agent, die getraind is op die honderden boeken en die kennis integreert in zijn antwoorden.
Zo geven we zelfstandigen en kmo’s de tools én de inspiratie om niet alleen bij te blijven, maar er ook meteen iets mee te doen in hun dagelijkse praktijk.

Name: The Archive Room Podcast
Description:
The Archive Room — About
The Archive Room is a podcast and creative platform dedicated to uncovering the hidden world of TV and film archives. We dive deep into the vault to bring listeners rare insights, forgotten footage and behind‑the‑scenes stories from the world of media archives.
Whether you’re an industry insider, a historian, or simply curious about how archived content shapes modern storytelling — The Archive Room offers thoughtful conversations with archivists, filmmakers, rights‑holders and preservation experts.
Expect:
 In‑depth interviews sharing what really goes on behind the scenes of preservation and archiving
 Fascinating archival discoveries and analysis of historical media
 Perspectives on how old footage continues to influence modern film, TV, and culture
Our mission is to shine a spotlight on the hidden labour, craftsmanship and history behind media archives — making the archive world accessible, engaging and relevant.
Follow The Archive Room to unlock stories you’ve never heard — and rediscover the past through film and television.

Name: EIMA European Influencer Marketing Alliance
Description:
The EIMA is a collective of local trade bodies gathering the leading influencer marketing agencies, agents, technologies and creators in Europe.

The mission of the is the EIMA is to foster a sustainable, ethical, and profitable future for the European influencer marketing industry.

In 2024, the Influencer Marketing Trade Body (IMTB) in the UK, Union des Métiers de l'Influence et des Créateurs de Contenus (UMICC) in France, and Bundesverband Influencer Marketing e.V. (BVIM) in Germany have formed an alliance called: The European Influencer Marketing Alliance (EIMA).

This Alliance is meant to welcome any other professional organizations within the Influencer Marketing industry in Europe.

We aim at elevating industry standards and promote responsible influence to protect both the creator economy and consumers in Europe.

The EIMA provides a practical way to share local expertise with partner members for the betterment of the influencer marketing industry, as well as a unified voice for creator economy matters to regulators, legislators, media, academics and other key stakeholders.

Name: 2Oaks
Description:
Nós somos a 2 OAKS, uma produtora audiovisual da latino-americana focada no mercado esportivo. Nossa missão é registrar a emoção do esporte de forma única, causando uma sinergia entre anunciantes, atletas e o público em geral.
Nossos profissionais estão há mais de dez anos no mercado audiovisual, em transmissões ao vivo e produções de filmes e animações para a indústria esportiva. Já produzimos mais de 15 mil eventos esportivos de grande porte.
Entre os mais recentes, estão a Final da Copa Conmebol Libertadores Guayaquil 2022, a final da Copa Conmebol Sulamericana Córdoba 2022, a Conmebol Copa América 2021, o Mundial de Bocha Paralímpica Rio 2022, o Campeonato Brasileiro de Seleções Estaduais SUB-18  e as Eliminatórias da Copa do Mundo FIFA Catar 2022. 
Além de experiente, nossa equipe de Infotainment é polivalente e está em toda a América do sul. Além da nossa sede no Brasil, possuímos representantes na Argentina, Colômbia, Peru e Chile. Essa estrutura nos permite atender de maneira continental de forma rápida e precisa. 
E por falar em estrutura, possuímos um centro de edição no Rio de Janeiro, capaz de funcionar 24 horas por dia, 7 dias por semana. Com esta base, podemos editar e produzir conteúdo em larga escala para atender grandes demandas de qualquer parte do mundo. 
A estrutura de captação e edição da 2 Oaks é uma das melhores do Brasil. Trabalhamos apenas com as marcas líderes do setor, como Canon, Blackmagic e Sony, e temos parcerias que nos permitem aplicar soluções tecnológicas avançadas e inovadoras, garantindo a produção de vídeos de alta qualidade.
A 2 Oaks existe para criar uma experiência imersiva e envolvente para o público. Nosso objetivo é fornecer aos espectadores uma visão mais profunda e interativa dos eventos esportivos que participamos.

Name: EntropX
Description:
EntropX a été créé en février 2024 par plusieurs étudiants des MASTER CRYPTIS (parcours informatique et mathématiques). Le magazine est à retrouver tous les 2 mois pour en apprendre toujours plus sur des thématiques qui nous touchent tous. 

Vous êtes débutant, amateur ou confirmé ? Qui que vous soyez, si le monde de la cybersécurité vous intrigue ou vous passionne, vous trouverez probablement votre bonheur à travers nos pages.
Différentes thématiques dictent la structure de chaque numéro afin que vous y retrouviez vos points d'intérêts.

Envie de technique ?
Aiguisez vos connaissances avec 'Ma-Thématique' ou 'Chercheurs phares' !
 
Envie d'actualité ? 
Tenez-vous au courant des dernières news avec 'L'Actu Cyber' ou 'L'Actu Crypto' !

Envie d'en apprendre plus sur la thématique de chaque numéro ?
Profitez de notre article Thématique !

Envie d'aller plus loin ? 
Alors vous devriez vous intéresser à 'Ca Chiffre !' et notre point 'Sécurité et IA' !

On n'oublie personne, pas même les plus joueurs d'entre vous puisque dans chaque numéro nous vous proposons aussi une page de jeux. Les réponses à nos énigmes sont à retrouver dans les prochains numéros !


Bref, EntropX c'est tout ça ! De l'informatique, des mathématiques et surtout une bonne dose de passion. 

Suivez nous sur Instagram : @entropx_mag

Name: Being Media Presse

Nous sommes partis du constat que les médias ont toujours eu le monopole dans les relations-presse.

- Jusqu'ici, vous ne choisissiez pas les médias qui vous publient. 

- Jusqu'ici, vous ne contrôliez que très peu ce qui se dit de vous dans les médias, les journalistes gardant la main sur les contenus.

- Jusqu'ici, vous deviez attendre des mois avant d'obtenir des premières retombées.

Avec Being Media, nous inversons le rapport avec les médias.
Avec des offres flexibles, sans engagement, et sans frais mensuels.
Nous nous rémunérons uniquement aux résultats.

- Vous choisissiez les médias dans lesquels vous souhaitez apparaître, et pas l'inverse. Vous ne payez que si vous êtes publié où vous le souhaitez.

- Vous contrôlez à 100% les messages qui sont partagés dans les médias et bénéficiez de révisions illimitées sur les contenus produits.

- Vous n'attendez plus des mois pour vos apparitions, nous produisons vos premières retombées en l'espace de 2 semaines.

Vous êtes maître des médias à activer, des résultats à atteindre, de ce qui se dit de vous et du budget que vous souhaitez investir.

La presse où vous voulez, quand vous voulez !

Nous nous dédions à révéler les trésors cachés de son histoire, à mettre en avant ses personnalités marquantes, et à plonger au cœur de son actualité lifestyle vibrante.

Notre sélection minutieuse d'adresses prestigieuses et de destinations de rêve, accompagnée d'une immersion profonde dans le monde de l'art, de la culture et de la gastronomie, forme le noyau de notre contenu. Name: SocioLinspire
Description:
SocioLinspire né de la volonté de sortir du carcan des sciences réservées uniquement aux  professionnell.e.s du domaine ; ce média a cœur de vous faire devenir les acteurs principaux de sa construction et de sa pérennité.

SocioLinspire est un média de sciences humaines et sociales qui a pour vocation de traiter des problématiques que vous choisissez, sous le prisme de l’anthropologie et de la sociologie. Le concept est simple : faire de ces domaines atypiques un socle commun de savoirs sur vos sujets de prédilection. 

Plusieurs sondages seront réalisés sur LinkedIn (et d’autres plateformes à venir), chacun vous permettant d’avoir accès à des propositions sur des thématiques différentes : c’est à vous de faire le choix de celle qui sera traitée dans les futurs articles.

Au-delà du simple contenu textuel que vous pourrez faire défiler sur vos écrans, au gré de votre temps et de vos envies, SocioLinspire vous positionne en tant qu’actrices et acteurs d’un média qui a pour objectif fondamental de rendre accessible la science des comportements humaines à justement … tous les humains.

Ce média se veut être en constante évolution : chacun de vos retours représentera en effet l’opportunité de l’améliorer, que cela soit en termes de charte graphique, de contenu ou bien même de fonctionnement global. 

Ayant évolué dans des mondes sociaux très distincts les uns des autres, j’ai aujourd’hui à cœur (ouvert) de livrer des réflexions sociologiques sur des sujets qui vous parlent, vous questionnent, vous animent, vous touchent, vous inquiètent. 

Carnets de notes en mains, yeux et oreilles grands ouverts, je compte observer mais aussi faire les recherches les plus pertinentes possibles ; celles qui pourront vous donner les éléments de réponses sociologiques aux questions que vous vous posez.

Name: REVISTA ICÓNICAS
Description:
Presentamos "Revista Icónicas": Un Tributo a las Mujeres Emprendedoras, nace como medio de comunicación para visibilizar a emprendedoras y empresarias a nivel LATAM en colaboración con COMUNIDAD MUJERES EMPRENDEDORAS CHILE

Con gran entusiasmo, anunciamos el lanzamiento de nuestra primera edición de "Revista Icónicas", una publicación dedicada a celebrar y empoderar a las mujeres emprendedoras que están dejando huella en el mundo de los negocios. Este ambicioso proyecto es un homenaje a la fuerza, la creatividad y la determinación de aquellas mujeres que se atreven a soñar en grande y a transformar sus visiones en realidades impactantes.

"Revista Icónicas" se presenta como un espacio elegante y sofisticado, diseñado especialmente para aquellas emprendedoras que buscan inspiración y conexión en su camino hacia el éxito. Cada página de nuestra revista está meticulosamente elaborada para resaltar historias de vida, estrategias innovadoras y consejos prácticos de mujeres líderes en diversos sectores. Desde empresarias en tecnología hasta creadoras en el mundo del arte, nuestras protagonistas son ejemplos brillantes de cómo la pasión y la perseverancia pueden llevar a resultados extraordinarios.

En nuestras ediciones, hemos reunido una selección de relatos inspiradores que muestran el viaje de mujeres que han enfrentado desafíos y han logrado superar obstáculos. Cada historia es un recordatorio poderoso de que, a pesar de las adversidades, es posible alcanzar las metas y construir negocios exitosos. Además, incluimos entrevistas exclusivas con emprendedoras icónicas que comparten sus secretos, fracasos y triunfos, ofreciendo una visión honesta y enriquecedora de lo que significa ser mujer en el mundo empresarial actual.

Nuestra revista no solo busca informar, sino también crear una comunidad sólida de apoyo entre mujeres emprendedoras 

Bienvenidas!

Name: Les Nichées
Description:
Les Nichées est un média digital dédié aux parents séparés et aux familles recomposées.
Pourquoi ce projet ?
Parce qu'un mariage sur 2 se solde par un divorce en France.
Parce qu'un enfant sur 4 vit en famille monoparentale.
Et près d’un enfant sur 10 en famille recomposée. (Chiffres Insee 2020)
Parce que l’événement qui cause le plus de stress dans la vie après le décès de son conjoint ou de son enfant est un divorce ou une séparation conjugale (Respectivement 73 et 65 points sur l’échelle de stress Holmes et Rahe)

Et pourtant…

Avez-vous l’impression que la société prend la mesure des difficultés et de la souffrance liées à une séparation ? 
Entendez-vous souvent la voix des parents séparés dans les débats de société ? 
Les questions relatives à leur rythme de garde ou leurs conditions de vie sont-elles parfois évoquées en entreprise, lorsqu'il est question de Qualité de vie au travail ?
Pensez-vous que les enseignants soient suffisamment au fait de ce que vivent des enfants pris dans un divorce conflictuel ? 
Estimez-vous que les médias font aujourd’hui une juste place à ces familles et à leurs  difficultés ?

C’est précisément parce que les parents séparés et leurs enfants sont si nombreux mais que l’on en parle si peu qu'est née l'idée d'un média qui leur est entièrement dédié : les Nichées. Un média de solutions avant tout, destiné à apporter des réponses concrètes et aidantes, donner la parole aux concernés, éveiller les consciences autour des problématiques les plus sensibles liées à la séparation.
Mais Les Nichées, c’est aussi une initiative plus large, qui a l’ambition de fédérer des professionnels de l’accompagnement, des représentants des services publics et d’entreprises privées… tous ceux qui ont envie de faire bouger les lignes pour que les difficultés de ces familles ne soient plus négligées et que leurs enfants ne soient plus les premiers à en faire les frais.
Envie de nous aider ? De participer à votre niveau ? Discutons-en !

Nous y travaillons en utilisant les moyens multimédias modernes, et en le faisant dans l'esprit de Saint Louis-Marie Grignion de Montfort (1673-1716), avec le souci de l'unité des chrétiens « pour que le monde croie » (Jn 17,21).

Depuis 20 ans, plusieurs structures juridiques ont été créées pour accompagner le développement de nos activités telles que notre librairie en ligne ("Editions Marie de Nazareth"), notre association cultuelle (loi 1905) "Prier Marie de Nazareth", notre société de presse et d'éditions "1000 Raisons de croire" ainsi que notre Fonds de dotation "Fonds Marie de Nazareth".
